title: Five seps for redesigning work in the age of AI
description: When Publicis Sapient’s chief marketing and communications officer sought to drive growth without increasing expenses or headcount, she turned to the natural solution for a company whose products promise to unlock AI-driven enhancements and efficiencies: more AI.Teresa Barreira believed in the vision Publicis Sapient promoted to its clients. It was a bet on her own company’s pitch that AI is a resource equalizer — a catalyst that could help challenger brands compete with anyone.An initial plan offered employees leeway to incorporate AI into their workflows, with a simple mandate for marketing employees to use AI tools in their jobs, and report back after six months.The results, if not exactly failure, were far from a resounding success.The new tools brought supercharged capabilities, but results remained largely unchanged because the team had not redesigned how it worked. Achieving organizational transformation seemed elusive.The experience, as the firm's head of marketing innovation incubator recalled, was “like a farmer plugging electricity into their horse.”The struggle, recounted in the new Darden Business Publishing technical note “Redesigning Work in the Age of AI: Publicis Sapient's Five-Step Marketing Transformation,” is one of the endemic management challenges of the moment, according to Kimberly A. Whitler, the Frank M. Sands Sr. Associate Professor at the University of Virginia's Darden School of Business.“Everyone knows how important AI is right now, and marketers and companies everywhere are taking different approaches,” said Whitler. “Right now, most organizations are struggling to maximize transformation. This is normal as early iterations are centered on experimentation.”While Publicis Sapient could have thrown in the towel or simply checked the box on use of the new tools, Barreira and her team were determined to figure out how to make them work for the benefit of the organization. They committed to devising a process to figure out how to ideally work and grow in an era of transformative technology.“Their early experimentation was crucial. It not only led them to an approach that ultimately drove transformation, but the invitation to experiment actually prepared the organization to embrace AI,” said Whitler. “Because they worked through the initial struggle, they are ahead of many of their peers, and I think there are some real aha moments in their approach.”Changing the Nature of the Work ItselfWhen organizations decide to bring AI capabilities into an organization, it's critical they have goals in mind. Is AI simply a worker productivity boost? Is it being brought in with the goal of replacing human labor?In the case of Publicis Sapient, Barreira's goal for AI was clear: The new capabilities should fundamentally change the nature of work so that employees could “spend their time on the most critical activities that would yield the greatest impact.”Using the tools to complete existing work faster did nothing to further the goals of transformation and impact. And yet, the initial six-month exploratory period was not time wasted. After half a year of experimenting, AI had been infused in the company's culture, and employees were comfortable with the tools.“They initially saw it as a failure, but I see it as a critical first step,” Whitler said. “They demystified AI and got participation from the bottom up, and the people at the top better understood the work being done across the organization.”Also Read: 5 rules for getting AI right in your organizationEmbracing the issue with a mindset of continuous improvement, the Publicis Sapient leadership team continued to iterate on its approach and eventually devised a five-step framework for redesigning marketing work in the age of AI.1. Experimenting with AI tools and agents. Given an invitation to explore, teams grew comfortable with the new tools, laying critical groundwork for future steps.2. Mapping tasks across the Marketing and Communications function. Aiding visibility across the marketing group, tasks were mapped across every unit, allowing all stakeholders to better understand the nature of their team's work. Tasks were further segmented into those that could be done by AI alone, those in which AI could aid humans and those best suited to humans alone.3. Turning marketers into builders. With AI agents easier to build than ever, Publicis Sapient leaders made marketers the architects of the tools they wanted and would actually use.4. Redesigning workflows end to end. While assistants brought certain efficiencies, the real gains came from redesigning workflows with AI in mind. In one example Whitler cites, a marketing campaign that historically would have had 50 distinct touchpoints or approvals before completion required only nine, and the development timeline was cut from 20 days to as few as three.5. Refining roles and job descriptions. Planning to make the transformation sustainable, marketers were instructed to write a new job description for their new roles and spell out how they planned to reinvest their time now that so much of it had been freed up by automation.Critically, leadership made clear that while AI-powered transformation was now an expected part of a high-performance culture, it was also a culture they were all forging together. One day of the month, called Pause For Learning Day, was devoted to nothing more than continuous education; employee-led AI Thursdays occurred twice a month; and on Failure Fridays teams shared what went wrong, with the individual who had failed fastest and learned the most receiving an award.The proof of the approach showed up in key performance indicators, with significant measurable improvement in operational and growth metrics.The Shortsightedness of Prioritizing EfficiencyAlthough devised in a marketing group, the approach has potential implications for any organization struggling to incorporate new technologies at a time of rapid change, said Whitler. The transformation is almost certainly not going to be an easy process but doing nothing in the face of such new capabilities is likely to yield less productivity and an increasingly nervous workforce.“There's so much wisdom in their approach, because there's so much research showing that people are terrified of AI taking their jobs,” said Whitler. “The best way to protect against that is to bring people together and figure it out.”While AI-related job losses can be seen in news headlines every week, and many major companies have been explicit in their statements tying layoffs to AI efficiencies, such moves may prove to be shortsighted at this stage of AI adoption, says Whitler.“Is AI going to amplify output and accelerate growth, or is it going to simply drive efficiency and eliminate cost?” Whitler said. “Figuring out how to drive significant transformation that drives extraordinary new performance outcomes is generally the business amplifier.”Professor Kimberly A. Whitler is the author of the technical note, “Redesigning Work in the Age of AI: Publicis Sapient’s Five-Step Marketing Transformation,” published by Darden Business Publishing (April 2026).

title: Growth is a byproduct. We must first get the product right: Vikas Oberoi
description: Mumbai-based Oberoi Realty, on Monday, announced its foray into the Delhi-NCR market with the launch of its luxury housing project, Three Sixty North. With an investment of Rs 4,000 crore in the first phase, the project will have over 800 units across six towers and is located on Golf Course Extension Road, Gurugram. Speaking to Forbes India on the sidelines of the launch event, Vikas Oberoi, chairman and managing director of the company, speaks about competition in the market, the similarities between Delhi and Mumbai, and his idea of a luxury apartment.Q. How do you view competition in the North, considering similar products are being offered by the likes of DLF and others?Others [like DLF] have their own following. This product will only amplify the market [forluxury housing]. It is not necessarily something new, but what we are doing is bringing our practices. I wouldn’t call them best practices, but I guess we are a lot softer towards people and brokers. We want to be in all segments. We’ll see how this plays out. We are confident about the product but nervous about the outcome.Q. Luxury in Mumbai is different from luxury in Delhi or North India. What do you have to say about that?There isn’t much difference. People across the world are the same. Everybody wants the best. We will bring our version of what is best. Luxury is not just the apartment but the environment and the community. We are mindful of how we go about allotting apartments. We have seen similar apartments being priced differently because of the community.Also Read: Vikas Oberoi on Oberoi Realty growth, luxury housing and expansionQ. What are your revenue expectations from the project?We don’t know the outcome or how it will play out. We are happy if we are received well. We want to check in and be settled here. We want to be part of the ecosystem first and see how it goes.Q. You mentioned earlier the company’s 100-year roadmap. What next after Gurugram?Why I keep speaking about 100 years is because it gives me the time to think. If I am already on the next thought, this project gets diluted. I want to finish it well. I can’t just start it and move on to something else. I want to finish well before starting something new. I am not working merely for growth. Growth is a byproduct. I must be good at what I do. It’s important for us to protect the brand nameQ. Many developers are now focusing on this luxury space. Do you have concerns about oversupply?There is no risk as such. Today, India is a growth story where people are making money. The first thing they want is a quality of life. And other than DLF, nobody is making the product we have.

title: फीफा वर्ल्ड कप: जर्मनी की विदाई, पैराग्वे ने पेनल्टी शूटआउट जीतकर अंतिम-16 में बनाई जगह
description:
स्पोर्ट्स डेस्क:  फीफा विश्व कप 2026 के राउंड ऑफ 32 में पराग्वे ने चार बार की चैंपियन जर्मनी को पेनल्टी शूटआउट में 4-3 से हराकर बड़ा उलटफेर कर दिया। मंगलवार को बोस्टन स्टेडियम में खेले गए मुकाबले का निर्धारित समय 1-1 की बराबरी पर समाप्त हुआ था। इसके बाद मैच का फैसला पेनल्टी शूटआउट से.
The post फीफा वर्ल्ड कप: जर्मनी की विदाई, पैराग्वे ने पेनल्टी शूटआउट जीतकर अंतिम-16 में बनाई जगह appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
स्पोर्ट्स डेस्क:  फीफा विश्व कप 2026 के राउंड ऑफ 32 में पराग्वे ने चार बार की चैंपियन जर्मनी को पेनल्टी शूटआउट में 4-3 से हराकर बड़ा उलटफेर कर दिया। मंगलवार को बोस्टन स्टेडियम में खेले गए मुकाबले का निर्धारित समय 1-1 की बराबरी पर समाप्त हुआ था। इसके बाद मैच का फैसला पेनल्टी शूटआउट से हुआ।
फीफा विश्व कप के इतिहास में जर्मनी इससे पहले कभी भी पेनल्टी शूटआउट में नहीं हारा था। इस बार भी टीम ने आखिरी तक संघर्ष किया। अनुभवी गोलकीपर मैनुअल नोयर ने शानदार बचाव कर जर्मनी की उम्मीदें जिंदा रखीं, लेकिन आखिरकार पराग्वे ने अपने तीसरे निर्णायक मौके का फायदा उठाकर अंतिम-16 में जगह बना ली।
मैच के 42वें मिनट में जूलियो एन्सिसो ने गोल कर पराग्वे को 1-0 की बढ़त दिलाई। दूसरे हाफ में फ्लोरियन विर्ट्ज़ के क्रॉस पर काई हैवर्ट्ज़ ने हेडर से गोल कर स्कोर 1-1 कर दिया। इसके बाद जोनाथन टाह ने भी हेडर से गोल किया, लेकिन उसे अमान्य करार दे दिया गया। तय समय तक कोई और गोल नहीं हुआ, इसलिए मुकाबला पेनल्टी शूटआउट में पहुंचा।
ये भी पढे़ं :-  https://dainiksaveratimes.com/sports/morocco-defeated-netherlands-3-2-penalty-shootout/
शूटआउट की शुरुआत जर्मनी ने की, लेकिन काई हैवर्ट्ज़ की पहली पेनल्टी पर पराग्वे के गोलकीपर के हाथों बचाव किया। इसके बाद मॉरिसियो ने गोल कर पराग्वे को बढ़त दिला दी। हालांकि, जोशुआ किमिख ने अगली पेनल्टी पर गोल करके जर्मनी की वापसी कराई।
इसके बाद गुस्तावो गोमेज़ ने गोल कर पराग्वे को 2-1 से आगे किया, लेकिन जमाल मुसियाला ने शानदार शॉट लगाकर स्कोर 2-2 कर दिया। रोमांच तब और बढ़ गया जब मटियास गैलार्ज़ा ने गोल करके पैराग्वे को जीत के करीब पहुंचा दिया, जबकि जर्मनी के लिए निक वोल्टेमेड का अगला प्रयास रोक दिया गया।
हालांकि, चार बार की चैंपियन टीम मुकाबले में बनी रही क्योंकि एंटोनियो सनाब्रिया का संभावित मैच-विनिंग शॉट रोक दिया गया, जिससे नादिम अमीरी को मौका मिला और उन्होंने स्कोर 3-3 कर दिया।
इसके बाद पराग्वे के फेबियन बालबुएना की पेनल्टी को भी मैनुअल नोयर ने रोककर जर्मनी की उम्मीदें कायम रखीं। लेकिन पराग्वे ने तीसरा मौका नहीं गंवाया। जोसे कनाले ने दबाव के बीच शानदार पेनल्टी लगाकर अपनी टीम को जीत दिलाई और जर्मनी को टूर्नामेंट से बाहर कर दिया।
इस जीत के साथ कोच गुस्तावो अल्फारो की अगुआई में पराग्वे ने अंतिम-16 में अपनी जगह पक्की कर ली, जबकि चार बार की विश्व चैंपियन जर्मनी का अभियान राउंड ऑफ 32 में ही समाप्त हो गया।
The post फीफा वर्ल्ड कप: जर्मनी की विदाई, पैराग्वे ने पेनल्टी शूटआउट जीतकर अंतिम-16 में बनाई जगह appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Bharat Tiwari encounter: दाखिल याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सुनवाई से किया इंकार, कहा- हाईकोर्ट में रखें बात
description:
Bharat Tiwari encounter: बिहार के भोजपुर में हुए भरत भूषण तिवारी एनकाउंटर मामले में दाखिल जनहित याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सुनवाई से इंकार कर दिया है। सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने याचिकाकर्ता को हाईकोर्ट जाने को कहा है। सुप्रीम कोर्ट के वकील विशाल तिवारी ने सुप्रीम कोर्ट में याचिका दाखिल कर सीबीआई जांच की मांग की.
The post Bharat Tiwari encounter: दाखिल याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सुनवाई से किया इंकार, कहा- हाईकोर्ट में रखें बात appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Bharat Tiwari encounter: बिहार के भोजपुर में हुए भरत भूषण तिवारी एनकाउंटर मामले में दाखिल जनहित याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सुनवाई से इंकार कर दिया है। सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने याचिकाकर्ता को हाईकोर्ट जाने को कहा है।
सुप्रीम कोर्ट के वकील विशाल तिवारी ने सुप्रीम कोर्ट में याचिका दाखिल कर सीबीआई जांच की मांग की थी। याचिका में सुप्रीम कोर्ट के रिटायर्ड जज की अगुवाई में स्वतंत्र विशेषज्ञ समिति गठित करने की भी मांग की गई थी। इसके साथ ही एनकाउंटर में शामिल पुलिसकर्मियों के खिलाफ एफआईआर दर्ज करने और मामले की जांच सीबीआई से कराने की मांग की गई थी। याचिकाकर्ता का आरोप है कि भारत भूषण तिवारी की मौत एक हत्या का मामला है और इसकी निष्पक्ष जांच जरूरी है।
हाईकोर्ट में बात रखने के निर्देश 
वकील विशाल तिवारी की ओर से दायर जनहित याचिका को जस्टिस एमएम सुंदरेश और जस्टिस शील नागू की बेंच ने सुनने से इंकार कर दिया है। इसके साथ ही याचिका दाखिल करने के औचित्य पर सवाल खड़ा किया। सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने याचिकाकर्ता से पूछा, आपने किस हैसियत से याचिका दाखिल की है? कोर्ट ने याचिकाकर्ता वकील से कहा कि हाईकोर्ट में जाकर अपनी बात रखिए।
ये भी पढ़ें- ‘जय श्री राम बोलने वालों पर लाठीचार्ज कराने वाले आज भक्ति की बात कर रहे’, CM योगी का विपक्ष पर हमला
 
पहले भी सुनवाई से किया जा चुका है इंकार 
इससे पहले, जब जस्टिस बी.वी. नागरत्ना की अध्यक्षता वाली बेंच के सामने इस मामले का जिक्र किया गया था, तो सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने इस पर तत्काल सुनवाई करने से इंकार कर दिया था और याचिकाकर्ता को मामले को लिस्ट कराने के लिए सुप्रीम कोर्ट की रजिस्ट्री से संपर्क करने का निर्देश दिया था।
सवालों के घेरें में पुलिस 
इस जनहित याचिका में भोजपुर में 17 जून को भरत भूषण तिवारी की एनकाउंटर में हुई मौत के मामले में एफआईआर दर्ज करने का निर्देश देने की मांग की गई है। साथ ही, सुप्रीम कोर्ट के पूर्व जज की अध्यक्षता में न्यायिक जांच और सीबीआई से जांच कराने की भी मांग की गई है। याचिका के अनुसार, एनकाउंटर में होने वाली मौतें गैर-न्यायिक हत्याओं के बराबर हैं और लोकतांत्रिक समाज में कानून के शासन के लिए गंभीर खतरा पैदा करती हैं। एनकाउंटर में शामिल पुलिसकर्मी अक्सर एक ही तरह का तर्क देते हैं कि मारे गए व्यक्ति ने भागने की कोशिश करते हुए हथियार छीनने और गोली चलाने की कोशिश की, जिसके जवाब में पुलिस ने कार्रवाई की।
ये भी पढ़ें- कैलाश मानसरोवर यात्रा 4 से, ये रहेगा यात्रा का मार्ग और शेडयूल
 
याचिका में पिता के दावों का जिक्र 
भोजपुर की घटना का जिक्र करते हुए याचिका में कहा गया है कि 28 वर्षीय भरत भूषण तिवारी की मौत फेसबुक लाइव प्रसारण के कुछ ही घंटों बाद हो गई, जिसमें उन्होंने कथित तौर पर कुछ मांगें पूरी होने पर सरेंडर करने की इच्छा जताई थी। याचिका में मृतक के पिता काशीनाथ तिवारी के दावों का भी जिक्र किया गया है, जिन्होंने आरोप लगाया कि उनके बेटे का कोई आपराधिक रिकॉर्ड नहीं था, न ही उसके खिलाफ कोई एफआईआर या चार्जशीट थी और हथियार डालने के बाद भी उसे गोली मार दी गई। याचिका के अनुसार, इस घटना के बाद गांव में विरोध-प्रदर्शन हुए और निवासियों ने इस बात की जांच की मांग की कि क्या कथित सरेंडर के बाद जानलेवा बल का इस्तेमाल उचित था।
The post Bharat Tiwari encounter: दाखिल याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने सुनवाई से किया इंकार, कहा- हाईकोर्ट में रखें बात appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Liverpool must sell these two players to kickstart their summer business – Opinion
description: Liverpool Must Be Ruthless With Elliott and Chiesa This SummerSentiment Cannot Stand in the Way of Liverpool’s RebuildLiverpool’s summer rebuild cannot be based upon sentiment.It has to be based u...
content: Liverpool must sell these two players to kickstart their summer business – OpinionLiverpool Must Be Ruthless With Elliott and Chiesa This SummerSentiment Cannot Stand in the Way of Liverpool’s RebuildLiverpool’s summer rebuild cannot be based upon sentiment.It has to be based upon what Andoni Iraola needs to transform this team back into genuine Premier League and Champions League contenders. Every player must fit the identity the new head coach wants to create, and if they do not, difficult decisions must be made.Harvey Elliott and Federico Chiesa fall firmly into that category, regrettably.Elliott returns to Anfield following a disappointing loan spell at Aston Villa, where he struggled to convince Unai Emery that he could become a regular starter, let alone a backup. His return has understandably led some supporters to believe he deserves another opportunity under Iraola, especially with a new coaching staff now in place.I simply do not see it; that time has passed, and his tenure should follow suit.Photo: IMAGOElliott possesses outstanding technical quality and a wonderful left foot, but modern football at the elite level demands far more than technical ability alone, especially under a new manager. Iraola’s teams are built upon relentless pressing, athleticism, recovery runs and explosive transitions. Every player must cover huge distances, win duels and possess the physical capacity to play at an extraordinary tempo.Unfortunately, Elliott lacks too many of those attributes, and he would quickly fall into another club’s shadows.His size limits him in physical battles, his pace is not at the level Liverpool require, and he rarely offers the power needed to dominate Premier League opponents. That is not a criticism of his commitment because his attitude has always been excellent, with a warm affection evident between him and the fanbaseIt is simply a question of suitability.Likewise, Federico Chiesa has reached a stage where reputation outweighs reality.Photo: IMAGOThe Italian international arrived with enormous pedigree, but injuries have prevented him from ever reproducing the explosive football that once made him one of Europe’s most feared wide players.At 28 years of age, it feels increasingly likely that the player Liverpool hoped they had signed is no longer the player capable of performing week after week.His willingness has never been questioned.His body simply cannot deliver what his mind still demands.Sales Can Fund the Next Great Liverpool SideLiverpool are not simply looking to improve one or two positions. This is a squad rebuild. A starting right winger is required to replace Mohamed Salah. Two energetic central midfielders are needed to restore aggression and intensity.A first-choice right-back must arrive, while another centre-back is essential as Liverpool continue planning for both the present and the future.Every pound matters.If Michael Edwards and Richard Hughes can generate around £25 million for Harvey Elliott and approximately £15 million for Federico Chiesa, that £40 million immediately becomes a significant contribution towards Liverpool’s recruitment plans.The once expected arrival of Diomande from RB Leipzig for a fee close to £100 million would have represented the biggest investment of the summer and the first major step towards rebuilding Liverpool’s attack, yet now the likes of Rayan must be explored.Sales such as Elliott and Chiesa help make those ambitions achievable without placing unnecessary financial pressure on the club.Liverpool cannot afford to carry players simply because they are popular.They must carry players capable of executing Iraola’s demanding football.The new manager deserves a squad assembled specifically for his ideas rather than one inherited from previous regimes. That means making difficult decisions, even when supporters have affection for individuals who have served the club professionally.This summer will shape Liverpool’s direction for years to come.Michael Edwards and Richard Hughes have already shown throughout their careers that they are prepared to make unpopular calls when they believe it benefits the club.This should be no different.If Elliott and Chiesa no longer fit the vision, then Liverpool should thank them for their service, secure respectable transfer fees and reinvest every penny into building a younger, faster, stronger and more aggressive side.That is how great teams evolve.And this summer must be the one where Liverpool get almost every major decision right.

title: Inter executive Piero Ausilio: “We aren’t pursuing Pisilli.”
description: In recent days, Inter Milan have been linked with Niccolò Pisilli, who are looking for new signings to raise the level of Chivu’s team. Roma’s number 61 wants to play in the Champions League with...
content: Inter executive Piero Ausilio: “We aren’t pursuing Pisilli.”In recent days, Inter Milan have been linked with Niccolò Pisilli, who are looking for new signings to raise the level of Chivu’s team. Roma’s number 61 wants to play in the Champions League with the Giallorossi and is an important player for Gasperini. Inter sporting director Piero Ausilio dismissed rumors of Nerazzurri interest in Pisilli: “Pisilli is an exceptional player, but we’re not interested. ““Beyond the enormous respect I have for this player, I can say that there’s no interest in him, but not for technical reasons, given that we’re talking about one of the best Italian midfielders around.”“This is an evaluation based on his position. We’ll be working on other players in the coming days. There will be at least two investments.”

title: Kanpur: कराटे चैंपियन को गोली मारने वाला बदमाश मुठभेड़ में घायल, ग्वालटोली फायरिंग कांड का 20 घंटे में खुलासा
description: Kanpur Shooting Incident: कानपुर के फायरिंग कांड का पुलिस ने 20 घंटे में खुलासा कर दिया। कराटे चैंपियन को गोली मारने वाला मुख्य आरोपी पुलिस मुठभेड़ में घायल हुआ और दो आरोपियों को गिरफ्तार किया गया है।
content:
Kanpur Shooting Incident Near Police Commissioner Residence: यूपी के कानपुर में थाना ग्वालटोली क्षेत्र में 28/29 जून 2026 की रात हुई फायरिंग की घटना का पुलिस ने महज 20 घंटे के भीतर खुलासा कर दिया। इस घटना में एक व्यक्ति गोली लगने से घायल हुआ था, जिसे तत्काल अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया। पुलिस के अनुसार घायल की हालत अब खतरे से बाहर है।
घटना के शीघ्र अनावरण के लिए गठित पुलिस टीमों ने सूचना के आधार पर एक मिल परिसर में घेराबंदी की। पुलिस को देखते ही बदमाशों ने फायरिंग शुरू कर दी। जवाब में पुलिस ने आत्मरक्षा के लिए कार्रवाई की, जिसमें एक बदमाश गोली लगने से घायल हो गया, जबकि दूसरे आरोपी को मौके से गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया। तीसरे आरोपी की तलाश में पुलिस की टीमें लगातार दबिश दे रही हैं।
पुलिस उपायुक्त सेंट्रल अतुल श्रीवास्तव का बयान
गिरफ्तार आरोपियों के कब्जे से अवैध तमंचे बरामद किए गए हैं। पुलिस पूछताछ और तकनीकी साक्ष्यों के आधार पर मामले में आगे की विधिक कार्रवाई कर रही है। इस संबंध में पुलिस उपायुक्त सेंट्रल अतुल श्रीवास्तव ने बताया कि पुलिस ने त्वरित कार्रवाई करते हुए फायरिंग की घटना का सफल अनावरण 20 घंटे के भीतर कर दिया है तथा फरार आरोपी की गिरफ्तारी के प्रयास जारी हैं।
बीयर पीने के पैसे नहीं देने पर मारी थी गोली
बता दें कि 28 जून को देर रात कानपुर पुलिस कमिश्नर के आवास के नजदीक बीयर पीने के पैसे नहीं देने पर बाइक सवार तीन बदमाशों ने कराटे चैंपियन के पेट में गोली मार दी थी। जिससे पूरे इलाके में अफरा तफरी मच गई। साथ मैच खेल रहे लोगों ने बाइक सवार बदमाशों को दौड़ाया लेकिन आरोपी युवक फरार हो गए।
यह भी पढ़ें- नागपुर: दोबारा नियुक्ति के नाम पर 30 हजार की रिश्वत, एसीबी ने होमगार्ड अधिकारी किया गिरफ्तार
कराटे में ब्लैक बेल्ट चैंपियन है घायल व्यक्ति
स्थानीय लोगों की मदद से घायल ब्लैक बेल्ट चैंपियन को हैलट अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया। जहां डॉक्टरों ने अब उसकी हालात सामान्य बताई है। सिविल लाइन एफएम कॉलोनी निवासी अरविन्द पासवान कराटे में ब्लैक बेल्ट चैंपियन और अरविन्द नवीन मार्केट में कपड़े की दुकान में काम करते हैं। परिवार में पत्नी निशा और छोटा भाई वीरू है।

title: విషాదం.. తుంగభద్ర నదిలో మునిగి రెండు ఎద్దులు మృతి!
description: Mantralayam news: ఏరువాక పౌర్ణమి వేడుకల్లో భాగంగా కర్నూలు జిల్లా మంత్రాలయంలో విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. రైతు సురేశ్ తన ఎద్దులను తుంగభద్ర నదిలో స్నానం చేయిస్తుండగా తుంగభద్ర...
content:
Mantralayam news: ఏరువాక పౌర్ణమి వేడుకల్లో భాగంగా కర్నూలు జిల్లా మంత్రాలయంలో విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. రైతు సురేశ్ తన ఎద్దులను తుంగభద్ర నదిలో స్నానం చేయిస్తుండగా తుంగభద్ర నదిలో ఎద్దులు మృతి చెందాయి. ఈ ఘటన స్థానికంగా కలకలం రేపింది. ఎద్దుల మరణంతో రైతు కుటుంబం కన్నీరుమున్నీరుగా విలపిస్తోంది. ఈ హృదయ విదారక దృశ్యాలు చూసిన స్థానికులు తీవ్ర ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు.

నదిలో స్నానం చేయిస్తుండగా ప్రమాదం



పండుగ సందర్భంగా ఎద్దులను సిద్ధం చేసే క్రమంలో ఈ దుర్ఘటన జరిగింది. సురేశ్ ఎద్దులను నదిలోకి తీసుకెళ్లగా అకస్మాత్తుగా లోతు పెరగడంతో అవి నీటిలో మునిగిపోయాయి. అక్కడే ఉన్న వారు గమనించేలోపే ఎద్దులు మరణించాయి. కుటుంబ సభ్యుల్లా చూసుకునే ఎద్దులను కోల్పోయిన సురేశ్ బాధ వర్ణనాతీతం. పండగ పూట ఇలాంటి సంఘటన జరగడంతో ఆ ప్రాంతంలో విషాద ఛాయలు అలముకున్నాయి.



Mantralayam news:సోషల్ మీడియాలో వైరల్ వీడియో



ప్రస్తుతం ఈ ఘటనకు సంబంధించిన వీడియో సోషల్ మీడియాలో వైరల్ అవుతోంది. మంత్రాలయం పరిసర ప్రాంతాల్లో ఈ వార్త తెలిసిన వెంటనే రైతులు దిగ్భ్రాంతికి లోనయ్యారు. ఎద్దులు నీటిలో మునిగిపోయిన తీరును చూసి ప్రజలు ఆందోళన చెందుతున్నారు. రైతులకు ఇవి ప్రాణప్రదమైన ఆస్తి అని, వారి కన్నీరు అందరిని కలచివేస్తోందని నెటిజన్లు కామెంట్స్ చేస్తున్నారు. ఈ ఘటన జాగ్రత్తగా ఉండాల్సిన ఆవశ్యకతను తెలియజేస్తోంది.

title: ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟସ୍ତ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସେବା: ମାତୃ-ଶିଶୁ ବିଭାଗର ଲିଫ୍ଟ ଅଚଳ, ଆସୁନି ପାଣି
description:
ପଦ୍ମପୁର,୨୯ା୬(ପ୍ରଦୀପ୍ତ ଦାଶ):ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡର ଏକମାତ୍ର ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ସରକାରୀ ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟସ୍ତ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସେବା ନେଇ ସାଧାରଣରେ ତୀବ୍ର ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଛି। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ କିମ୍ବା ଗୁରୁତର ରୋଗୀଙ୍କୁ ଏଠାରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କଲେ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ଚିକିତ୍ସା କରି ବରଗଡ଼ କିମ୍ବା ବୁର୍ଲାକୁ ପଠାଇଦିଆଯାଉଛି । ତେଣୁ ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଅଭାବରୁ ଏହି ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟ ଏବେ ରେଫେରାଲ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ପରିଣତ ହୋଇଛି। ସେହିପରି ବହିର୍ବିଭାଗ(ଓପିଡି)ରେ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଅନୁପସ୍ଥିତି ରୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ଅସୁବିଧାରେ ପକାଉଛି। ଦୂରଦୂରାନ୍ତରୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ରୋଗୀମାନେ ଦୀର୍ଘ ସମୟ […]
The post ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟସ୍ତ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସେବା: ମାତୃ-ଶିଶୁ ବିଭାଗର ଲିଫ୍ଟ ଅଚଳ, ଆସୁନି ପାଣି appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ପଦ୍ମପୁର,୨୯ା୬(ପ୍ରଦୀପ୍ତ ଦାଶ):ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡର ଏକମାତ୍ର ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ସରକାରୀ ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟସ୍ତ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସେବା ନେଇ ସାଧାରଣରେ ତୀବ୍ର ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଛି। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ କିମ୍ବା ଗୁରୁତର ରୋଗୀଙ୍କୁ ଏଠାରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କଲେ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ଚିକିତ୍ସା କରି ବରଗଡ଼ କିମ୍ବା ବୁର୍ଲାକୁ ପଠାଇଦିଆଯାଉଛି । ତେଣୁ ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଅଭାବରୁ ଏହି ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟ ଏବେ ରେଫେରାଲ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ପରିଣତ ହୋଇଛି। ସେହିପରି ବହିର୍ବିଭାଗ(ଓପିଡି)ରେ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଅନୁପସ୍ଥିତି ରୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ଅସୁବିଧାରେ ପକାଉଛି। ଦୂରଦୂରାନ୍ତରୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ରୋଗୀମାନେ ଦୀର୍ଘ ସମୟ ଧରି ଅପେକ୍ଷାରେ ରହୁଛନ୍ତି। ଆଉ ନର୍ସିଂହୋମ କିମ୍ବା ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ ଚିକିତ୍ସା କରୁଥିବା ଡାକ୍ତର ପାଖକୁ ଯାଇ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚାନ୍ତ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ମେଡିସିନ, ଅସ୍ଥିଶଲ୍ୟ ଭଲି ବିଭାଗ ଖାଲି ପଡ଼ିଥିବା ବେଳେ ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ ରୋଗ ଓ ପ୍ରସୂତିରେ ଜଣେ ମାତ୍ର ଡାକ୍ତର ଅଛନ୍ତି। ନିଶ୍ଚେତକ ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞ ପଦବୀ ଖାଲିପଡ଼ିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଭେସଜରେ ୩ ଡାକ୍ତରରୁ ଜଣେ ମାତ୍ର ଅଛନ୍ତି। ସିନିୟର ମେଡିକାଲ ଅଫିସର ୨ପଦବୀ ଖାଲିପଡ଼ିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଏଲଟିଆର ଏମ୍‌ଓ ୧୦ପଦବୀ ଖାଲି ଅଛି। ବିଶେଷ କରି ୭୨ନର୍ସିଂ ପଦବୀ ଥିବାବେଳେ ମାତ୍ର ୧୭ ଜଣ ଥିବାରୁ କେମିତି ଇନ୍‌ ଡୋର ସେବା ଚାଲିଛି ତାହା ସହଜେ ଅନୁମେୟ। ସେହିପରି ରେଡିଓଗ୍ରାଫର, ଆଟେଣ୍ଡାଣ୍ଟ,ସୁଇପର ପଦବୀ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଧାରୁ ଅଧିକ ଖାଲି ପଡିଛି ।
ମା’ ଓ ଶିଶୁ ବିଭାଗରେ ସରକାର ପାଞ୍ଚ ମହଲାର କୋଠା ନିର୍ମାଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ହେଲେ ଏଠାରେ କୌଣସି ଆନୁଷଙ୍ଗିକ ସୁବିଧା ନ ଥିବା ରୋଗୀ ସମ୍ପର୍କୀୟମାନେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏଠାରେ ରହିଥିବା ଗୋଟିଏ ଲିଫ୍ଟ ଦୀର୍ଘମାସ ହେବ ଅଚଳ ହୋଇପଡିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଗୋଟିଏ ଲିଫ୍ଟ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଧିକାଂଶ ସମୟ ଅଚଳ ରହୁଛି । ସେଥିପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସୂତି ମହିଳା ଓ ଶିଶୁ ନାହିଁ ନ ଥିବା ଅସୁବିଧାର ସମ୍ମୁଖୀନ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି। ଏହା ସହିତ ଏହାର ୩ ଓ ୪ନମ୍ବର ଫ୍ଲୋରରେ ପାଣିର ଅଭାବ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଆହୁରି ଗମ୍ଭୀର କରିଛି ।
ଏମାନେ କୁହନ୍ତି
ସମସ୍ୟା ସମାଧାନ ନ ହେଲେ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ
ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ସମେତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ଏହି ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନା। ଏହାର ଆନୁଷଙ୍ଗିକ ଅଭାବ ପୂରଣ ପାଇଁ ବିଗତ ଦିନରେ ଅନେକ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରାଯାଇ କେବଳ ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ମିଳିଥିଲା। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଖୋଦ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଗସ୍ତ, ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନା ପରିଦର୍ଶନ ସତ୍ତ୍ୱେ କୌଣସି ସୁଧାର ନ ଆସିବା ଦୁର୍ଭାଗ୍ୟଜନକ। ଏହାକୁ ନେଇ ଅଞ୍ଚଳବାସୀ ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନରେ ଏକ ଦୁର୍ବାର ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରିବେ।
-ଅଜିତ କୁମାର ଶତପଥୀ
ସଂପାଦକ, ଆଶା ଓ ସତ୍କାର
ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ମିଳିଛି, ପ୍ରତିକାର ହେଉନି
ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାର ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସମସ୍ୟା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ନାଗରିକ କମିଟି ଓ ସାଧାରଣ ଜନତା ଅନେକ ଥର ବିଭାଗୀୟ ଅଧିକାରୀ ତଥା ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ବିଭାଗର ଉଚ୍ଚ ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କ ସହିତ ଆଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି । କିନ୍ତୁ ଏ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ କୌଣସି ପ୍ରତିକାର ହେଉନାହିଁ, କେବଳ ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ମିଳିଛି। ତେଣୁ ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନରେ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ହିଁ ଏକମାତ୍ର ପନ୍ଥା।
-ରାମଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ତ୍ରିପାଠୀ
ଅବସରପ୍ରାପ୍ତ ଜିଲା ଜଜ୍‌ ତଥା ନାଗରିକ ସଂଘ ସଭାପତି

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

 
The post ପଦ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଡାକ୍ତରଖାନାରେ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟସ୍ତ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସେବା: ମାତୃ-ଶିଶୁ ବିଭାଗର ଲିଫ୍ଟ ଅଚଳ, ଆସୁନି ପାଣି appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: 😡 Arsenal not English champions: Klopp fumes over VAR call
description: After the bitter World Cup exit in the penalty shootout, the VAR decision to disallow Jonathan Tah’s goal in particular sparked debate. Waldemar Anton was judged to have fouled Paraguay goalkeeper O...
content: 😡 Arsenal not English champions: Klopp fumes over VAR callAfter the bitter World Cup exit in the penalty shootout, the VAR decision to disallow Jonathan Tah’s goal in particular sparked debate. Waldemar Anton was judged to have fouled Paraguay goalkeeper Orlando Gill in the buildup. That caused major frustration in the Germany camp.  "It’s not just a scandal, it’s a complete scandal. That’s not even remotely a foul," Julian Nagelsmann said bluntly to ZDF. ZDF’s refereeing expert also took a similar view. "We’ve seen very different situations at the World Cup before, and the goalkeeper gets up immediately. That’s normal contact, never ever a foul. I’m at a loss for words," said Thorsten Kinhöfer. Patrick Ittrich, who was working for Magenta TV, criticized the VAR intervention: "For me, that’s not a clear and obvious error by the referee." Former referee Manuel Gräfe agreed. "It’s a joke," he told 'Bild', pointing to the incident involving Leon Goretzka in extra time, when he was being held in the penalty area. In Gräfe’s view, that foul should then also have been called, just like the Anton incident. "That is never a foul. There’s no holding, no pushing, no bringing him down. The Paraguayan simply tries it and gets rewarded. That is unacceptable at this level. It’s a farce," Gräfe continued.Jürgen Klopp felt similarly when he was asked about the incident on Magenta TV after the final whistle. "If that goal is illegal, Arsenal won’t be English champions. We win the game if the ball goes in," he said, referring to Arsenal’s goals from corners last season.  This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇩🇪 here.

title: 'ആ കൈകൾ വെട്ടിമാറ്റും', ഇന്ത്യയോട് പ്രകോപനം തീര്‍ത്ത് ഭീഷണിയുമായി പാക്കിസ്ഥാൻ, വെള്ളം തന്നില്ലെങ്കിൽ പ്രത്യാഘാതം അറിയില്ലേ എന്നും മന്ത്രി
description: സിന്ധു നദീജലകരാർ പ്രകാരം തങ്ങൾക്ക് അവകാശപ്പെട്ട വെള്ളത്തിൽ കൈവെച്ചാൽ 'കൈകൾ വെട്ടിമാറ്റും' എന്ന് പാക് മന്ത്രി മുസാദിക് മാലിക് ഇന്ത്യക്ക് ഭീഷണി മുഴക്കി. ഭീകരാക്രമണത്തെ തുടർന്ന് ഇന്ത്യ കരാർ താൽക്കാലികമായി നിർത്തിവെച്ചതിന് പിന്നാലെയാണ് ഈ പ്രകോപനപരമായ പരാമർശം. പാകിസ്ഥാന്‍റെ ജലവിഹിതം ഇന്ത്യ തടയുകയാണെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം ആരോപിച്ചു.
content: <p>ഇസ്ലാമാബാദ്: ഇന്ത്യയ്‌ക്കെതിരെ വീണ്ടും പ്രകോപനപരമായ പരാമർശവുമായി പാകിസ്ഥാന്‍റെ കാലാവസ്ഥവ്യതിയാന വകുപ്പ് മന്ത്രി മുസാദിക് മാലിക്. സിന്ധു നദീജലകരാർ പ്രകാരം തങ്ങൾക്ക് അവകാശപ്പെട്ട വെള്ളത്തിന്മേൽ അവകാശവാദം ഉന്നയിക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുന്നവരുടെ ‘കൈകൾ വെട്ടിമാറ്റും’ എന്ന് പാകിസ്ഥാൻ മന്ത്രി ഭീഷണിപ്പെടുത്തി. 2025-ൽ 25 പേര്‍ കൊല്ലപ്പെട്ട പഹൽഗാം ഭീകരാക്രമണത്തെ തുടർന്ന് പതിറ്റാണ്ടുകൾ പഴക്കമുള്ള കരാർ താൽക്കാലികമായി നിർത്തിവെക്കാൻ ഇന്ത്യ തീരുമാനിച്ചിരുന്നു. ഇതിന് പിന്നാലെയാണ് പാക് മന്ത്രി മുസാദിക് മാലിക് ഇത്തരമൊരു ഭീഷണി മുഴക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>ഒരു വാർത്താസമ്മേളനത്തിൽ സംസാരിക്കവെ പാകിസ്ഥാന്‍റെ വിഹിതമായ വെള്ളം ഇന്ത്യ നിയന്ത്രിക്കുകയാണെന്ന് മാലിക് ആരോപിച്ചു. തങ്ങളുടെ വിഹിതം തടസ്സപ്പെടുത്താൻ ആരെയും അനുവദിക്കില്ലെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം പറഞ്ഞു. ‘അയൽരാജ്യത്തെ പ്രധാനമന്ത്രിയാണ് ഈ ജലത്തിന്റെ ടാപ്പ് നിയന്ത്രിക്കുന്നത്. പാകിസ്ഥാനിലേക്ക് ഒരു തുള്ളി വെള്ളം പോലും ഒഴുക്കില്ലെന്നാണ് അദ്ദേഹം പറയുന്നത്’ -മാലികിനെ ഉദ്ധരിച്ച് പാക് മാധ്യമമായ ‘ഡോൺ’ റിപ്പോര്‍ട്ട് ചെയ്തു.</p><p>പാകിസ്ഥാനിലെ ജനസംഖ്യയുടെ 40-50 ശതമാനം ആളുകളും ഉപജീവനത്തിനായി കൃഷിയെയാണ് ആശ്രയിക്കുന്നതെന്ന് അദ്ദേഹം ചൂണ്ടിക്കാട്ടി. ‘രാജ്യത്തിന്റെ ഭക്ഷ്യസുരക്ഷയെയും 50 ശതമാനം തൊഴിലവസരങ്ങളെയും 25 ശതമാനം സമ്പദ്‌വ്യവസ്ഥയെയും മറ്റാരോ പൂർണ്ണമായി നിയന്ത്രിക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുകയാണ്,’- അദ്ദേഹം പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>തങ്ങളുടെ വെള്ളം തട്ടിയെടുക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുന്നവർ കടുത്ത പ്രത്യാഘാതങ്ങൾ നേരിടേണ്ടിവരുമെന്ന് പാകിസ്ഥാൻ നേരത്തെ തന്നെ പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിട്ടുള്ളതാണെന്ന് മന്ത്രി അവകാശപ്പെട്ടു. ‘എന്നാൽ ഇവിടെ നീതിയുടെ ചോദ്യവുമുണ്ട്. ഞങ്ങൾ ഞങ്ങളെത്തന്നെ സംരക്ഷിക്കും... ഞങ്ങൾ ഇത് വെറുതെ പ്രഖ്യാപിക്കുക മാത്രമല്ല ചെയ്യുന്നത്, ഞങ്ങളുടെ ജലവിഹിതത്തിന്മേൽ ആരെങ്കിലും കൈവെച്ചാൽ ആ കൈകൾ ഞങ്ങൾ വെട്ടിമാറ്റുമെന്ന് തെളിയിച്ചിട്ടുമുണ്ട്’- അദ്ദേഹം കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു.</p><p>ലോകത്ത് മറ്റൊരിടത്തും കരാറുകൾ ഇല്ലെങ്കിൽപ്പോലും, അന്താരാഷ്ട്ര കൺവെൻഷനുകളുടെ അടിസ്ഥാനത്തിൽ നദികൾ ഒഴുകാറുണ്ടെന്ന് മാലിക് പറഞ്ഞു. ‘ഒരു ഉപരി-തീരദേശ രാജ്യത്തിന് താഴെയുള്ള രാജ്യത്തേക്കുള്ള ജലപ്രവാഹം തടയാൻ അവകാശമുണ്ടോ? എന്നാൽ നമുക്കിടയിൽ ഒരു കരാർ പോലുമുണ്ട്. അങ്ങനെയെങ്കിൽ ഇവിടെ എങ്ങനെ വെള്ളം തടയാനാകും? ഈ വിഷയമാണ് ഞങ്ങൾ നാളെ അവതരിപ്പിക്കാൻ പോകുന്നത്’- അദ്ദേഹം വ്യക്തമാക്കി.</p><p>കരാർ നിലവിലുണ്ട് എന്ന് വ്യക്തമാക്കിയ അദ്ദേഹം, ചൊവ്വാഴ്ച നടക്കുന്ന കോൺഫറൻസ് പ്രധാനമായും നീതിയെയും അവകാശങ്ങളെയും കുറിച്ചുള്ളതാണെന്നും കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു. അന്താരാഷ്ട്ര തലത്തിൽ എന്താണ് നീതി എന്ന് അവിടെ തീരുമാനിക്കപ്പെടും. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള തീരപ്രദേശങ്ങളിൽ താമസിക്കുന്ന കുട്ടികൾക്ക് വെള്ളത്തിന് അവകാശമുണ്ടോ ഇല്ലയോ എന്ന് അവിടെ തീരുമാനിക്കുമെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>മാലിക്കിന്റെ ഈ പരാമർശങ്ങൾ നിരവധി പാകിസ്ഥാനി വാർത്താ മാധ്യമങ്ങൾ റിപ്പോർട്ട് ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. ഇതിന്റെ ദൃശ്യങ്ങൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിലും പ്രചരിക്കുന്നുണ്ട്. ഇതേ വാർത്താസമ്മേളനത്തിൽ പങ്കെടുത്ത പാകിസ്ഥാൻ വാർത്താവിനിമയ മന്ത്രി അത്താഉള്ള തരാറും സിന്ധു നദീജലകരാർ നിയമപരമായി നിലനിൽക്കുന്നതാണെന്നും അത് ഏകപക്ഷീയമായി റദ്ദാക്കാനോ ഭേദഗതി ചെയ്യാനോ കഴിയില്ലെന്നും വാദിച്ചു. നിയമപരമായി നടപ്പിലാക്കാൻ കഴിയുന്ന ഈ കരാർ നിലനിൽക്കുന്നിടത്തോളം കാലം സിന്ധു നദിയിലെ വെള്ളത്തിന്മേൽ പാകിസ്ഥാനിലെ ജനങ്ങൾക്ക് അവകാശമുണ്ടെന്ന് അദ്ദേഹം അവകാശപ്പെട്ടു.</p><p>പാകിസ്ഥാൻ പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി ഷെഹ്ബാസ് ഷെരീഫും ചീഫ് ഓഫ് ഡിഫൻസ് ഫോഴ്‌സും ആർമി ചീഫുമായ ഫീൽഡ് മാർഷൽ അസിം മുനീറും വെള്ളം ഞങ്ങളുടെ ജീവനാഡിയും ചുവപ്പുരേഖയുമാണെന്ന് പലതവണ വ്യക്തമാക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ടെന്നും മന്ത്രി അവകാശപ്പെട്ടു. അടുത്ത ഒന്നര-രണ്ട് വർഷത്തിനുള്ളിൽ സിന്ധു നദിയിലെ ഇന്ത്യയുടെ വിഹിതം പൂർണ്ണമായി വിനിയോഗിക്കാൻ ഇന്ത്യ ഉദ്ദേശിക്കുന്നുണ്ടെന്നും ഇന്ത്യയ്ക്കുള്ള ഒരു തുള്ളി വെള്ളം പോലും പാകിസ്ഥാനിലേക്ക് ഒഴുക്കില്ലെന്നും കേന്ദ്ര ജലവിഭവ മന്ത്രി സി ആർ പാട്ടീൽ എൻഡിടിവിക്ക് നൽകിയ പ്രത്യേക അഭിമുഖത്തിൽ വ്യക്തമാക്കിയതിന് തൊട്ടുപിന്നാലെയാണ് അതിർത്തിക്കപ്പുറത്ത് നിന്നുള്ള ഈ പ്രതികരണങ്ങൾ വരുന്നത്.</p><p>കഴിഞ്ഞ വർഷം ജമ്മു കശ്മീരിലെ പഹൽഗാമിൽ 26 സിവിലിയന്മാരുടെ മരണത്തിനിടയാക്കിയ അതിർത്തി കടന്നുള്ള ഭീകരാക്രമണത്തെ തുടർന്നാണ് ദില്ലി സിന്ധു നദി ജലകരാർ താൽക്കാലികമായി നിർത്തിവെച്ചത്. പാകിസ്ഥാൻ മണ്ണിൽ നിന്ന് പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഭരണകൂട സ്പോൺസേർഡ് ഭീകരവാദ ശൃംഖലകൾ തകർക്കാൻ ഇസ്ലാമാബാദ് കൃത്യമായ നടപടി സ്വീകരിക്കുന്നതുവരെ ജലകരാർ സസ്പെൻഡ് ചെയ്ത് തന്നെ തുടരുമെന്ന നിലപാടിൽ ഇന്ത്യ ഉറച്ചുനിൽക്കുകയാണ്. 1960-ൽ വേൾഡ് ബാങ്കിന്റെ മധ്യസ്ഥതയിൽ ഒപ്പുവെച്ച ഈ കരാറാണ് അതിനുശേഷം ഇന്ത്യയ്ക്കും പാകിസ്ഥാനും ഇടയിൽ സിന്ധു നദിയുടെയും അതിന്‍റെ പോഷകനദികളുടെയും ജലവിതരണവും ഉപയോഗവും നിയന്ത്രിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>پاکستان پہلے ہی واضح کر چکا ہے کہ اگر کسی نے ہمارے پانی پر ہاتھ ڈالنے کی کوشش کی تو اسے بھرپور جواب دیا جائے گا&nbsp;ہم دوٹوک اعلان کر چکے ہیں کہ جو ہمارے پانی پر ہاتھ ڈالے گا ہم وہ ہاتھ کاٹ دیں گے&nbsp;ہم نے پہلے ہوا میں پکڑ کر ٹھوکا ہے اب نیچے سے بھی ٹھوکیں گے ۔ مصدق ملک pic.twitter.com/l4q4XfmpsN</p><p>— Kippsam Malik (@KeepsamM) June 29, 2026</p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: 'ചെയറിനെ ചോദ്യം ചെയ്യരുത്'; വാക്കൗട്ട്  പ്രസംഗത്തിനിടെ നേർക്കുനേർ പോരുമായി തിരുവഞ്ചൂരും കെ രാജനും
content: <p>സ്പീക്കർ ഇടക്ക് പറയുന്ന കമന്റുകൾ മോശപ്പെട്ട ട്രോൾ ഉണ്ടാക്കുന്നുണ്ടെന്ന് കെ.രാജൻ; ചെയറിനെ ചോദ്യം ചെയ്യരുതെന്ന് തിരുവഞ്ചൂർ, വാക്കൗട്ട് പ്രസംഗത്തിനിടെ നേർക്കുനേർ K Rajan | Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan | Kerala Assembly</p>

title: അയോധ്യ സംഭവന കൊള്ളയിലെ മോദിയുടെ മൗനം; പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി കൂടി അറിഞ്ഞുകൊണ്ടുള്ള തട്ടിപ്പെന്ന് കോൺഗ്രസ്
content: <p>അയോധ്യ സംഭവന കൊള്ളയിലെ മോദിയുടെ മൗനം ആയുധമാക്കാൻ കോൺഗ്രസ്; വിഷയത്തിൽ പ്രധാനമന്ത്രിക്ക് കൈ കഴുകി മാറി നിൽക്കാൻ ആകില്ല എന്നും രൂക്ഷ വിമര്‍ശനവുമായി കോൺഗ്രസ്</p>

title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Tactical story behind underdogs staging massive upsets
പത്തനംതിട്ടയിലെ സ്വകാര്യ സൈനിക റിക്രൂട്ട്മെൻ്റ് പരിശീലന കേന്ദ്രത്തിൽ AISF പ്രതിഷേധം|Army recruitment
content: <p>സ്ഥാപനത്തിന് ലൈസൻസില്ല, അധ്യാപകർക്ക് യോഗ്യതയില്ലെന്നും ആരോപണം; പത്തനംതിട്ടയിലെ സ്വകാര്യ സൈനിക റിക്രൂട്ട്മെൻ്റ് പരിശീലന കേന്ദ്രത്തിൽ AISF പ്രതിഷേധം</p>

title: Soule’s agent denies exit rumors: “He isn’t going anywhere.”
description: Matias Soulé’s future remains uncertain. The Argentine winger is unlikely to leave Capiate in the next 24 hours to comply with the settlement agreement, but the transfer market is long and unpredic...
content: Soule’s agent denies exit rumors: “He isn’t going anywhere.”Matias Soulé’s future remains uncertain. The Argentine winger is unlikely to leave Capiate in the next 24 hours to comply with the settlement agreement, but the transfer market is long and unpredictable. No offers have been received for the 2003-born player, only numerous inquiries and positive comments. From the Bundesliga to Saudi Arabia, Soulé’s agent, Guastadisegno, confirmed this to Corriere dello Sport.Soulé’s agent was keen to stress that no concrete offers have arrived for his client: “All the rumours of offers for him are untrue, and obviously we can’t turn down offers that haven’t been made to us. It’s nothing like Saudi Arabia or €10 million offers for Soulé being rejected.” Guastadisegno added that the Argentine winger is a Roma asset: “I’ve received a lot of calls in recent weeks, I’ve spoken to several teams, but no one has actually come forward, so he’s not going anywhere.”“Soulé is a Roma asset, and if someone inside is spreading such rumours, it’s only hurting Matias, an exemplary professional who has given everything to this club.”

title: Official | Monaco opt against signing Sunderland’s Simon Adingra and Leicester City’s Wout Faes
description: In January, AS Monaco signed Simon Adingra (24) and Wout Faes (28). The former joined on loan from Sunderland, the latter from Leicester City. Buy options were included in both deals. Neither has been...
content: Official | Monaco opt against signing Sunderland’s Simon Adingra and Leicester City’s Wout FaesIn January, AS Monaco signed Simon Adingra (24) and Wout Faes (28). The former joined on loan from Sunderland, the latter from Leicester City. Buy options were included in both deals. Neither has been triggered, as confirmed by the Principality club on Monday. Adingra initially impressed for Monaco following his move, however, his form tailed off towards the end of the campaign. He finished the season with three goals and two assists in 14 games in Ligue 1. Faes, meanwhile, was a regular for Les Monégasques. He made 16 appearances in all competitions for the club, following his January move. The Belgian’s buy option stood at €7.5m, whilst Adingra’s switch could have been made permanent for €17m.Those figures became unrealistic when Monaco missed out on qualifying for next season’s UEFA Champions League. Next season, they will play in the UEFA Europa Conference League. Monaco thanked the pair on social media as they announced their exits on Monday.GFFN | Luke Entwistle

title: Bruno Genesio agrees two-year Marseille contract
description: Bruno Genesio is set to put pen to paper over a two-year deal as Marseille manager, according to a report from L’Equipe. The former Lille OSC head coach was identified by Les Phocéens as the ide...
content: Bruno Genesio agrees two-year Marseille contractBruno Genesio is set to put pen to paper over a two-year deal as Marseille manager, according to a report from L’Equipe. The former Lille OSC head coach was identified by Les Phocéens as the ideal candidate to lead the Southern Ligue 1 club with the latter entering a new era with the arrivals of Sporting Director Grégory Lorenzi and club president Stéphane Richard.Earlier this month, Marseille initiated talks with Genesio, who had just left Lille upon the expiry of his contract. Several stumbling blocks – including Marseille’s possible exclusion from the UEFA Europa League – have eventually been cleared. Genesio and Marseille reportedly reached a contractual agreement a couple of days ago.Genesio’s arrival also means that Habib Beye’s spell will come at an abrupt end. The former Newcastle United full-back replaced Roberto De Zerbi in the Vélodrome dugout, but he failed to lead Marseille to the UEFA Champions League. Talks over a contract termination are underway.GFFN | Bastien Cheval

title: David Ornstein’s jaw-dropping morning update is bad news for Liverpool & Bradley Barcola
description: PSG reportedly value Bradley Barcola above the £116m fee Manchester City are set to pay for Elliot Anderson.DOWNLOAD THE OFFICIAL EMPIRE OF THE KOP APP FOR ALL THE LATEST & BREAKING UPDATES – STRAI...
content: David Ornstein’s jaw-dropping morning update is bad news for Liverpool & Bradley BarcolaPSG reportedly value Bradley Barcola above the £116m fee Manchester City are set to pay for Elliot Anderson.DOWNLOAD THE OFFICIAL EMPIRE OF THE KOP APP FOR ALL THE LATEST & BREAKING UPDATES – STRAIGHT TO YOUR PHONE! ON APPLE & GOOGLE PLAYDavid Ornstein reports for The Athletic that the Champions League holders do not need to sell the France international either way after agreeing the sale of Goncalo Ramos to AC Milan.Another blow to Liverpool – after a deal for Yan Diomande fell through – which further whittles down their offensive shortlist.PSG set obscene asking price for Bradley BarcolaThere’s no question that Barcola is an exceptional footballer and would be well-deserving of a significant price tag were he to move away from Ligue 1 this summer.Want more Empire of the Kop coverage? Add us as a preferred source on Google to your favourites list for news you can trustBut is he worthy of a fee that would demolish most clubs’ spending records? We have serious doubts about that.Ultimately, it should be borne in mind that the 23-year-old isn’t considered an absolute starting option at PSG, which surely should have some bearing on the price the French champions can reasonably set.Liverpool may still be able to take advantage of Barcola’s frustrationsOrnstein’s update does take into consideration that the left-sided winger is continuing to stall in contract negotiations with PSG.That’s because he’s far from happy with the amount of game-time he’s currently enjoying in the French capital, and he’s ‘pushing for more starts’.In the end, Luis Enrique’s side may have little choice but to move Bradley Barcola on if they end up agreeing moves for Yan Diomande and Maghnes Akliouche. Two additions that would surely further hamper their No.29’s opportunities for minutes and starts.RB Leipzig holding firm on Yan DiomandeThe word currently out from senior executives in Germany, however, is that RB Leipzig are holding firm on the idea of keeping the Ivory Coast international for another season.READ MORE: Fresh Yan Diomande u-turn blows transfer race wide open after PSG overtake LiverpoolIt may very well be the case that this is conditional on favourable terms being put in place for PSG to specifically take advantage of next summer.However, this could then have unfortunate consequences for Liverpool’s ongoing interest in Barcola this summer.If PSG aren’t cash-strapped after the sale of Ramos – and won’t have to commit to a significant outlay on Diomande – then they are within their rights to hold on to a player with two years left on his contract.Either way, this is potentially looking like another complicated transfer saga in the making that we could do without.More Stories / Latest NewsDavid Ornstein’s jaw-dropping morning update is bad news for Liverpool & Bradley Barcola June 30, 2026 8:40Liverpool likely to miss out on £86.2m target after Diomande in new transfer blow June 29, 2026 17:06Liverpool could sign Darwin Nunez on one condition as Emile Heskey fires transfer warning June 29, 2026 16:27

title: ବାଣପୁରରେ ଭିଡ଼ ହିଂସା: ଯୁବକଙ୍କୁ ପିଟିପିଟି ହତ୍ୟା ଅଭିଯୋଗ, ୨ ଗିରଫ, ପୋଲିସର ଭୂମିକାକୁ ନେଇ ଉଠିଲା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ

The post ବାଣପୁରରେ ଭିଡ଼ ହିଂସା: ଯୁବକଙ୍କୁ ପିଟିପିଟି ହତ୍ୟା ଅଭିଯୋଗ, ୨ ଗିରଫ, ପୋଲିସର ଭୂମିକାକୁ ନେଇ ଉଠିଲା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଖୋର୍ଦ୍ଧା, ୩୦।୬ (ପ୍ରଭାତ ପାଣିଗ୍ରାହୀ): ଖୋର୍ଦ୍ଧା ଜିଲାର ବାଲିଅନ୍ତା ଓ ରାୟଗଡ଼ାର ଇନ୍ଦିରାଗୁଡ଼ା ପରେ ଏବେ ବାଣପୁରରେ ଭିଡ଼ ହିଂସାର ଏକ ଚାଞ୍ଚଲ୍ୟକର ଘଟଣା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଚୋର ସନ୍ଦେହରେ ଜଣେ ଯୁବକଙ୍କୁ ଖୁଣ୍ଟରେ ବାନ୍ଧି ନିସ୍ତୁକ ମାଡ଼ ମାରିବା ପରେ ତାଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ହୋଇଛି। ମୃତକ ହେଲେ ବାଣପୁର ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଭୀମପୁର ବାଘୁଆପଦର ସାହିର ତୋଫାନ ନାୟକ। ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଆଧାରରେ ବାଣପୁର ପୋଲିସ ଏକ ହତ୍ୟା ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରି ଘଟଣାରେ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ୨ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ଅନ୍ୟ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କୁ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରହିଛି।
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଗତ ୨୮ ତାରିଖ ଅପରାହ୍ନରେ ତୋଫାନଙ୍କୁ ଚୋର ସନ୍ଦେହରେ କିଛି ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀ ଧରି ଏକ ଖୁଣ୍ଟରେ ବାନ୍ଧି ଦିନ ଦ୍ୱିପ୍ରହରରେ ସର୍ବସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ନିସ୍ତୁକ ମାଡ଼ ମାରିଥିଲେ। ସେଠାରେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଲୋକମାନେ ଯିଏ ଯେପରି ପାରିଥିଲେ, ତାଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରହାର କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହି ନିର୍ମମ ମାଡ଼ର ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ସିସିଟିଭି କ୍ୟାମେରାରେ କଏଦ ହୋଇଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି।
୧୧୨ ନମ୍ବରକୁ ଫୋନ୍‌ ଯୋଗେ ସୂଚନା ପାଇ ବାଣପୁର ପୋଲିସ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ତୋଫାନଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିଥିଲା। ହେଲେ ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ପୋଲିସ ତାଙ୍କୁ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ ନ ପଠାଇ ପ୍ରାୟ ଦୁଇ ଘଣ୍ଟା ଧରି ଥାନାରେ ଅଟକ ରଖିଥିଲା। ପରେ ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଡକାଇ ଏକ ଲିଖିତ ମୁଚାଲିକା ନେବା ପରେ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଛାଡ଼ି ଦେଇଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ହୋଇଛି।
ଘରକୁ ଫେରିବା ପରେ ତୋଫାନଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟାବସ୍ଥା ହଠାତ୍‌ ବିଗିଡ଼ିଥିଲା। ସେ ରକ୍ତବାନ୍ତି କରିବା ସହ ଗୁରୁତର ଅସୁସ୍ଥ ହୋଇପଡ଼ିଥିଲେ। ପରିବାର ଲୋକେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ବାଣପୁରରେ ଚିକିତ୍ସା କରାଇବା ପରେ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଅଧିକ ଗୁରୁତର ହେବାରୁ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରର କ୍ୟାପିଟାଲ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲକୁ ନେଇଥିଲେ। ସେଠାରେ ଡାକ୍ତର ତାଙ୍କୁ ମୃତ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଥିଲେ।
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ, ଥାନାରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ତୋଫାନଙ୍କୁ ପୋଲିସ ପ୍ରହାର କରିଥିବା ନେଇ ପରିବାର ଲୋକେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ତେବେ ଏହି ଅଭିଯୋଗକୁ ଖୋର୍ଦ୍ଧା ଏସ୍‌ପି ପରମାର ସ୍ମିତ ପୁରୁଷୋତ୍ତମ ଦାସ ଖଣ୍ଡନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଥାନାର ସିସିଟିଭି ଫୁଟେଜ୍‌ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ଘଟଣାର ନିରପେକ୍ଷ ତଦନ୍ତ କରାଯିବ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି।
ଏସ୍‌ପିଙ୍କ କହିବା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଶବ ବ୍ୟବଚ୍ଛେଦ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଆସିବା ପରେ ମୃତ୍ୟୁର ପ୍ରକୃତ କାରଣ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହେବ ଏବଂ ସେହି ଆଧାରରେ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଆଇନଗତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯିବ। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ପରେ ବାଣପୁର ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ଦେଖାଦେଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ଭିଡ଼ ହିଂସା ଏବଂ ପୋଲିସର ଭୂମିକାକୁ ନେଇ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ମହଲରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଉଠିଛି। ପୋଲିସ ଘଟଣାର ସମସ୍ତ ଦିଗକୁ ନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରଖିଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ବାଣପୁରରେ ଭିଡ଼ ହିଂସା: ଯୁବକଙ୍କୁ ପିଟିପିଟି ହତ୍ୟା ଅଭିଯୋଗ, ୨ ଗିରଫ, ପୋଲିସର ଭୂମିକାକୁ ନେଇ ଉଠିଲା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: മാവൂരിൽ മൂന്ന് ബംഗ്ലാദേശി പൗരന്മാര്‍ പിടിയിൽ; മൂവരെയും ഐബിയും പൊലീസും ചോദ്യം ചെയ്യുന്നു| Kozhikode
content: <p>കോഴിക്കോട് മാവൂരിൽ മൂന്ന് ബംഗ്ലാദേശി പൗരന്മാര്‍ പിടിയിൽ; ഐബിയും പൊലീസും ചോദ്യം ചെയ്യുന്നു, ഇവരിൽ നിന്ന് വ്യാജ ഐഡി കാര്‍ഡ്, സിം കാര്‍ഡ് തുടങ്ങിയവ കണ്ടെത്തിയിരുന്നു</p>

title: Iran US Israel war Live Updates: Iran Rejects US Talks, Regional Powers Condemn Israel's Military Operations In Syria
description: US-Iran War Live Updates: Follow real-time developments as the United States and Iran attempt to preserve a fragile ceasefire through renewed diplomatic engagement, even as military tensions continue across the Middle East. Track the latest updates on the Doha talks, the Strait of Hormuz, regional security, humanitarian developments and the wider geopolitical impact of the conflict.Trump Announces Fresh Doha Talks: US President Donald Trump said American and Iranian officials would meet in Doha after Tehran allegedly requested fresh negotiations. The meeting is aimed at advancing the implementation of the recently signed memorandum of understanding and preventing a return to open conflict.Iran Denies Formal Negotiations: Iran quickly disputed Trump's announcement, with senior negotiator Kazem Gharibabadi stating that no formal technical negotiations had been scheduled. Tehran said consultations with Qatar on implementing the agreement were continuing but reports of new talks were "not confirmed".US Confirms High-Level Delegation: The White House later clarified that Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and senior adviser Jared Kushner would travel to Doha for high-level discussions. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said technical discussions would take place alongside broader diplomatic meetings.Frozen Iranian Assets On Agenda: Iran's Foreign Ministry said it would send an expert delegation to Doha to follow up on the release of frozen Iranian assets, including the reported release of $6 billion held in Qatar. Neither Washington nor Doha has officially confirmed the transfer.Pezeshkian Hails Interim Agreement: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian described the interim agreement as "a great victory for the Iranian people", arguing that it had secured important economic and diplomatic gains while opening the door for broader negotiations.Strait Of Hormuz Remains Flashpoint: Tehran rejected France's proposal to support de-mining operations in the Strait of Hormuz, warning Paris against what it described as provocations in an already sensitive security environment. The strategic waterway remains central to negotiations after months of disruption to global shipping.Maritime Security Continues To Raise Concerns: Recent attacks on commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, including reports of an alleged Iranian strike on a cargo vessel, have renewed concerns that the fragile ceasefire could unravel if maritime security deteriorates further.Israel Continues Military Operations: Despite the broader diplomatic process, Israeli forces continued military operations in both Gaza and southern Lebanon. At least eight Palestinians were reported killed in Gaza, while fresh strikes were also reported across southern Lebanon despite the ceasefire agreement with Beirut.Trump Says US Honouring Ceasefire: The White House maintained that Washington continues to uphold its commitments under the interim agreement but warned that any renewed violence would be met with a military response, reflecting the fragile nature of the current truce.Energy Markets Watch Diplomatic Progress: The interim agreement signed on June 17 was designed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and provide a 60-day window for broader negotiations. Any disruption to implementation could once again threaten one of the world's most important energy corridors, through which roughly one-fifth of global oil and liquefied natural gas shipments normally pass.Trump Credits Deal For Falling Oil Prices: President Trump claimed the diplomatic breakthrough had contributed to lower global oil prices and declining fuel costs, arguing that market confidence had improved following the ceasefire and reopening of maritime routes.Fragile Peace Enters Critical Stage: Although both Washington and Tehran continue to pursue diplomatic engagement, conflicting public statements, unresolved disputes over implementation and ongoing military activity across the region underscore how fragile the peace process remains. The Doha discussions are expected to play a key role in determining whether the ceasefire evolves into a lasting settlement.
content: US-Iran War Live Updates: Follow real-time developments as the United States and Iran attempt to preserve a fragile ceasefire through renewed diplomatic engagement, even as military tensions continue across the Middle East. Track the latest updates on the Doha talks, the Strait of Hormuz, regional security, humanitarian developments and the wider geopolitical impact of the conflict.Trump Announces Fresh Doha Talks: US President Donald Trump said American and Iranian officials would meet in Doha after Tehran allegedly requested fresh negotiations. The meeting is aimed at advancing the implementation of the recently signed memorandum of understanding and preventing a return to open conflict.Iran Denies Formal Negotiations: Iran quickly disputed Trump's announcement, with senior negotiator Kazem Gharibabadi stating that no formal technical negotiations had been scheduled. Tehran said consultations with Qatar on implementing the agreement were continuing but reports of new talks were "not confirmed".US Confirms High-Level Delegation: The White House later clarified that Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and senior adviser Jared Kushner would travel to Doha for high-level discussions. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said technical discussions would take place alongside broader diplomatic meetings.Frozen Iranian Assets On Agenda: Iran's Foreign Ministry said it would send an expert delegation to Doha to follow up on the release of frozen Iranian assets, including the reported release of $6 billion held in Qatar. Neither Washington nor Doha has officially confirmed the transfer.Pezeshkian Hails Interim Agreement: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian described the interim agreement as "a great victory for the Iranian people", arguing that it had secured important economic and diplomatic gains while opening the door for broader negotiations.Strait Of Hormuz Remains Flashpoint: Tehran rejected France's proposal to support de-mining operations in the Strait of Hormuz, warning Paris against what it described as provocations in an already sensitive security environment. The strategic waterway remains central to negotiations after months of disruption to global shipping.Maritime Security Continues To Raise Concerns: Recent attacks on commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, including reports of an alleged Iranian strike on a cargo vessel, have renewed concerns that the fragile ceasefire could unravel if maritime security deteriorates further.Israel Continues Military Operations: Despite the broader diplomatic process, Israeli forces continued military operations in both Gaza and southern Lebanon. At least eight Palestinians were reported killed in Gaza, while fresh strikes were also reported across southern Lebanon despite the ceasefire agreement with Beirut.Trump Says US Honouring Ceasefire: The White House maintained that Washington continues to uphold its commitments under the interim agreement but warned that any renewed violence would be met with a military response, reflecting the fragile nature of the current truce.Energy Markets Watch Diplomatic Progress: The interim agreement signed on June 17 was designed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and provide a 60-day window for broader negotiations. Any disruption to implementation could once again threaten one of the world's most important energy corridors, through which roughly one-fifth of global oil and liquefied natural gas shipments normally pass.Trump Credits Deal For Falling Oil Prices: President Trump claimed the diplomatic breakthrough had contributed to lower global oil prices and declining fuel costs, arguing that market confidence had improved following the ceasefire and reopening of maritime routes.Fragile Peace Enters Critical Stage: Although both Washington and Tehran continue to pursue diplomatic engagement, conflicting public statements, unresolved disputes over implementation and ongoing military activity across the region underscore how fragile the peace process remains. The Doha discussions are expected to play a key role in determining whether the ceasefire evolves into a lasting settlement.

title: കേരളയിൽ വീണ്ടും വിവാദം?; തോമസ് എബ്രഹാമിനെ നീക്കി വി സി ഗിരിജ ഗോപാലിന് നിയമനം | Kerala University
content: <p>കേരള സർവകലാശാല സ്റ്റാൻഡിങ് കൗൺസിൽ തർക്കം; തോമസ് എബ്രഹാമിനെ നീക്കി വി സി ഗിരിജ ഗോപാലിന് നിയമനം, വിസിക്ക് അധികാരം ഇല്ലെന്ന് തോമസ് എബ്രഹാം Kerala University | Girija Gopalan | Asianet News</p>

title: Jairam Ramesh:  స‌ర్‌, ఈసీ పాత్ర‌ను ప్ర‌శ్నిస్తూ సీజేఐకి లేఖ రాసిన 23 విప‌క్ష పార్టీలు
description: Jairam Ramesh: 23 విప‌క్ష పార్టీలు ఇవాళ భార‌త ప్ర‌ధాన న్యాయ‌మూర్తి సూర్య‌కాంత్‌కు లేఖ రాశాయి. వివిధ రాష్ట్రాల్లో చేప‌డుతున్న స‌ర్ ప్ర‌క్రియ‌తో పాటు ఎన్నిక‌ల సంఘం పాత్ర, ఎన్నిక‌ల‌కు సంబంధించిన స‌మ‌స్య‌ల గురించి ఆ పార్టీలు ప్ర‌శ్నించాయి.  న్యాయ వ్య‌వ‌స్థ జోక్యం చేసుకోవాల‌ని ఆ లేఖ‌లో విప‌క్ష పార్టీలు కోరాయి.
content:
న్యూఢిల్లీ: వివిధ రాష్ట్రాల్లో చేప‌డుతున్న స‌ర్ ప్ర‌క్రియ‌తో పాటు ఎన్నిక‌ల సంఘం పాత్ర, ఎన్నిక‌ల‌కు సంబంధించిన స‌మ‌స్య‌ల గురించి ఇవాళ 23 విప‌క్ష పార్టీలు భార‌త ప్ర‌ధాన న్యాయ‌మూర్తి సూర్య‌కాంత్‌కు లేఖ రాశాయి. 23 పార్టీలతో పాటు ఓ ఇండిపెండెంట్ ఎంపీ సంత‌కం చేసిన లేఖ‌ను జ‌స్టిస్ సూర్య‌కాంత్‌కు పంపిన‌ట్లు కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ జ‌న‌ర‌ల్ సెక్ర‌ట‌రీ జైరాం ర‌మేశ్(Jairam Ramesh) తెలిపారు. ఇండియా బ్లాక్ పార్టీల‌తో పాటు ఆమ్ ఆద్మీ, డీఎంకే పార్టీలు కూడా ఆ లేఖ‌లో సంత‌కాలు చేశాయి. త‌న ఎక్స్ అకౌంట్‌లో జ‌య‌రాం ర‌మేశ్ ఈ విష‌యాన్ని తెలిపారు. సంఘీభావం, ఐక్య‌త‌, ప్ర‌తిఘ‌ట‌న‌తో విప‌క్ష పార్టీలు ఉన్న‌ట్లు ఆయ‌న పేర్కొన్నారు.
జూన్ 8వ తేదీన జ‌రిగిన ఇండియా కూట‌మి నేత‌ల స‌మావేశంలో సీజేఐకి లేఖ రాయాల‌ని నిర్ణ‌యించిన‌ట్లు ర‌మేశ్ తెలిపారు. మ‌ల్లిఖార్జున్ ఖ‌ర్గే, రాహుల్ గాందీ, మ‌మ‌తా బెన‌ర్జీ , తేజ‌స్వీ యాద‌వ్‌, అఖిలేశ్ యాద‌వ్‌, హేమంత్ సోరెన్, ఒమ‌ర్ అబ్దుల్లా, క‌పిల్ సిబ‌ల్‌, డెరిక్ ఒబ్రెయిన్ ఆ లేఖ‌లో సంత‌కం చేశారు. కేంద్రంలోని అన్ని వ్య‌వ‌స్థ‌లు విఫ‌ల‌మైన‌ప్పుడు, భార‌త ప్ర‌జాస్వామ్యం.. న్యాయ‌వ్య‌వ‌స్థ‌ను ఆశ్ర‌యిస్తుంద‌న్న అభిప్రాయాన్ని విప‌క్ష నేత‌లు వ్య‌క్తం చేశారు.
న్యాయ శాఖ అంత‌రాత్మ‌ను కోరుతున్నామ‌ని, దేశంలో ఏం జ‌రుగుతుందో జుడీషియ‌రీ ప‌ట్టించుకోవాల‌ని విప‌క్ష నేత‌లు కోరారు. భార‌త ఎన్నిక‌ల సంఘం పాత్ర‌, స‌ర్ వ‌ల్ల వివిధ రాష్ట్రాల్లో ఓట‌ర్లు ప్ర‌భావానికి గురైన విష‌యాన్ని లేఖ‌లో పేర్కొన్న‌ట్లు చెప్పారు. కేంద్ర స‌ర్కారు చేప‌డుతున్న స్పెష‌ల్ ఇంటెన్సివ్ రివిజ‌న్ విధానాన్ని కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీతో పాటు విప‌క్షాలు ప్ర‌శ్నిస్తున్నాయి.

title: ‘जय श्री राम बोलने वालों पर लाठीचार्ज कराने वाले आज भक्ति की बात कर रहे’, CM योगी का विपक्ष पर हमला
description:
CM Yogi attacks the opposition: मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ ने मंगलवार को रामपुर में समाजवादी पार्टी (SP) और कांग्रेस पर तीखा हमला बोला। उन्होंने कहा कि जो लोग पहले भगवान राम के भक्तों का विरोध करते थे, वे आज खुद को राम भक्त बताने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं। मुख्यमंत्री ने सवाल उठाया कि जिन नेताओं.
The post ‘जय श्री राम बोलने वालों पर लाठीचार्ज कराने वाले आज भक्ति की बात कर रहे’, CM योगी का विपक्ष पर हमला appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

From loom to Lord Jagannath: The Odisha families weaving sacred silk for Rath Yatra
Why Is Lord Jagannath's Idol Unfinished? The Fascinating Legend Behind Puri's Sacred Mystery
description: One of the most enduring mysteries of the Jagannath Temple is why its deities remain unfinished. A popular legend links their unique appearance to a divine intervention.
content: Every year in Puri, Odisha, the famous Rath Yatra of Lord Jagannath is held in the month of Ashadha. This year, the Jagannath Puri Rath Yatra will take place on Thursday, July 16. During the Rath Yatra, procession, the idols of Lord Jagannath, along with his brother Balabhadra (Balarama) and sister Subhadra, is beautifully decked up and seated on magnificent chariots before being taken through the city of Puri. The Jagannath Temple in Puri is surrounded by many beliefs, legends and mysteries that continue to fascinate people. This is one of the reasons why the annual Rath Yatra attracts huge crowds from across the country and beyond. If one sees the idol of Lord Jagannath, it can be noticed that it is incomplete. But there are two intriguing stories behind it. The Story Behind Lord Jagannath's Incomplete IdolAccording to mythological legend, Lord Krishna once began calling out Radha's name in his sleep. His wives were surprised and curious that why wasn't he able to forget Radha. They asked Rohini, mother of Lord Krishna and Balarama, about the relationship between Krishna and Radha.Rohini agreed to tell them the story, but didn't want to overwhelm Krishna. She asked Subhadra to stand guard at the entrance and ensure that no one entered the room.After some time, Krishna and Balarama arrived. Subhadra stopped them at the door and refused to let them enter. Even so, the story of Krishna and Radha could be heard from outside, and Krishna, Balarama and Subhadra stood at the entrance listening intently.  Narada Was Astonished by Their Divine StateAs they started listening to the story, their bodies began to transform in an extraordinary way. Their hands and feet seemed to merge into their forms and eyes became large. At that very moment, the sage Narada arrived and was astonished by what he saw.Narada then requested Krishna to remain on Earth in this divine form so that ordinary people could have his darshan. Lord Krishna accepted the request.Vishwakarma's Condition for Creating the IdolsIn another lore according to Skanda Purana, King Indradyumna of Malwa wished to fulfil this divine vision and sought a craftsman to create the idols. Lord Vishwakarma, the celestial architect, appeared before the king disguised as an elderly artisan. He told the king that he could carve the idols of Lord Neelamadhava, Subhadra and Balabhadra, but only on one condition.He said that he would complete the work within 21 days, but he must be left alone in a closed room while carving the idols. During that period, no one would be allowed to open the door. The work of making the idols began, after the king agreed to it. The sounds of idols being carved could be heard from the outside. However, one day, the sounds stopped suddenly. There was no sound to prove that the work was still in progress. The king feared that something might have happened to the elderly craftsman. Unable to contain his concern, he forgot the condition he had agreed to and ordered the door to be opened.  The moment the door was opened, Vishwakarma disappeared. That's when he discovered three idols that had not been finished. The limbs were missing from the idols.The incomplete idols of Jagannath, Subhadra and Balabhadra were installed in the temple and worshipped. Since then, devotees at the Jagannath Temple in Puri have continued to worship these unfinished forms with great reverence.The Nabakalebara FestivalEvery 12 years, during Adhika Masa or Mala Masa, the Jagannath Temple celebrates the Nabakalebara festival. During this sacred event, the old idols of Lord Jagannath, Subhadra and Balabhadra are ceremonially replaced with new ones carved from neem wood. This ritual also symbolises Lord Jagannath relinquishing his old body and taking on a new one. It also shows the cycle of death and rebirth, and the impermanence of physical body.Disclaimer: This article is based on popular beliefs. Times Now is not responsible for the accuracy or completeness of the information and facts provided here.

title: नागपुर से बावनकुले का उद्धव को जवाब: महाराष्ट्र को विकसित कर रहे फडणवीस, ठाकरे पहले अपना राजनीतिक भविष्य बचाएं
description: Nagpur Chandrashekhar Bawankule: राजस्व मंत्री चंद्रशेखर बावनकुले ने उद्धव ठाकरे के बयान पर पलटवार करते हुए कहा कि उन्हें देवेंद्र फडणवीस के बजाय अपनी पार्टी और उसके भविष्य की चिंता करनी चाहिए।
content:
Nagpur Bawankule Uddhav Thackeray: राजस्व मंत्री चंद्रशेखर बावनकुले ने शिवसेना प्रमुख उद्धव ठाकरे के इस बयान पर पलटवार किया किया कि मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस प्रधानमंत्री बने तो उनका पूरा समर्थन होगा। बावनकुले ने कहा कि मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस के राजनीतिक भविष्य की चिंता करने की बजाय उद्धव ठाकरे को अपने दल की चिंता करनी चाहिए।
उन्हें आत्ममंथन करना चाहिए कि उनके दल के नेता और कार्यकर्ता लगातार पार्टी क्यों छोड़ रहे हैं। वे नागपुर में पत्रकारों के सवालों का जवाब दे रहे थे। उन्होंने कहा कि फडणवीस में महाराष्ट्र को विकसित राज्य बनाने की क्षमता है। प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी और केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह का भी उनके नेतृत्व पर पूरा भरोसा है। उद्धव ठाकरे को प्रधानमंत्री पर टिप्पणी करने के बजाय अपने राजनीतिक भविष्य पर ध्यान देना चाहिए।
शिवसेना को कांग्रेस ने किया कमजोर
बावनकुले ने कहा कि बीजेपी ने हिंदुत्व की विचारधारा के आधार पर अपना राष्ट्रीय अस्तित्व बनाया है और पार्टी सत्ता या धन के लिए नहीं, बल्कि विचारधारा के लिए काम करती है। इसके विपरीत उद्धव ठाकरे ने अपने विचार कांग्रेस के साथ जोड़ दिए हैं और कांग्रेस ने ही उनकी पार्टी को कमजोर करने का काम किया। अब उनके पास केवल आलोचना करने के सिवाय कुछ नहीं बचा है।
वे केवल अपनी नाराजगी और भय के कारण भाजपा की आलोचना कर रहे हैं। उन्होंने यह भी कहा कि जनता ने यह फैसला दे दिया है कि हिंदू हृदयसम्राट बालासाहब ठाकरे की विचारधारा को डीसीएम एकनाथ शिंदे की पार्टी आगे बढ़ा रही है। फडणवीस के नेतृत्व में महाराष्ट्र के 14 करोड़ लोगों को विकसित राज्य देने की क्षमता है। इसलिए उनके मार्ग में कोई भी आए, इससे कोई फर्क नहीं पड़ेगा।
300 करोड़ रुपये से सुधरेंगी मनपा शालाएं
उन्होंने जानकारी दी कि इस वर्ष जिला योजना समिति के माध्यम से मनपा स्कूलों की गुणवत्ता सुधारने के लिए लगभग 300 करोड़ रुपये खर्च करने की योजना बनाई गई है। बंद होने की स्थिति में पहुंच चुके स्कूलों को फिर से सशक्त बनाना, शिक्षा की गुणवत्ता बढ़ाना तथा आवश्यक सुविधाएं उपलब्ध कराना सरकार की प्राथमिकता होगी। इसके लिए संबंधित विभागों को आवश्यक निर्देश जारी कर दिए गए है।
288 विस क्षेत्रों में &#8216;शिवाजी महाराज राजस्व अभियान&#8217;
मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस के 22 जुलाई को होने वाले जन्मदिन के अवसर पर राजस्व विभाग की ओर से राज्य के सभी 288 विधानसभा क्षेत्रों में &#8216;छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराज राजस्व अभियान&#8217; चलाया जाएगा। इस अभियान के माध्यम से विभिन्न राजस्व सेवाएं नागरिकों के घर-घर तक पहुंचाई जाएंगी। उन्होंने बताया कि पांधन रास्ते योजना के तहत अगले 4-5 वर्षों में राज्य की प्रमुख पांचन सड़कों का निर्माण पूरा करने का लक्ष्य रखा गया है।
यह भी पढ़ें:-40 करोड़ के भुगतान पर विवाद, नागपुर में 1 जुलाई से बिजली ठेकेदारों का काम बंद, बढ़ सकती हैं दिक्कतें
इसके लिए 1,000 करोड़ रुपये का प्रावधान किया गया है। आरटीओ के भ्रष्ट अधिकारियों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई के संदर्भ में कहा कि परिवहन मंत्री प्रताप सरनाईक से फिर चर्चा की जाएगी। सेवानिवृत्ति के बाद भी कुछ अधिकारी प्रभाव बनाए हुए है और भ्रष्टाचार से संबंधित लगभग 140 शिकायते प्राप्त हुई हैं। ऐसे अधिकारियों के खिलाफ केंद्रीय और राज्य स्तरीय एजेंसियों के माध्यम से सख्त कार्रवाई की मांग की जाएगी।

title: 'ജയ് ഭീം' സംവിധായകനൊപ്പം വീണ്ടും സൂര്യ; പ്രതീക്ഷയോടെ ആരാധകര്‍
description: 'ജയ് ഭീം' എന്ന ചിത്രത്തിന് ശേഷം സൂര്യയും സംവിധായകൻ ടി ജെ ജ്ഞാനവേലും വീണ്ടും ഒന്നിക്കുന്നു.
content: <p>ചില താരങ്ങളും സംവിധായകരും ഒരുമിക്കുമ്പോള്‍ ആ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകള്‍ക്ക് സിനിമാപ്രേമികള്‍ക്കിടയില്‍ ലഭിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഹൈപ്പ് ഉണ്ട്. അത്തരത്തിലൊരു ചിത്രമാണ് തമിഴ് താരം സൂര്യയുടേതായി ഇന്നലെ പ്രഖ്യാപിക്കപ്പെട്ടത്. ജയ് ഭീം എന്ന ചിത്രത്തിന് ശേഷം സൂര്യയും ടി ജെ ജ്ഞാനവേലും ഒന്നിക്കുന്ന ചിത്രമാണ് ഇന്നലെ പ്രഖ്യാപിക്കപ്പെട്ടത്. മികച്ച സിനിമാനുഭവം സമ്മാനിച്ചുകൊണ്ട് ദേശീയ ശ്രദ്ധ നേടിയ ചിത്രമായിരുന്നു ജയ് ഭീം. കെജിഎഫ്, കാന്താര അടക്കമുള്ള ചിത്രങ്ങളിലൂടെ പാന്‍ ഇന്ത്യന്‍ ശ്രദ്ധ നേടിയ ഹൊംബാലെ ഫിലിംസ് ആണ് നിര്‍മ്മാണം എന്നത് ഈ പ്രോജക്റ്റിന്മേലുള്ള പ്രേക്ഷക പ്രതീക്ഷകള്‍ വര്‍ധിപ്പിക്കുന്നുണ്ട്.</p><p>ഇന്ത്യൻ സിനിമയിലെ ഏറ്റവും പ്രശസ്തരായ താരങ്ങളിൽ ഒരാളായ സൂര്യ തന്റെ വൈവിധ്യവും ഗംഭീരമായ പ്രകടനങ്ങള്‍ കൊണ്ട് രണ്ട് പതിറ്റാണ്ടിലേറെയായി പ്രേക്ഷകരെ ആകർഷിച്ചു മുന്നേറുകയാണ്. രണ്ട് ദേശീയ ചലച്ചിത്ര അവാർഡുകളും ഏഴ് ഫിലിംഫെയർ അവാർഡ് സൗത്ത് അവാർഡുകളും നേടിയിട്ടുള്ള അദ്ദേഹം, ഒരേ സമയം വാണിജ്യ മൂല്യമുള്ള ചിത്രങ്ങളും ആഴമുള്ള നിരൂപക പ്രശംസ നേടിയ ചിത്രങ്ങളും ചെയ്ത് സിനിമയോടുള്ള തൻ്റെ പ്രതിബദ്ധത കാണിച്ചു തന്നിട്ടുമുണ്ട്. ശക്തമായ മാനുഷിക വികാരങ്ങളിലൂടെ സഞ്ചരിക്കുന്ന, പ്രേക്ഷകരെ രസിപ്പിക്കുന്നതിനൊപ്പം ചിന്തിപ്പിക്കുകയും ചെയ്യുന്ന ആഖ്യാന ശൈലിക്ക് പേരുകേട്ട ടി ജെ ജ്ഞാനവേൽ, സമകാലിക ഇന്ത്യൻ സിനിമയിലെ ഏറ്റവും വ്യത്യസ്തരായ ചലച്ചിത്ര സംവിധായകരിൽ ഒരാളായി സ്ഥാനം നേടിയെടുത്ത പ്രതിഭയാണ്. ഇവര്‍ വീണ്ടുമൊന്നിക്കുന്ന ചിത്രത്തിന് ഹൈപ്പ് സ്വാഭാവികമായി വന്നുചേരുന്ന ഒന്നാണ്.</p><p>കഴിഞ്ഞ കുറച്ചു വർഷങ്ങളിലായി കെജിഎഫ്, കാന്താര, സലാർ തുടങ്ങിയ ബ്ലോക്ക്ബസ്റ്റർ ചിത്രങ്ങളിലൂടെ ഇന്ത്യൻ സിനിമയിൽ പുതിയ ബോക്സ് ഓഫീസ് നാഴികക്കല്ലുകൾ സൃഷ്ടിച്ചുകൊണ്ട് മുന്നേറുന്ന ഹോംബാലെ ഫിലിംസ്, ഇന്ത്യയിലെ മുൻനിര സിനിമാ നിർമ്മാണ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളിലൊന്നായി ഇതിനോടകം ഉയർന്നുവന്നിട്ടുണ്ട്. ദീർഘവീക്ഷണമുള്ള കഥാകൃത്തുക്കളെ പിന്തുണയ്ക്കുന്നതിനും ഭാഷകളെയും സംസ്കാരങ്ങളെയും മറികടക്കുന്ന സിനിമ നൽകുന്നതിനും പേരുകേട്ട ഈ നിർമ്മാണ സ്ഥാപനം, പ്രേക്ഷകരിൽ സ്വാധീനം ചെലുത്തുന്ന കഥകളെ പിന്തുണക്കുന്നതിൽ എന്നും മുന്നിലാണ്.</p><p>സായ് അഭയങ്കർ സംഗീതം, എസ്.ആർ. കതിർ ഛായാഗ്രഹണം, കെ. കതിർ പ്രൊഡക്ഷൻ ഡിസൈൻ, ഫിലോമിൻ രാജ് എഡിറ്റിംഗ് എന്നിവ നിർവഹിക്കുന്ന ഈ പ്രോജക്ട് ഒരു മികച്ച സാങ്കേതിക സംഘത്തെ ആണ് അവതരിപ്പിക്കാൻ പോകുന്നത്. ഈ വമ്പൻ സഹകരണം, ഒരു പ്രഗത്ഭനായ നടനെയും ദീർഘവീക്ഷണമുള്ള ഒരു സംവിധായകനെയും സിനിമാറ്റിക് മികവിന് പേരുകേട്ട ഒരു പ്രൊഡക്ഷൻ ഹൗസിനെയും ഒരുമിച്ച് കൊണ്ടുവരുന്നു. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള വ്യത്യസ്ത തലമുറകളിലെ പ്രേക്ഷകരെ ആകർഷിക്കുന്ന, ആഴമുള്ളതും അർത്ഥമുള്ളതുമായ ഒരു ചിത്രം നിർമ്മിക്കാനാണ് ഇതിലൂടെ ഈ വമ്പൻ ടീം ലക്ഷ്യമിടുന്നത്. പിആർഒ - വൈശാഖ് സി വടക്കേവീട്, ജിനു അനിൽകുമാർ.</p><p></p>

title: നീറ്റ് പരീക്ഷ നടത്തിപ്പിനെതിരെയുള്ള പ്രമേയം പാസ്സാക്കി നിയമസഭ; ബിജെപിയുടെ ഭേ​ഗ​ഗതി നിർദേശം വോട്ടിനിട്ട് തള്ളി
description: ലക്ഷക്കണക്കിന് വിദ്യാർത്ഥികളെ ആശങ്കയിൽ ആക്കിയ ക്രമക്കേടിൽ ഉത്തരവാദികൾക്കെതിരെ നടപടി വേണമെന്നും പരീക്ഷാ സമ്പ്രദായം സമഗ്രമായി പരിഷ്കരിക്കണമെന്നും ആണ് പ്രമേയം പറയുന്നത്.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: നീറ്റ് പരീക്ഷ നടത്തിപ്പിൽ കേന്ദ്രസർക്കാരിനെതിരായ പ്രമേയം നിയമസഭ പാസാക്കി. ബിജെപിയുടെ ഭേദഗതി നിർദ്ദേശങ്ങൾ വോട്ടിനിട്ട് തള്ളിയാണ് പ്രമേയം പാസാക്കിയത്. ക്രമക്കേടിൽ നടപടിയെടുത്ത കേന്ദ്രസർക്കാരിനെ അഭിനന്ദിക്കണം എന്നായിരുന്നു വി മുരളീധരന്റെ ആവശ്യം. ലക്ഷക്കണക്കിന് വിദ്യാർത്ഥികളെ ആശങ്കയിൽ ആക്കിയ ക്രമക്കേടിൽ ഉത്തരവാദികൾക്കെതിരെ നടപടി വേണമെന്നും പരീക്ഷാ സമ്പ്രദായം സമഗ്രമായി പരിഷ്കരിക്കണമെന്നും ആണ് പ്രമേയം പറയുന്നത്.</p><p></p>

title: Explained: VAR Controversy That Ended Germany's World Cup Dream And Left Thomas Muller Feeling 'Used and Cheated'
description: Germany's hopes of advancing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 were dashed by a contentious VAR decision during their match against Paraguay.  The incident has drawn attention to the interpretation of the rules regarding goalkeeper protection.
content: The 103rd-minute intervention that prevented Julian Nagelsmann's team from qualifying for the FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16 will remain connected with Germany's historic 4-3 penalty shootout loss to Paraguay in Boston. Germany and Paraguay were tied 1-1 after Kai Havertz equalised for the four-time champions, cancelling out Julio Enciso's header from the first half. The German bench erupted, thinking their spot in the next round was guaranteed, as defender Jonathan Tah slammed home Nathaniel Brown's looping extra-time corner. The VAR ControversyThe goal was controversially cancelled for a Waldemar Anton foul on Paraguay goalkeeper Orlando Gill after lead VAR Tatiana Guzman called Moroccan referee Jalal Jayed to the pitch-side monitor.Anton's positioning was crucial for the decision. The German defender purposefully stood in front of Gill as the corner was being given and shoved him aside as he attempted to intercept the ball. This is a common tactical blocking technique that many players are known to use in such scenarios. However, the goalkeepers are shielded from these strategies, which limit their mobility, by the new FIFA regulations.Gill fell to the ground as the cross entered, despite replays showing very little physical contact. Any deliberate obstruction or screening that keeps a goalie from contesting to stop the ball within their own six-yard box can be considered a foul under the new strict FIFA regulations. According to Jayed, Anton's block was an illegal obstruction that allowed Tah to score.

title: തനിച്ച് താമസിക്കുന്ന വയോധികയെ കാണാതായതോടെ വ്യാപക തെരച്ചില്‍; ഒടുവില്‍ കണ്ടത് ആള്‍മറയില്ലാത്ത കിണറ്റില്‍ വീണ് മരിച്ച നിലയില്‍
description: കൊണ്ടോട്ടി മൊറയൂര്‍ വാലഞ്ചേരിയില്‍ കാണാതായ വയോധികയെ വീട്ടുപറമ്പിലെ ഉപയോഗിക്കാത്ത കിണറ്റില്‍ മരിച്ച നിലയില്‍ കണ്ടെത്തി. വീട്ടില്‍ ഒറ്റയ്ക്ക് താമസിച്ചിരുന്ന നബീസയാണ് മരിച്ചത്. അബദ്ധത്തില്‍ കിണറ്റില്‍ വീണതാകാമെന്ന പ്രാഥമിക നിഗമനത്തിലാണ് പൊലീസ്.
content: <p>മലപ്പുറം: കൊണ്ടോട്ടി മൊറയൂര്‍ വാലഞ്ചേരിയില്‍ കാണാതായ വയോധികയെ വീട്ടുപറമ്പിലെ ഉപയോഗിക്കാതെ കിടന്നിരുന്ന കിണറ്റില്‍ മരിച്ച നിലയില്‍ കണ്ടെത്തി. വാലഞ്ചേരി സ്വദേശി വി ടി നബീസയെ ആണ് വീട്ടുപറമ്പിലെ ആള്‍മറയില്ലാത്ത കിണറ്റില്‍ മരിച്ച നിലയില്‍ കണ്ടെത്തിയത്. അബദ്ധത്തില്‍ കിണറ്റില്‍ വീണതാകാം എന്നാണ് പൊലീസിന്‍റെ പ്രാഥമിക നിഗമനം. നബീസ വീട്ടില്‍ ഒറ്റയ്ക്കായിരുന്നു താമസം. കഴിഞ്ഞ ദിവസം മുതല്‍ കാണാതിരുന്നതിനെ തുടര്‍ന്ന് ബന്ധുക്കളും നാട്ടുകാരും ചേര്‍ന്ന് പ്രദേശത്ത് വ്യാപകമായ തെരച്ചില്‍ നടത്തി.</p><p>ഇന്നലെ രാത്രിയോടെയാണ് വീട്ടുപറമ്പില്‍ ആള്‍മറയില്ലാതെ മൂടാതെ കിടന്നിരുന്ന കിണറ്റില്‍ മൃതദേഹം കണ്ടെത്തിയത്. വിവരമറിഞ്ഞ് മലപ്പുറത്തു നിന്നും ഫയര്‍ഫോഴ്സ് സംഘം സ്ഥലത്തെത്തി മൃതദേഹം കിണറ്റില്‍ നിന്നും പുറത്തെടുത്തു. കൊണ്ടോട്ടി പോലീസും സ്ഥലത്തെത്തി മേല്‍നടപടികള്‍ സ്വീകരിച്ചു. ഇന്‍ക്വസ്റ്റ് നടപടികള്‍ പൂര്‍ത്തിയാക്കിയ ശേഷം മൃതദേഹം പോസ്റ്റ്‌മോര്‍ട്ടത്തിനായി മഞ്ചേരി മെഡിക്കല്‍ കോളേജിലേക്ക് മാറ്റി. സംഭവത്തില്‍ പൊലീസ് അസ്വാഭാവിക മരണത്തിന് കേസെടുത്ത് അന്വേഷണം ആരംഭിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. പോസ്റ്റ് മോര്‍ട്ടത്തിനു ശേഷം മൃതദേഹം ബന്ധുക്കള്‍ക്ക് വിട്ടു നല്‍കും. മക്കള്‍ - സറീന, ലൈല.</p>

title: अरशद वारसी ने वादा किया कि ‘धमाल 4’ ओरिजिनल फिल्म की मासूमियत वापस लाएगी; टीम को “एक परिवार” कहा
description:
एंटरटेनमेंट डेस्क: जब से धमाल 4 का ट्रेलर आया है, दर्शक बॉलीवुड की सबसे पसंदीदा कॉमेडी फ्रेंचाइजी में से एक की वापसी का बेसब्री से इंतजार कर रहे हैं। ट्रेलर में पुरानी यादों, पागलपन और हंसी का सही बैलेंस है, जिससे फिल्म को लेकर उत्साह बढ़ता ही जा रहा है। जहां मेकर्स ने कहानी को.
The post अरशद वारसी ने वादा किया कि ‘धमाल 4’ ओरिजिनल फिल्म की मासूमियत वापस लाएगी; टीम को “एक परिवार” कहा appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
एंटरटेनमेंट डेस्क: जब से धमाल 4 का ट्रेलर आया है, दर्शक बॉलीवुड की सबसे पसंदीदा कॉमेडी फ्रेंचाइजी में से एक की वापसी का बेसब्री से इंतजार कर रहे हैं। ट्रेलर में पुरानी यादों, पागलपन और हंसी का सही बैलेंस है, जिससे फिल्म को लेकर उत्साह बढ़ता ही जा रहा है। जहां मेकर्स ने कहानी को सीक्रेट रखा है, वहीं अरशद वारसी ने अब बताया है कि दर्शक इस लेटेस्ट इंस्टॉलमेंट से क्या उम्मीद कर सकते हैं, साथ ही उन कलाकारों के साथ फिर से जुड़ने के बारे में भी बताया जो इतने सालों में परिवार की तरह बन गए हैं।
फिल्म के बारे में बात करते हुए, अरशद वारसी ने कहा, “खैर, मैं कहानी और आदि-मानव के किरदारों को कैसे दिखाया गया है, इसके बारे में ज्यादा कुछ नहीं बता सकता, लेकिन एक बात का मैं वादा कर सकता हूं कि ओरिजिनल धमाल में जो मासूमियत थी, वह धमाल 4 के साथ वापस आ गई है।”
टीम के साथ फिर से जुड़ने के बारे में उन्होंने आगे कहा, “धमाल गैंग मेरे लिए एक परिवार जैसा है। उनमें से हर एक के साथ मिलकर काम करना हमेशा अच्छा होता है और इस बार हम सब मिलकर और भी बड़े तरीके से धमाल मचाएंगे और लोगों को हंसाएंगे।”
अरशद ने उस मासूमियत की वापसी का वादा किया है जिसने ओरिजिनल धमाल को कल्ट फेवरेट बनाया था और कास्ट को एक बड़ा परिवार बताया है, धमाल 4 उस सिग्नेचर ह्यूमर, दोस्ती और कॉमिक कोलाहल को वापस लाने के लिए पूरी तरह तैयार है जिसे ऑडियंस ने सालों से पसंद किया है। प्यारे कलाकारों की टीम को नए चेहरों के साथ फिर से जोड़ते हुए, यह फिल्म हंसी और ज़बरदस्त मस्ती से भरपूर एक कम्प्लीट एंटरटेनर का वादा करती है।
हर उम्र के दर्शकों के लिए एक मज़ेदार एंटरटेनर, धमाल 4 में अजय देवगन, अरशद वारसी, रितेश देशमुख, जावेद जाफ़री और संजय मिश्रा जैसे दमदार कलाकार हैं, साथ ही ईशा गुप्ता, संजीदा शेख, अंजलि आनंद, उपेंद्र लिमये, विजय पाटकर और रवि किशन भी हैं।
धमाल 4 को गुलशन कुमार और टी-सीरीज ने देवगन फ़िल्म्स के साथ मिलकर पेश किया है, जो टी-सीरीज़ फ़िल्म्स, मारुति इंटरनेशनल, पैनोरमा स्टूडियोज़ का प्रोडक्शन है। धमाल 4 को इंद्र कुमार ने डायरेक्ट किया है और अजय देवगन, भूषण कुमार, कृष्ण कुमार, अशोक ठाकेरिया, इंद्र कुमार, आनंद पंडित और कुमार मंगत पाठक ने प्रोड्यूस किया है। धमाल 4 सिनेमाघरों में 10 जुलाई, 2026 को रिलीज होगी।
The post अरशद वारसी ने वादा किया कि ‘धमाल 4’ ओरिजिनल फिल्म की मासूमियत वापस लाएगी; टीम को “एक परिवार” कहा appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: ହୃଦୟବିଦାରକ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ! ରାସ୍ତା ନଥିବାରୁ ଖଟିଆରେ ବୁହାହେଲା ଗର୍ଭବତୀଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ, ଶିଶୁ ବି..
description:
ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ,୩୦।୬(ପ୍ରମୋଦ କୁମାର ପତି ): ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ବ୍ଲକ କର୍ଲାଘାଟି ଗ୍ରାମପଞ୍ଚାୟତର ପେଟାଖାଲ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାର ବିକଳ ଚିତ୍ର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି । ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ସେବତୀ ନାରେଙ୍ଗାକାଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହେବା ପରେ ତାଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୩ ରୁ ୪ କିଲୋମିଟର ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଖଟିଆରେ ବୋହି ଗାଁକୁ ନେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିଥିଲା। ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ସେବତୀ ନାରେଙ୍ଗାକା ପ୍ରସବ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୫ ଦିନ ଧରି ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଚିକତ୍ସାଧିନ ଥିଲେ।ଗତ ୨୬ ତାରିଖ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଦିନ […]
The post ହୃଦୟବିଦାରକ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ! ରାସ୍ତା ନଥିବାରୁ ଖଟିଆରେ ବୁହାହେଲା ଗର୍ଭବତୀଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ, ଶିଶୁ ବି.. appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ,୩୦।୬(ପ୍ରମୋଦ କୁମାର ପତି ): ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ବ୍ଲକ କର୍ଲାଘାଟି ଗ୍ରାମପଞ୍ଚାୟତର ପେଟାଖାଲ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାର ବିକଳ ଚିତ୍ର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି । ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ସେବତୀ ନାରେଙ୍ଗାକାଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହେବା ପରେ ତାଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୩ ରୁ ୪ କିଲୋମିଟର ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଖଟିଆରେ ବୋହି ଗାଁକୁ ନେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିଥିଲା।
ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ସେବତୀ ନାରେଙ୍ଗାକା ପ୍ରସବ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୫ ଦିନ ଧରି ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଚିକତ୍ସାଧିନ ଥିଲେ।ଗତ ୨୬ ତାରିଖ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଦିନ ତାଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଗୁରୁତର ହେବାରୁ ଗୁଣୁପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟକୁ ରେଫର କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ହେଲେ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ହିଁ ତାଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଥିଲା। ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ବଞ୍ଚିପାରି ନଥିଲା।
ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଅନୁସାରେ, ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ ରୋଗ ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞ ନଥିବାରୁ ଜଟିଳ ପ୍ରସବ ହେଲେ ରୋଗୀଙ୍କୁ ଗୁଣୁପୁରକୁ ରେଫର କରାଯାଉଛି। ଗୁଣୁପୁରରୁ ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସରେ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ହେଣ୍ଡେଡ଼େପା ଆର୍.ଡି. ରାସ୍ତା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଅଣାଯାଇଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ପେଟାଖାଲ ଗ୍ରାମକୁ ରାସ୍ତା ନଥିବାରୁ ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ ଆଗକୁ ଯାଇପାରିନଥିଲା। ଫଳରେ ପରିବାର ଲୋକ ଓ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀମାନେ ଖଟିଆରେ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ବୋହି ଗ୍ରାମକୁ ନେଇଥିଲେ। ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଏହା ପ୍ରଥମ ଘଟଣା ନୁହେଁ। ରାସ୍ତା ଅଭାବରୁ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅସୁସ୍ଥ ରୋଗୀ ଓ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ଖଟିଆରେ ବୋହିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିଛି। ବାରମ୍ବାର ପ୍ରଶାସନଙ୍କୁ ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ସମାଧାନ ହୋଇନାହିଁ।
ଏ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରର ଇନଚାର୍ଜ ସ୍ୱାଗତ ସ୍ୱାଇଁ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁର କାରଣ ତଦନ୍ତ ଚାଲିଛି। ଏ ନେଇ ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ଥାନାରେ ଥାନା କେଶ ନମ୍ବର ୬/୨୬ରେ ଏକ ଅପମୃତ୍ୟୁ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରାଯାଇଛି। କେଉଁ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଜଣେ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଲା ସେ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଜିଲା ପ୍ରଶାସନ ତଦନ୍ତ କରି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ନେବା ଜରୁରୀ। ଏହି ଦୁଖଃଦ ଘଟଣାରେ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଶୋକର ଛାୟା ଖେଳିଯାଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ପେଟାଖାଲ ଗ୍ରାମକୁ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ସଡ଼କ ନିର୍ମାଣ କରିବା ସହ ଗୁଡ଼ାରୀ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଜଣେ ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ ରୋଗ ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ପାଇଁ ସାଧାରଣରେ ଦାବି ଧରିଛି।
ଏ ନେଇ ବିଡ଼ିଓ ଶୁଚିସ୍ମିତା ବେହେରା କହିଛନ୍ତି ଘଟଣା ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଦୁଃଖଦାୟକ ଏହି ଘଟଣାର ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତି ନ ହେବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରଶାସନ ସଜାଗ ରହିଛି।
