The post ହୃଦୟବିଦାରକ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ! ରାସ୍ତା ନଥିବାରୁ ଖଟିଆରେ ବୁହାହେଲା ଗର୍ଭବତୀଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ, ଶିଶୁ ବି.. appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Consumers Protest: ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ବିଭାଗ ଉପରେ ପୁଞ୍ଜିଭୂତ ଅସନ୍ତୋଷକୁ ନେଇ ଗଣ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ: ଆଜି ୧୨ ଘଣ୍ଟିଆ ଦଶପଲ୍ଲା ବନ୍ଦ
description:
ଦଶପଲ୍ଲା: ନୟାଗଡ଼ ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ପ୍ରମୁଖ ସ୍ଥାନ ଦଶପଲ୍ଲାରେ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ବିଭାଗର ମନମୁଖୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ସାଙ୍ଗକୁ ଅଘୋଷିତ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ କାଟ, ଟାକରା ଠାରେ ୨୦୧୮ ମସିହାରୁ ୫୦ କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାରେ ନିର୍ମିତ ୨୨୦/୩୩ କିଲୋ ଭୋଲ୍ଟ ପାୱାର ଗ୍ରୀଡ଼ ଷ୍ଟେସନକୁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ଷମ ନକରିବା, ଲୋ - ଭୋଲ୍ଟେଜ ଆଲୁଅ, ଟିପିସିଓଡିଏଲ ଯୁବକମାନଙ୍କ ନାମରେ କରିଥିବା ମକଦ୍ଦମା ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର ପ୍ରଭୃତି ଦାବି ନେଇ ଆଜି ୧୨ ଘଣ୍ଟିଆ ଦଶପଲ୍ଲା ବନ୍ଦ ଡାକରା ଦେଇଛି ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ଉପଭୋକ୍ତା ସଙ୍ଘ। ଏଭଳି ସମସ୍ୟା ନେଇ ସଂଘ ଗତ ୧ ମାସ ହେବ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟରେ ଏକ ଦାବିପତ୍ର ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏଥିସହିତ ଗ୍ରାହକମାନଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ୧ ହଜାର ପୋଷ୍ଟ କାର୍ଡ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରେରଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ଅଧିକାରୀ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଦେଉନାହାନ୍ତି
 ପ୍ରଶାସନ ଓ ଘରୋଇ ଟାଟା କମ୍ପାନୀର କୌଣସି ଅଧିକାରୀ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଦେଉ ନଥିବା ହେତୁ ଉପଭୋକ୍ତା ସଂଘ ଆଜି ବାଧ୍ୟ ହୋଇ ଏଭଳି ଚରମ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଇଛି। ଯାହାକୁ ନେଇ ଉପଭୋକ୍ତାମାନଙ୍କ ଭିତରେ ତୀବ୍ର ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇବା ସହ ଦଳମତ ନିର୍ବିଶେଷରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ରାଜନୈତିକ ଦଳ ଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରି ଓକିଲ ସଂଘ, ସାମ୍ବାଦିକ ସଂଘ, ଘରୋଇ ମୋଟର କର୍ମଚାରୀ ସଂଘ, ବସ ମଲିକ ସଂଘ, ମହାବୀର ବଣିକ ମହାସଂଘର ସହଯୋଗୀ ୧୨ ଗୋଟି ବଜାର, ବରିଷ୍ଠ ନାଗରିକ ମଞ୍ଚ, ଅବସରପ୍ରାପ୍ତ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ସଂଘ, ୨୫ଗୋଟି ଯୁବକ ସଂଘ, ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ମହାସଂଘ, ଅଟୋ ରିକ୍ସା ସଂଘ, ସରପଞ୍ଚ ମହାସଂଘ, ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ସରପଞ୍ଚ, ସମିତି ସଭ୍ୟ ଓ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ପରିଷଦ ସଦସ୍ୟ, ବ୍ଳକ ଅଧକ୍ଷା, ଏନଏସି ଅଧକ୍ଷା, କାଉନସିଲର ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଏହି ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନକୁ ସମର୍ଥନ ଜଣାଇ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଓହ୍ଲାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆଜିର ଏହି "ଦଶପଲ୍ଲା ବନ୍ଦ " ଦ୍ୱାରା ଖୋର୍ଦ୍ଧା - ବଲାଙ୍ଗୀର ନଂ ୫୭ ଜାତୀୟ ରାଜପଥ ସମେତ ଦଶପଲ୍ଲା - ଗଣିଆ ରାଜ୍ୟ ରାଜପଥରେ ଯାତାୟତ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଠପ ହୋଇ ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଦଶପଲ୍ଲାର ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଛକରେ ରାଜପଥକୁ ନାକାବନ୍ଦୀ କରି ରଖା ଯାଇଛି।
Heritage and Tribal Culture: ଗଜପତିର ଐତିହ୍ୟ ଓ ଆଦିବାସୀ ସଂସ୍କୃତି ଅବହେଳିତ
ଫଳରେ ପୂର୍ବ ଓ ପଶ୍ଚିମ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଯାତାୟତ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଠପ ହେବାସହ ଶହଶହ ସଂଖ୍ୟାରେ ଯାନବାହାନ ଅଟକି ରହିଛି। ଏଥିସହିତ ଦଶପଲ୍ଲାର ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ୟବସାୟିକ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠାନ, ସରକାରୀ ଓ ବେସରକାରୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟ, ସମସ୍ତ ଶିକ୍ଷାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଆଦି ବନ୍ଦ ରହିଛି। ପ୍ରଶାସନ ନ୍ୟାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଦାବି ପୁରଣ ନେଇ ଯଦି ଟାଳଟୁଳ ନୀତି ଆପଣାନ୍ତି ତେବେ ଆଗାମୀ ମାସରୁ ପ୍ରତି ଉପଭୋକ୍ତା ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ବିଲ ନଦେବା ଭଳି କଠୋର ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନିଆଯିବ ବୋଲି  ଉପଭୋକ୍ତା ସଂଘ ସଭାପତି ପ୍ରଫୁଲ୍ଲ କୁମାର ମିଶ୍ର ଓ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ ସଭାପତି ହାଡ଼ିବନ୍ଧୁ ମହାଖୁଡ଼ କହିଛନ୍ତି।

title: Indian households selling old gold: 50 tonnes of yellow metal sold in April-June quarter! Why people are rushing to cash out old gold?
description: Indian households selling old gold: India continues to depend heavily on imported gold. In FY26, the country imported gold worth around USD 72.4 billion, while recycled gold contributed an estimated 125-150 tonnes in 2025.
content: Indian households selling old gold: Amid growing fears that gold prices may have peaked, Indian households are reportedly rushing to monetise their old jewellery. An Economic Times report, citing data from the India Bullion and Jewellers Association (IBJA), said that consumers sold nearly 50 tonnes of old gold during the April-June quarter, up 43 per cent from a year earlier.Why are Indian consumers rushing to cash out old gold? "Indian consumers are leveraging the high price of gold for liquid cash," Surendra Mehta, national secretary at IBJA, was quoted as saying in the ET report."Though prices have fallen from a high of Rs 1.8 lakh per 10 gm in the beginning of the year to Rs 1.4 lakh, there is a fear among them that prices may further crash to Rs 1.2 lakh, which is prompting them to sell gold to encash," Mehta added.Trend seen by gold-buying companiesMuthoot Exim also noted a similar trend as cited by the report. The company reported a 40 per cent increase in old gold volumes across its network of more than 100 Gold Points nationwide."Consumers are becoming more comfortable monetising idle gold through organised and transparent channels," Keyur Shah, CEO of Muthoot Exim, told ET. "This not only helps them unlock value but also supports the domestic gold ecosystem by bringing precious metal back into circulation," Shah added.India’s dependence on imported gold grows                                                                                                                                                                                                                        This comes at a time when India continues to depend heavily on imported gold. In FY26, the country imported gold worth around USD 72.4 billion, while recycled gold contributed an estimated 125-150 tonnes in 2025, the report said. The ET report, citing Industry estimates, suggest recycled volumes could rise to 200-250 tonnes in 2026 if current trends continue.Gold falls for 4th straight monthGold prices edged lower on Tuesday, extending losses for a second consecutive session, as persistent US dollar strength and expectations of higher interest rates continued to dampen demand for the safe-haven metal.As of 5:40 AM, spot gold was down 0.2 per cent, or USD 9, at USD 4,008.24 per ounce. The precious metal is on track to register its fourth consecutive monthly decline, with prices down more than 11 per cent in June, marking the steepest monthly fall since April 2026.MCX gold rate on June 30 for August futures contracts was trading 1.3 per cent lower at Rs 140,950 per 10 grams. MCX silver futures, on the other hand, were trading about 1.08 per cent lower at Rs 220,670 per kg at around 9:13 AM.

title: Rotherham appoint Alex Bruce as boss
description: Rotherham United appoint Alex Bruce as their new head coach on a two-year deal.
content: Rotherham United have appointed Alex Bruce as their new head coach on a two-year deal.The 41-year-old left his job as assistant manager at Salford City earlier this month.He had a brief spell as manager of Macclesfield in 2023-24, but this will be his first managerial position in full-time football.Bruce, the son of former Birmingham City, Hull City and Newcastle United boss Steve, takes over a club that has suffered relegation from the Championship to League Two in the past three seasons.The Millers ended the season second bottom of League One under the interim charge of Lee Clark after Matt Hamshaw was sacked in March.Clark left the club after their final day 3-2 defeat by Wycombe Wanderers on 2 May, and much of their pursuit of a new boss has been led by former England head coach Steve McClaren, who was appointed as the club's head of football on 20 May.Bruce's first competitive game in charge will be in the EFL Cup first round against West Bromwich Albion, a club he coached at during his father's spell as manager at The Hawthorns.Listen to Rotherham United content on BBC Sounds

title: గ్రీస్‌లో UPIని ప్రారంభించిన భారత్
description: India Launches UPI: భారతదేశం గ్రీస్‌లో యూనిఫైడ్ పేమెంట్స్ ఇంటర్‌ఫేస్ (UPI)ను ప్రారంభించిందని, ఇది దేశ డిజిటల్ చెల్లింపుల వ్యవస్థ యొక్క ప్రపంచవ్యాప్త విస్తరణలో మరో మైలురాయి...
content:
India Launches UPI: భారతదేశం గ్రీస్‌లో యూనిఫైడ్ పేమెంట్స్ ఇంటర్‌ఫేస్ (UPI)ను ప్రారంభించిందని, ఇది దేశ డిజిటల్ చెల్లింపుల వ్యవస్థ యొక్క ప్రపంచవ్యాప్త విస్తరణలో మరో మైలురాయి అని వాణిజ్య, పరిశ్రమల శాఖ మంత్రి పీయూష్ గోయల్ తెలిపారు. ఫ్రాన్స్‌లోని నైస్‌లో ఉన్న ప్రసిద్ధ డిపార్ట్‌మెంట్ స్టోర్ అయిన గ్యాలరీస్ లాఫాయెట్‌లో భారతదేశం UPIని ప్రారంభించిన కొన్ని వారాల తర్వాత ఇది జరిగింది. 2024లో, పారిస్‌లోని ఈఫిల్ టవర్‌లో UPIని ప్రారంభించారు. ఇప్పుడు గ్రీస్‌లో UPI అందుబాటులోకి రావడంతో, అర్హులైన వినియోగదారులు తక్షణమే, సురక్షితంగా మరియు ఎలాంటి ఆటంకాలు లేకుండా డబ్బును బదిలీ చేసుకోవచ్చని, లావాదేవీల ఖర్చులు సాంప్రదాయ బదిలీ ఖర్చులలో కొంత భాగానికి గణనీయంగా తగ్గుతాయని గోయల్ ఒక సోషల్ మీడియా పోస్ట్‌లో తెలిపారు.



Read Also: Imran Khan: ఇమ్రాన్ ఖాన్‌కు భారీ ఊరట.. అల్-ఖాదిర్ ట్రస్ట్ కేసులో కోర్టు కీలక తీర్పు



India Launches UPI



India Launches UPI: యూరోబ్యాంక్-ఎన్‌ఐపీఎల్ భాగస్వామ్యం



మంత్రి గారు అధికారిక పర్యటన నిమిత్తం గ్రీస్‌లోని ఏథెన్స్‌లో ఉన్నారు. "ఏథెన్స్‌లోని యూరోబ్యాంక్ ప్రధాన కార్యాలయంలో, యూరోబ్యాంక్ సీఈఓ శ్రీ ఫోకియన్ కరవియాస్ మరియు ఫెయిర్‌ఫాక్స్ డిజిటల్ సర్వీసెస్ సీఈఓ శ్రీ సంజయ్ తుగ్నైట్‌ల సమక్షంలో, యూపీఐ సేవలను ప్రారంభించే యూరోబ్యాంక్-ఎన్‌ఐపీఎల్ భాగస్వామ్యం యొక్క ప్రత్యక్ష ప్రదర్శనను వీక్షించడం నాకు చాలా ఆనందాన్నిచ్చింది. ఇది భారతదేశ డిజిటల్ చెల్లింపుల పర్యావరణ వ్యవస్థ యొక్క ప్రపంచవ్యాప్త విస్తరణలో మరో ముఖ్యమైన మైలురాయిని సూచిస్తుంది," అని ఆయన అన్నారు. యూపీఐకి ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా పెరుగుతున్న ఆమోదం మరియు ఆదరణ, సరిహద్దులకు అతీతంగా విలువను సృష్టించే సాంకేతికత ఆధారిత పరిష్కారాలను రూపొందించడంలో మరియు ఉమ్మడి వృద్ధి, శ్రేయస్సు కోసం భాగస్వామ్యాలను పెంపొందించడంలో భారతదేశ సామర్థ్యంపై ఉన్న నమ్మకాన్ని ప్రతిబింబిస్తున్నాయని ఆయన జోడించారు. గ్రీస్, సింగపూర్, యునైటెడ్ అరబ్ ఎమిరేట్స్, ఫ్రాన్స్, మారిషస్, నేపాల్, భూటాన్, ఖతార్, శ్రీలంక మరియు కంబోడియా అనే 10 దేశాలలో యూపీఐ ఇప్పుడు ఆమోదించబడింది. దీని ద్వారా భారతీయ ప్రయాణికులు సుపరిచితమైన ప్లాట్‌ఫారమ్‌ల ద్వారా విదేశాలలో సులభంగా చెల్లింపులు చేయడానికి వీలు కలుగుతోంది.

title: Germany's World Cup is over – Penalty shootout defeat against Paraguay
description: In their first match of the knockout stage against Paraguay, the German national team found themselves 0-1 down in the 42nd minute. Shortly before half-time, Felix Nmecha, who had started the match, m...
content: Germany's World Cup is over – Penalty shootout defeat against ParaguayIn their first match of the knockout stage against Paraguay, the German national team found themselves 0-1 down in the 42nd minute. Shortly before half-time, Felix Nmecha, who had started the match, missed a golden opportunity to equalise when he found himself unmarked. His deflected shot went wide of the left-hand post. It was the Borussia Dortmund player’s last involvement in the match; he was substituted after the break.Although Germany managed to equalise in the 54th minute, no further goals were scored in normal time, so the match went into extra time. In the 102nd minute, Germany took what appeared to be a 2-1 lead, but the referees ruled that Waldemar Anton had fouled the goalkeeper beforehand, so the goal was disallowed. The Borussia player had come on as a substitute in the 79th minute. Anton missed the chance to score the winner shortly before the end of extra time as his header from five yards out went straight at the opposition goalkeeper (119).In the penalty shoot-out, Germany lost 3-4 after missing three penalties, meaning the tournament is over for the team. Maxi Beier remained on the bench for the entire match, while Nico Schlotterbeck was sidelined through injury.This Tuesday evening, Julian Ryerson and Norway face the Ivory Coast, while Daniel Svensson plays for Sweden against France.

title: Casemiro: Man United’s call to end relationship under the spotlight
description: Manchester United have had several players, both current and former, involved in the World Cup knockout stages so far.Cunha had a quieter game despite an impressive tournament so far in Brazil’s dra...
content:
Casemiro: Man United’s call to end relationship under the spotlightManchester United have had several players, both current and former, involved in the World Cup knockout stages so far.Cunha had a quieter game despite an impressive tournament so far in Brazil’s dramatic 2-1 win over Japan, which secured their place in the last 16 of the competition.
New United signing Ederson was on the bench, but former United man Casemiro made the difference with an equalising goal in the second half.PerformanceRed Devils fans have grown accustomed to the Brazilian’s incredible aerial dominance, as he scored an impressive nine Premier League goals from defensive midfield last season.United will certainly miss his aerial presence in both defence and attack.Casemiro was given the player of the match award after his outstanding showing for his side.Aside from his goal, he completed 89% of his passes and an impressive 70% of his long ball attempts.He had two shots on goal and also missed another big chance to score in the game.Casemiro completed his only dribble attempt but missed his only tackle.The midfield general also won two aerial duels and two ground battles in the middle of the park.The former United man’s weaknesses were on full display, however, for Japan’s opener. Kaishu Sano easily breezed past Casemiro in the middle of the pitch and carried the ball forward with ease to score Japan’s opening strike.The ease with which Brazil’s midfield was cut open like a hot knife through butter highlights exactly why United decided it was time to move on from the Brazilian at the end of his contract.Right callAfter an emotional and successful last dance between Casemiro and United, there were calls for the midfielder to be offered an extension.Whilst United will certainly miss his aerial threat and leadership, they will benefit immensely from having more legs in the middle of the park next season.The Red Devils will hope the addition of Ederson and other midfield recruits allows them to play a more modern, high-pressing style of football that protects the backline and allows for greater fluidity in attack.Therefore, it was the right decision for everyone for Casemiro to continue his career in MLS with Inter Miami next season.Casemiro stats vs JapanFeatured image by Molly Darlington/Getty Imagesonline pollsThe Peoples Person has been one of the world’s leading Man United news sites for over a decade. Follow us on Bluesky: @peoplesperson.bsky.social

title: Weak Monsoon Alert: Sectors, stocks that could win and lose if rainfall stays below normal - HUL, Coromandel, M&M, Voltas, Nestle, Hero Motocorp & more in focus
description: Weak Monsoon Alert: Below-normal monsoon’s impact on several sectors, stocks: A rapidly intensifying Super El Niño has caused India's weakest monsoon start in ten years, keeping equity markets firmly in a holding pattern. The dry spell directly threatens the 56 per cent of India's GDP driven by consumer spending.
content: Weak Monsoon Alert: India’s next inflation threat is coming from the skies. At a time when easing oil prices have offered some relief to broader price pressures, a developing ‘Super El Niño’ now threatens the country’s crucial southwest monsoon and could push up food prices. Because the southwest monsoon accounts for about 70 per cent of India’s annual rainfall and any major deficit poses a direct risk to the $300 billion agricultural sector - potentially triggering food inflation, stifling rural demand, and dragging down overall economic output.IMD’s prediction for below-normal rainfallLast month, the India Meteorological Department (IMD) predicted below-normal rainfall over the country during the southwest monsoon season, between June and September.India’s cumulative rainfall between June 4 and June 28, 2026This year: 77.1 mmAverage: 141.4 mmRainfall Deficit: 45% A rapidly intensifying Super El Niño has caused India's weakest monsoon start in ten years, keeping equity markets firmly in a holding pattern. The dry spell directly threatens the 56 per cent of India's GDP driven by consumer spending.Below-normal monsoon’s impact on several sectors A below-normal monsoon, meanwhile, could have far-reaching implications for several sectors of the Indian economy, particularly those with strong rural exposure. However, certain summer consumption sectors could benefit from the situation.Impact of Below-Normal Monsoon Lower kharif sowingLower production of rain-fed crops such as rice, pulses and oilseedsHigher inflation (Lower production of crops --> Higher crop prices --> Higher inflation)Lower rural demand (Lower production of crops --> Lower rural income ---> Lower rural demand)Meanwhile, the biggest risk stems from lower agricultural output, which could weaken farm incomes, dampen rural consumption and reduce demand across multiple industries. Fertiliser companies, consumer goods manufacturers, tractor and two-wheeler makers and consumer durable firms are among the sectors that could be severely hit if rainfall remains deficient.Which sectors could take a hit, and which could see demand improve?A quick look through ET NOW’s sector-wise stock watchFertiliser companies may see demand slowdownCrop sowing and agricultural activities might get impacted due to a weak monsoon, which might ultimately reduce the demand for fertilisers. Companies such as Coromandel International and Paradeep Phosphates could face lower sales volumes if farmers cut back on fertiliser usage due to inadequate rainfall.Rural-focused FMCG players at riskFast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) companies with significant rural exposure may also lead to slower demand growth as lower farm incomes weigh on discretionary and daily household spending.Hindustan Unilever (HUL), Dabur, Marico and Godrej Consumer Products (GCPL) are among the FMCG companies that could see rural consumption moderate in the event of a poor monsoon.Tractor demand may lower Tractor sales, which are closely related to farm incomes and agricultural activities, could also come under pressure given the below-normal monsoon scenario.Manufacturers such as Escorts Kubota, Mahindra & Mahindra's tractor business, and VST Tillers Tractors may witness weaker demand if lower rainfall impacts crop production and farmers postpone capital expenditure.Two-wheeler sales could lose momentumThe rural market accounts for a significant share of two-wheeler sales in India. A below-normal monsoon could reduce disposable incomes in agricultural regions, affecting vehicle purchases.Companies including Hero MotoCorp, Bajaj Auto, TVS Motor Company and Eicher Motors may face demand headwinds if rural sentiment weakens.Consumer durable manufacturers may also be impactedVoltas, Blue Star and LG Electronics are among the consumer durable companies which could see slower rural demand for products like air conditioners, refrigerators and washing machines as household spending comes under pressure.Summer products-making companies may benefit At a time when several sectors could face challenges due to the deficit rainfall this year, companies benefiting from above-normal temperatures may see improved demand.Ice cream, beverages and dairy companies such as Dodla Dairy, Heritage Foods, Kwality Walls and Varun Beverages could benefit as hotter-than-normal weather boosts consumption of cold beverages, dairy products and frozen desserts.Hot beverage companies may witness seasonal pressureCompanies with major exposure to hot beverages, including Nestlé India and Tata Consumer Products, could see relatively lower demand if above-normal temperatures discourage consumption of tea and coffee during the summer months.SectorSubsectorCompanies ImpactedImpactRationaleFertiliser FertiliserCoromandel   International, Paradeep PhosphatesNegativeExpectations   of lower agricultural output --> Lower fertiliser demandFMCGDay-to-day   products HUL, Dabur,   Marico, Godrej Consumer ProductsNegativeLower   agricultural output --> Lower rural income --> Lower consumption demandAutoTractor Escorts   Kubota, M&M Tractor, VST Tillers TractorsNegativeLower agri   output --> Lower rural income --> Lower tractor demandSummer   ProductsIcecreams, dairy drinks, soft drinksDodla   Dairy, Heritage Foods, Kwality Walls, Varun Beverages PositiveBelow-Normal Monsoon --> Above-normal temperature --> Higher demand   for summer productsAuto Two wheelersHero, Bajaj   Auto, TVS, EicherNegativeLower agri   output --> Lower rural income --> Lower 2W demandConsumer   Durables ACs, refrigeratorsVoltas,   Blue Star, LG Electronics IndiaNegativeLower agri   output --> Lower rural income --> Lower demandHot   BeveragesCoffee, teaNestle,   Tata ConsumerNegativeBelow   Normal Monsoon --> Above normal temperature --> Lower demand   for hot productsChallenges faced by rural farming economy currently Higher input costs (especially fertiliser required for farming)Prices of key raw materials (ammonia, phosphoric acid, sulphur) have risenAnd now expectations of below-normal 2026 monsoonKey takeaways A below-normal monsoon does not equally affect all sectors. While agriculture-linked companies and businesses dependent on rural consumption are likely to face headwinds, firms engaged in producing summer-related products may benefit from higher temperatures.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)

title: A goal, a prayer and a standing ovation for Cody Gakpo amid personal grief
description: After scoring in the 72nd minute, Cody Gakpo immediately sank to his knees.  On Saturday, Gakpo and his partner, model Noa van der Bij, announced the death of their unborn child.  Despite the grief, Gakpo was determined to continue on in the tournament.
content: GUADALUPE, Mexico (AP) — After scoring in the 72nd minute, Cody Gakpo immediately sank to his knees.As his teammates immediately rushed toward him in celebration, the 27-year-old forward covered his face while weeping, later pointing to the sky and appearing to pray.While this marked Gakpo’s third goal of the World Cup, this goal in the Round of 32 loss to Morocco on Monday was especially emotional for him.On Saturday, Gakpo and his partner, model Noa van der Bij, announced the death of their unborn child.Despite the grief, Gakpo was determined to continue on in the tournament.“I think he dealt with it very well,” Netherlands head coach Ronald Koeman had said before the game. “There was never a moment where he said he wanted to leave the squad and go home. That says a lot about his maturity and the way in which he can deal with this."And just as Gakpo has been a key contributor for the Oranje, his teammates have been there to support him and his family during this difficult time.“The most important thing is to ask, ‘What do you need?’” Netherlands captain Virgil van Dijk said. “It’s awful news, and reminds us that football is secondary and there are much more important things in life.”In the 113th minute, Gakpo was substituted off for Justin Kluivert.As he walked off the pitch, the Netherlands fans in a section behind the goal immediately rose for a standing ovation. As Gakpo rounded the corner toward the bench, the applause only grew louder — a show of appreciation for someone who showed up for his team while dealing with tragedy.___Maya Koluder-Ramirez is a student in the University of Georgia’s Carmical Sports Media Institute. ____See more of AP’s World Cup coverage here

title: यवतमाल में शाहू महाराज जयंती पर मेधावी विद्यार्थियों का सम्मान, नशामुक्ति रैली भी निकाली गई
description: Yavatmal Social Justice Day: यवतमाल में सामाजिक न्याय दिवस समारोह में पालकमंत्री संजय राठौड़ ने शाहू महाराज के जीवन से प्रेरणा लेने की अपील की। मेधावी विद्यार्थियों को पुरस्कार भी दिए गए।
content:
Yavatmal Shahu Maharaj Social Justice Day: राजर्षि छत्रपति शाहू महाराज की समाजसेवा आज भी प्रेरणादायी है। उनके जीवन चरित्र का अध्ययन आज की युवा पीढ़ी को अवश्य करना चाहिए। जो राजर्षि छत्रपति शाहू महाराज को समझ लेगा, वह निश्चित रूप से महाराष्ट्र को भी समझ सकेगा। यह प्रतिपादन जिले के पालकमंत्री संजय राठौड़ ने किया। वे राजर्षि शाहू महाराज की जयंती के अवसर पर सामाजिक न्याय एवं विशेष सहायता विभाग द्वारा जिला परिषद के वसंतराव नाईक सभागार में आयोजित सामाजिक न्याय दिवस समारोह तथा नशामुक्ति सप्ताह के समापन कार्यक्रम में मुख्य अतिथि के रूप में बोल रहे थे।
इस अवसर पर उप मुख्य कार्यकारी अधिकारी संतोष धोत्रे, युवराज मेहेत्रे, जालिंदर आभाळे, समाज कल्याण सहायक आयुक्त मंगला मुन, शिक्षा अधिकारी किशोर पागोरे, पूर्व जिला परिषद सदस्य यशवंत पवार, श्रीधर मोहोड, हरिहर लिंगमवार सहित अनेक गणमान्य व्यक्ति उपस्थित थे।
संजय राठौड़ ने  राजर्षि शाहू महाराज को श्रद्धांजलि
पालकमंत्री संजय राठौड़ ने राजर्षि शाहू महाराज को श्रद्धांजलि अर्पित करते हुए कहा कि वे सच्चे अर्थों में प्रजा के राजा थे। उन्होंने सदैव जनहित को सर्वोच्च प्राथमिकता देते हुए शासन चलाया। वे सामाजिक न्याय और आरक्षण व्यवस्था के वास्तविक जनक थे। उन्होंने पिछड़े वर्गों को शासकीय सेवाओं में आरक्षण देने का ऐतिहासिक निर्णय लिया, शिक्षा का व्यापक प्रसार किया तथा बहुजन समाज को सशक्त बनाया। इसके साथ ही अस्पृश्यता उन्मूलन, महिलाओं के सम्मान, किसानों और कमजोर वर्गों के आर्थिक उत्थान के लिए अनेक कल्याणकारी योजनाएं लागू कीं। उन्होंने डॉ. बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर को भी हर समय सहयोग प्रदान किया।
इस अवसर पर उप मुख्य कार्यकारी अधिकारी संतोष धोत्रे ने राजर्षि शाहू महाराज के जीवन एवं कार्यों पर विस्तार से प्रकाश डाला। कार्यक्रम का प्रास्ताविक समाज कल्याण सहायक आयुक्त मंगला मुन ने किया तथा आभार प्रदर्शन योगेश मेहेत्रे ने किया।
मेधावी विद्यार्थियों को गुणवत्ता पुरस्कार प्रदान
पालकमंत्री के हाथों मेधावी विद्यार्थियों को राजर्षि शाहू महाराज गुणवत्ता पुरस्कार प्रदान किए गए। समाज कल्याण विभाग के अंतर्गत संचालित विद्यालयों में उत्कृष्ट प्रदर्शन करने वाले अनुसूचित जनजाति वर्ग के मेधावी विद्यार्थियों को यह पुरस्कार दिए गए। साथ ही स्वाधार योजना के लाभार्थियों तथा विवाद निवारण के क्षेत्र में उल्लेखनीय कार्य करने वाले व्यक्तियों का पालकमंत्री संजय राठौड़ के हाथों प्रशस्ति पत्र एवं स्मृति चिह्न देकर सम्मान किया गया।
यह भी पढ़ेंः-  कहाँ से आए तुम…नागपुर में बादलों की मेहरबानी, शाम की बारिश से उमस भरी गर्मी से मिली राहत 
कार्यक्रम में सामाजिक न्याय दिवस उत्साहपूर्वक मनाया गया। इससे पूर्व, अंतरराष्ट्रीय नशामुक्ति एवं अवैध मादक पदार्थ तस्करी विरोधी दिवस के अवसर पर समाज कल्याण विभाग तथा &#8216;मेरा युवा भारत&#8217; कार्यालय द्वारा शहर में एक जनजागरूकता बाइक रैली भी निकाली गई थी।

title: 'Forget The Name On The Letterhead': US Envoy Says India-US Defence Ties Speak For Themselves
description: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor has dismissed concerns over the restoration of the US Indo-Pacific Command's previous name, saying the "name on the letterhead" is far less important than the substance of India-US cooperation.
content: United States Ambassador to India Sergio Gor has sought to put to rest the controversy surrounding the renaming of the US Indo-Pacific Command, arguing that the focus should remain on the strength of India-US defence cooperation rather than the title of a military command. Speaking at the US-India Strategic Partnership Forum (USISPF) Leadership Summit, Gor said critics had attached undue significance to the restoration of the command's previous name and stressed that practical military cooperation between the two countries remains stronger than ever.'Look At What The United States Is Actually Doing'Addressing the controversy, Gor said the change in name had no bearing on Washington's commitment to its strategic partnership with India. "I just want to mention something because a lot of individuals made hay over a name change. I don't care what name is on a letterhead, but look at what the United States is actually doing," he said.The ambassador pointed to the extensive military engagement between the two countries, noting that India conducts more military exercises with the United States than any other nation. "Yes, the name changed; we're still there. India still has more exercises with the United States than any other country by far. Every single month there's something happening, whether it's Indian troops coming here or whether it's US troops going into the region," Gor said.Why The Renaming Triggered DebateThe remarks come after the United States restored the original name of its Pacific Command, reversing a change made during President Donald Trump's first term. Originally established in 1947, the command had long been known as the US Pacific Command. In 2018, it was renamed the US Indo-Pacific Command to reflect India's growing strategic importance and Washington's broader Indo-Pacific strategy aimed at maintaining a free and open region.The recent decision to revert to the earlier name prompted debate among strategic observers, with some interpreting it as a possible downgrading of India's role in US regional strategy. Gor, however, rejected that interpretation.Defence Partnership Remains StrongThe ambassador said the operational reality demonstrates that India-US defence ties continue to deepen regardless of administrative nomenclature. He highlighted the frequency of bilateral military exchanges, regular visits by senior defence officials and ongoing joint exercises across all three services.Gor also revealed that an Indian Navy delegation is scheduled to visit the United States within the next two weeks, underscoring the continued momentum in bilateral defence cooperation.'Relationship Is On Strong Footing'Rejecting speculation that India-US relations have weakened, Gor said the partnership continues to expand across multiple sectors. "So to all those pundits that sit online and tweet and say this relationship is in trouble, when you look at the facts of where this relationship stands, whether it's trade, whether it's defence, whether it's the people-to-people ties, the relationship is on strong footing," he said.According to Gor, President Donald Trump continues to place significant importance on ties with India and remains committed to expanding cooperation in trade, technology, defence and investment. His remarks reinforce the US position that, despite the debate over the command's title, strategic engagement with India remains a central pillar of Washington's regional policy.

title: इंग्लैंड में टीबी से मौत पर चौंकाने वाला खुलासा, हर हफ्ते समय पर पहचान न होने से जा रही एक जान
description:
इंग्लैंड में टीबी से मौत को लेकर एक नया खुलासा किया गया है। एक नए अध्ययन में सामने आया है कि इंग्लैंड में हर सप्ताह एक व्यक्ति की तपेदिक (टीबी) का समय पर पता न चल पाने के कारण मौत हो जाती है। ऐसे मामलों में बीमारी का पता केवल मृत्यु के बाद (पोस्टमार्टम के.
The post इंग्लैंड में टीबी से मौत पर चौंकाने वाला खुलासा, हर हफ्ते समय पर पहचान न होने से जा रही एक जान appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
इंग्लैंड में टीबी से मौत को लेकर एक नया खुलासा किया गया है। एक नए अध्ययन में सामने आया है कि इंग्लैंड में हर सप्ताह एक व्यक्ति की तपेदिक (टीबी) का समय पर पता न चल पाने के कारण मौत हो जाती है। ऐसे मामलों में बीमारी का पता केवल मृत्यु के बाद (पोस्टमार्टम के दौरान) चलता है, जिससे मरीज को इलाज का अवसर ही नहीं मिल पाता।
यह शोध जर्नल थोरेक्स में प्रकाशित किया गया है। शोधकर्ताओं के अनुसार, ब्रिटेन में जन्मे और अधिक उम्र के पुरुषों में मृत्यु के बाद टीबी की पहचान हो पाई। इससे संकेत मिलता है कि स्वास्थ्यकर्मी इन मरीजों में टीबी की आशंका को लेकर पर्याप्त ध्यान नहीं दे रहे हैं।
विशेषज्ञों ने कहा कि मृत्यु के बाद टीबी का पता चलना एक “नेवर इवेंट” माना जाना चाहिए, यानी ऐसी घटना जो किसी भी हालत में नहीं होनी चाहिए और जिसकी तत्काल जांच होनी चाहिए। उन्होंने इसे “निदान में सबसे बड़ी देरी” बताया।
इंग्लैंड में टीबी के मामलों की दर पिछले 10 वर्षों में सबसे अधिक हो गई है। वर्ष 2024 में प्रति एक लाख आबादी पर 9.4 मामले दर्ज किए गए, जो विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन (डब्ल्यूएचओ) के निर्धारित “कम संक्रमण वाले देश” की सीमा के बेहद करीब है।
ये भी पढे़ं :-  https://dainiksaveratimes.com/national/low-blood-pressure-linked-to-alzheimers/
मीडिया आउटलेट द गार्डियन के मुताबिक, आमतौर पर इंग्लैंड में टीबी के अधिकांश मरीज विदेश में जन्मे होते हैं और उनकी औसत आयु 36 वर्ष होती है। लेकिन थोरेक्स जर्नल में प्रकाशित इस अध्ययन में पाया गया कि मृत्यु के बाद जिन लोगों में टीबी की पहचान हुई, वे ज्यादातर ब्रिटेन में जन्मे और अधिक उम्र के थे।
अध्ययन की सह-लेखिका और लिवरपूल यूनिवर्सिटी हॉस्पिटल्स एनएचएस फाउंडेशन ट्रस्ट की रेजिडेंट डॉक्टर डॉ. एलेनोर मॉर्गन के अनुसार, “जब टीबी के मामले लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं, तब हमें हर मरीज के बारे में यह सवाल पूछते रहना चाहिए ‘क्या यह टीबी हो सकती है?’ भले ही वह सामान्य जोखिम वाले समूह में न आता हो।”
अध्ययन में पाया गया कि मृत्यु के बाद टीबी की पहचान उन लोगों में अधिक हुई जो लंदन के बाहर रहते थे और जिनका शराब या नशीले पदार्थों के सेवन का इतिहास था।
इसके अलावा, चार वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों में भी जोखिम अधिक पाया गया। शोधकर्ताओं के अनुसार, इसका कारण उनका अपरिपक्व प्रतिरक्षा तंत्र, सामान्य जैसे दिखने वाले लक्षण और छोटे बच्चों से जांच के लिए नमूने लेना कठिन होना हो सकता है।
टीबी आज भी दुनिया की सबसे घातक संक्रामक बीमारी बनी हुई है। वर्ष 2024 में लगभग 12.3 लाख लोगों की मौत टीबी से हुई, जबकि 1.07 करोड़ लोग इस बीमारी से संक्रमित हुए।
हालांकि, टीबी रोकथाम योग्य और पूरी तरह इलाज योग्य बीमारी है। विशेष एंटीबायोटिक दवाओं से इसका उपचार संभव है, और हाल के वर्षों में नई दवाओं की मदद से, यहां तक कि दवा-प्रतिरोधी टीबी के इलाज की अवधि भी काफी कम हुई है।
अध्ययन के वरिष्ठ लेखक और लिवरपूल स्कूल ऑफ ट्रॉपिकल मेडिसिन के डॉ. टॉम विंगफील्ड ने अपने शोध पत्र में कहा कि जिस तरह एमआरएसए या क्लॉस्ट्रिडियोइड्स डिफिसाइल जैसे सुपरबग से होने वाली मौतों की एनएचएस में नियमित जांच होती है, उसी तरह टीबी से जुड़ी हर मौत की भी गहन जांच होनी चाहिए ताकि भविष्य में ऐसी मौतों को रोका जा सके।
उन्होंने कहा कि इंग्लैंड में टीबी के बढ़ते मामले चिंता का विषय हैं क्योंकि बीमारी का देर से पता चलने पर मरीज की स्वास्थ्य, सामाजिक और आर्थिक स्थिति पर गंभीर असर पड़ता है और संक्रमण दूसरों तक फैलने की संभावना भी बढ़ जाती है। हालांकि उन्होंने स्पष्ट किया कि यह घबराने की बात नहीं है, क्योंकि टीबी का सफल इलाज संभव है।
The post इंग्लैंड में टीबी से मौत पर चौंकाने वाला खुलासा, हर हफ्ते समय पर पहचान न होने से जा रही एक जान appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Amarnath Yatra secured by multi-layered security system, says IGP Birdi
Vistadome Special train to run only between Banihal and Budgam during Amarnath Yatra
description:
Banihal, June 30: In view of security arrangements and crowd management measures for the upcoming Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra (SANJY)-2026, Northern Railway has decided to temporarily short-terminate and short-originate the popular Vistadome Special train service operating between Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Katra and Budgam.
As per an official communication issued by Northern Railway’s Firozpur Division, Train No. 04688/04687 SVDK–BDGM–SVDK Vistadome Special will operate only between Banihal (BAHL) and Budgam (BDGM) from July 1 to August 31, 2026, or until further orders.
The decision has been taken following security inputs and recommendations conveyed by the Jammu and Kashmir Police Headquarters, Srinagar, aimed at facilitating smooth security arrangements and avoiding crowd-management challenges during the pilgrimage period.
The railway authorities stated that the train service will continue to operate on the Banihal-Budgam section during the period, while operations on the remaining stretch will remain temporarily suspended.
The Vistadome train, known for its panoramic glass windows and scenic journey through the Kashmir Valley, is a popular attraction among tourists and passengers. Railway authorities are expected to review the arrangement after the completion of the peak Yatra period.

description: The shipping behemoth’s move is billed as the largest foreign private investment in domestic port infrastructure in India

title: 'Staying away from the middle will be hardest': Sachin Tendulkar's emotional message to Ben Stokes after retirement
description: Sachin Tendulkar led heartfelt tributes to Ben Stokes following his retirement from international cricket. Tendulkar lauded Stokes' fearless approach, match-winning ability, and inspirational leadership, calling him one of England's finest all-rounders and captains. Stokes, who bowed out after a Test series loss, expressed contentment with his decision, citing years of physical and mental demands as the primary reason for stepping away.
content: NEW DELHI: Indian batting legend Sachin Tendulkar led tributes to Ben Stokes after the England great announced his retirement from international cricket, praising his fearless approach, match-winning temperament and inspirational leadership in an emotional social media post.Stokes confirmed that the third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge would be the final international appearance of his illustrious 15-year career, bringing the curtain down on one of the most influential careers in modern cricket.Reacting to the announcement, Tendulkar hailed Stokes for the energy and intensity he brought to every contest while acknowledging the immense impact he had as both an all-rounder and captain."@benstokes38, I've always admired the way you brought energy into the game. Your positivity, your fearless intent, and the way you shaped moments under pressure stood out every time you walked in," Tendulkar wrote on X.The Indian legend went on to describe Stokes as one of England's finest all-rounders."As an all-rounder, you've been one of England's finest, and as a captain, your bold tactics and instinctive reading of the game added a new edge to your side."Tendulkar concluded with a heartfelt farewell while adding a touch of humour."Wishing you the very best for what comes next. Though knowing you, staying away from the middle might be the hardest part. Good luck for your next innings!"— sachin_rt (@sachin_rt) Stokes signs off with no regretsStokes' farewell, however, ended in disappointment as Tom Latham's New Zealand completed a 160-run victory at Trent Bridge to seal the three-match series 2-1. It was the first home Test series defeat of Stokes' career as both player and captain.Despite the result, the 35-year-old insisted he was completely at peace with his decision."I'm done, mate, and I'm very happy," Stokes told the BBC after the match.The England star admitted the decision had taken months of thought and discussions with those closest to him."I am incredibly content with everything right now. It's a decision that you don't take lightly. It has taken a lot of time."Stokes also acknowledged that a turbulent few weeks, including disciplinary controversy following England's victory at Lord's, "maybe" influenced the timing of his retirement, but stressed that years of physical and mental demands had ultimately taken their toll. 132087544"Over the last 6-12 months I think everything that I've done over a long period of time has taken its toll," he said.Having captained England through the transformative "Bazball" era and played starring roles in the country's 2019 ODI World Cup and 2022 T20 World Cup triumphs, Stokes leaves the international stage as one of England's defining cricketers.

title: Kshatriya Parishad | చరిత్రను రాజకీయాలకు వాడుకోవద్దు.. అజయ్ దేవ్‌గణ్ ‘చౌహాన్’ చిత్రంపై క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ ఆగ్రహం
description: Chauhaan Movie | బాలీవుడ్ నటుడు అజయ్ దేవ్‌గణ్ ప్రధాన పాత్రలో, దర్శకుడు నీరజ్ యాదవ్ తెరకెక్కిస్తున్న 'చౌహాన్' (Chauhaan) సినిమా టీజర్ విడుదలైన కొన్ని రోజుల్లోనే తీవ్ర వివాదంలో చిక్కుకుంది.
content:
Chauhaan Movie | బాలీవుడ్ నటుడు అజయ్ దేవ్‌గణ్ ప్రధాన పాత్రలో, దర్శకుడు నీరజ్ యాదవ్ తెరకెక్కిస్తున్న ‘చౌహాన్’ (Chauhaan) సినిమా టీజర్ విడుదలైన కొన్ని రోజుల్లోనే తీవ్ర వివాదంలో చిక్కుకుంది. ఈ సినిమాపై క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ (Kshatriya Parishad) తీవ్ర అభ్యంతరం వ్యక్తం చేస్తూ ఒక బహిరంగ లేఖను విడుదల చేసింది. ముఖ్యంగా ఈ చిత్ర టీజర్‌లో అజయ్ దేవ్‌గణ్ పలికిన “పఠానులకు చెప్పండి, చౌహాన్ వస్తున్నాడు” అనే వివాదాస్పద డైలాగ్ సోషల్ మీడియా వేదికగా పెను దుమారాన్ని రేపుతోంది. కాశ్మీర్ నేపథ్యంలో సాగే ఈ సినిమాలో పెల్లెట్ గన్‌ల వాడకంపై ఉన్న సంభాషణలు, మతపరమైన అంశాలు సమాజంలో విద్వేషాలను రెచ్చగొట్టేలా ఉన్నాయని నెటిజన్లతో పాటు నటి స్వరా భాస్కర్ వంటి పలువురు ప్రముఖులు సైతం ఇప్పటికే విమర్శలు గుప్పించారు. ఈ క్రమంలోనే తాజాగా క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ ఈ చిత్రంపై తీవ్ర అభ్యంతరం వ్యక్తం చేస్తూ ఒక సుదీర్ఘ బహిరంగ లేఖను విడుదల చేయడం సినిమా పరిశ్రమలో మరియు రాజకీయ వర్గాలలో తీవ్ర సంచలనంగా మారింది.
క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ తమ ప్రకటనలో ఈ చిత్రాన్ని తీవ్రంగా ఖండిస్తూ.. ప్రస్తుత సమాజంలో స్వార్థపూరిత రాజకీయ లబ్ధి కోసం, ఓట్ల వేట కోసం చౌహాన్ వంశం పేరును మరియు రాజ్‌పుత్ సమాజ అస్తిత్వాన్ని వాడుకోవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తున్నారని మండిపడింది. రాజ్‌పుత్ చరిత్ర అనేది ఎన్నికల ప్రచారాలకు లేదా బాధ్యతారహితమైన మీడియా సంచలనాలకు వాడుకునే రాజకీయ వస్తువు కాదని వారు స్పష్టం చేశారు. చిత్ర నిర్మాతలు కేవలం వివాదాలు సృష్టించి లాభపడాలనే ఉద్దేశంతోనే ఇలాంటి సున్నితమైన అంశాలను తెరపైకి తెస్తున్నారని ఆగ్రహం వ్యక్తం చేశారు. ప్రస్తుతం ప్రధాన మీడియాలో మరియు బహిరంగ చర్చల్లో రాజ్‌పుత్‌ల‌ గొంతుకకు సరైన ప్రాతినిధ్యం లేని సమయంలో, కేవలం సమాజంలో కుల, మతపరమైన ఉద్రిక్తతలను రేకెత్తించడానికి ఒక చారిత్రక వంశం పేరును వాడుకోవడం అత్యంత బాధ్యతారాహిత్యమైన మరియు అవమానకరమైన చర్య అని లేఖలో పేర్కొన్నారు.
భారతదేశ మధ్యయుగ చరిత్రను కేవలం మతపరమైన రెండు విరుద్ధ కోణాల్లో విభజించి చూపించడం చిత్ర బృందం యొక్క తీవ్రమైన అజ్ఞానాన్ని సూచిస్తుందని ఈ సంద‌ర్భంగా క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ ఘాటుగా విమర్శించింది. మన దేశ చరిత్రలో ఎన్నో గొప్ప చారిత్రక ఘట్టాలు ఉన్నాయని, ఆ కాలంలో యుద్ధాలు మరియు కూటములు అనేవి కేవలం సామ్రాజ్య విస్తరణ, రాజ్యతంత్రం, వ్యూహాలు మరియు స్వామిభక్తి ఆధారంగా జరిగాయి తప్ప మతాల ప్రాతిపదికన కాదని వారు గుర్తుచేశారు. ఇందుకు బలమైన చారిత్రక సాక్ష్యాలను కూడా వారు తమ లేఖలో ప్రస్తావించారు. ఖన్వా యుద్ధంలో మహమూద్ లోడీ అనే ముస్లిం పాలకుడు హిందూ రాజైన మహారాణా సంగ్రామ్ సింగ్ (రాణా సంగా) నాయకత్వంలో పోరాడారని వివరించారు. అలాగే చారిత్రాత్మక హల్దీఘాట్ యుద్ధంలో మహారాణా ప్రతాప్ సైన్యంలోని ఒక కీలక విభాగానికి హకీమ్ ఖాన్ సూర్ కమాండర్‌గా వ్యవహరించారని గుర్తుచేశారు. తర్వాతి కాలంలో శేర్ షా సూరిగా మారిన ఫరీద్ ఖాన్ సైతం తన తొలి కెరీర్‌లో రాజా రైసల్ శేఖావత్ వద్దే సైనిక సేవలు అందించారని, మొదటి పానిపట్టు యుద్ధంలో మహారాజా విక్రమాదిత్య తోమర్ లోడీ సైన్యంతో కలిసి ఉమ్మడిగా పోరాడి వీరమరణం పొందారని పేర్కొంటూ, నాటి హిందూ-ముస్లిం వీరుల సఖ్యతను చాటిచెప్పారు.
చారిత్రక సత్యాలు ఇలా ఉంటే, నేటి తరం రాజకీయ ప్రయోజనాల కోసం చరిత్రను వికృతంగా మార్చడం సరికాదని క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ హెచ్చరించింది. చారిత్రక జ్ఞాపకాలను మత సమీకరణల కోసం ఒక సాధనంగా మార్చవద్దని వారు పిలుపునిచ్చారు. రాజకీయ నాయకులు, చలనచిత్ర నిర్మాతలు మరియు మీడియా సంస్థలు భారతదేశ వైవిధ్యభరితమైన గత చరిత్రను ఎంతో బాధ్యతాయుతంగా, దానిలోని సంక్లిష్టతలను గౌరవిస్తూ చూపించాలి తప్ప, రాజ్‌పుత్ వారసత్వాన్ని వివాదాలకు ఎరగా వేయకూడదని డిమాండ్ చేశారు. అయితే ఈ మొత్తం వివాదంపై మరియు క్షత్రియ పరిషత్ లేఖపై చౌహాన్ చిత్ర యూనిట్ కానీ, హీరో అజయ్ దేవ్‌గణ్ కానీ ఇప్పటివరకు ఎలాంటి అధికారిక వివరణ ఇవ్వలేదు.

title: ‘Aawarapan 2’ का टीज़र रिलीज, दिशा पाटनी के ‘दिलकश’ अंदाज़ पर फिदा हुए फैंस
description:
लाल रंग की खूबसूरत ड्रेस में, सेलो बजाते हुए दिशा का ये अंदाज़… क्या कहें पूरी तरह से सॉफ्ट, एलिगेंट और दिल को छू जाने वाला।
The post ‘Aawarapan 2’ का टीज़र रिलीज, दिशा पाटनी के ‘दिलकश’ अंदाज़ पर फिदा हुए फैंस appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
एंटरटेनमेंट डेस्क: लाल रंग की खूबसूरत ड्रेस में, सेलो बजाते हुए दिशा का ये अंदाज़… क्या कहें पूरी तरह से सॉफ्ट, एलिगेंट और दिल को छू जाने वाला। इस बार न कोई हाई-ऑक्टेन एक्शन, न कोई तेज़-तर्रार एंट्री… बल्कि एक ऐसा किरदार जो शांत है, गहरा है और इमोशन्स से भरा हुआ है।
टीज़र देखकर साफ लग रहा है कि आवारापन 2 सिर्फ एक फिल्म नहीं, बल्कि एक इमोशनल लव स्टोरी होने वाली है और दिशा इस कहानी के दिल में बसी हुई हैं।
दिलचस्प बात ये है कि मेकर्स ने जानबूझकर दिशा के किरदार को पूरी तरह सीक्रेट रखा है। फिल्म से जुड़े एक सूत्र ने बताया, “दिशा का किरदार इस कहानी की इमोशनल जान है। अगर अभी ज्यादा दिखा दिया, तो कहानी के बड़े राज खुल जाएंगे। टीज़र सिर्फ उनके वजूद और उनकी दुनिया की झलक देने के लिए है। जैसे-जैसे फिल्म आगे बढ़ेगी, दर्शकों को समझ आएगा कि उनका रोल कितना खास है।”
दिशा पाटनी और Emraan Hashmi की जोड़ी ने पहले ही फैंस में जबरदस्त एक्साइटमेंट पैदा कर दी है। ऊपर से आवारापन की अपनी एक कल्ट फैन फॉलोइंग है, तो अब उम्मीदें और भी हाई हैं। सोशल मीडिया पर दिशा के इस नए लुक को लेकर खूब तारीफ हो रही है। कई लोग इसे उनका अब तक का सबसे दिलचस्प अवतार बता रहे हैं।
आवारापन 2 अपने पहले टीज़र से ही चर्चा में आ गई है। इतना तय है कि दिशा पाटनी अब सिर्फ ग्लैमर नहीं, बल्कि समझदारी से चुने हुए और चुनौतीपूर्ण किरदारों के जरिए अपने करियर को एक नई ऊंचाई देने की कोशिश कर रही हैं।
The post ‘Aawarapan 2’ का टीज़र रिलीज, दिशा पाटनी के ‘दिलकश’ अंदाज़ पर फिदा हुए फैंस appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: AP News | రైల్వేస్టేష‌న్‌లో పాములు.. ప్రయాణికులు బెంబేలు..!
description: AP News |  ఆంధ్ర‌ప్ర‌దేశ్ రాష్ట్రం కాకినాడ జిల్లా తుని రైల్వేస్టేషన్‌లో పాముల సంచారం కలకలం రేపింది. టికెట్‌ కౌంటర్, పార్సిల్ కార్యాలయం, ప్లాట్‌ఫామ్‌పై ప్రయాణికులు వేచి ఉండే గదిలో పాములు సంచరిస్తున్నాయి. దాంతో ప్ర‌యాణికులు భయాందోళనకు గురవుతున్నారు. కొద్ది రోజులుగా వర్షాలు కురుస్తుండటంతో సమీపంలోని తుప్పలు, చెట్ల వద్ద ఉన్న పుట్టల్లోంచి పాములు బయటకు వస్తున్నాయి.
content:
AP News : ఆంధ్ర‌ప్ర‌దేశ్ రాష్ట్రం కాకినాడ జిల్లా తుని రైల్వేస్టేషన్‌లో పాముల సంచారం కలకలం రేపింది. టికెట్‌ కౌంటర్, పార్సిల్ కార్యాలయం, ప్లాట్‌ఫామ్‌పై ప్రయాణికులు వేచి ఉండే గదిలో పాములు సంచరిస్తున్నాయి. దాంతో ప్ర‌యాణికులు భయాందోళనకు గురవుతున్నారు. కొద్ది రోజులుగా వర్షాలు కురుస్తుండటంతో సమీపంలోని తుప్పలు, చెట్ల వద్ద ఉన్న పుట్టల్లోంచి పాములు బయటకు వస్తున్నాయి.
రైల్వేస్టేషన్‌లోకి వ‌చ్చిన‌ పాములను చూసి ప్రయాణికులు కేకలు వేయడంతో సిబ్బంది కొన్నింటిని పట్టుకున్నారు. స్టేషన్ ప్రాంగణంలో పాత భవనాలు, దశాబ్దాల నాటి అనేక చెట్లు ఉన్నాయని, వాటిలో పాములు స్థావ‌రం ఏర్పాటు చేసుకున్నాయ‌ని అధికారులు తెలిపారు. కాగా విషసర్పాలు రైల్వేస్టేష‌న్ లోప‌లికి రాకుండా అధికారులు చర్యలు తీసుకోవాలని ప్రయాణికులు కోరుతున్నారు.

Morocco Win: ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌, ମରକ୍କୋ ମାରିନେଲା ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ବିଜୟ
description:
ଗୁଆଡାଲୁପ୍‌ (ମେକ୍ସିକୋ): ବ୍ରାଜିଲ ବର୍ତିଗଲା, କିନ୍ତୁ ଜର୍ମାନୀ ଭଳି ଅନ୍ୟତମ ୟୁରୋପୀୟ ଶକ୍ତିନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡସ ମଧ୍ୟ ‌ଚଳିତ ଫିଫାବିଶ୍ବକପ୍‌ରୁ ନକ୍‌ ଆଉଟ୍‌ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସକୁ ପୋନଲ୍ଟିରେ ୩-୨ରେ ହରାଇ ଉତ୍ତର ଆଫ୍ରିକୀୟ ଦେଶ ମରକ୍କୋ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ୍‌ ଅଫ୍‌ ୧୬ (ପ୍ରି-କ୍ବାର୍ଟରଫାଇନାଲ୍‌) ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ଅର୍ଜନ କରି ନେଇଛି। ଜର୍ମାନୀ-ପାରାଗୁଏ ଭଳି ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ମଧ୍ୟ ୧୨୦ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ସଂଘର୍ଷ ପରେପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଫଳାଫଳରେ ନିର୍ଣ୍ଣୟ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ନିୟମିତ ସମୟରେ ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ମଧ୍ୟ ସମାନ ୧-୧ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ଡ୍ର’ ରହିଥିଲା। ବିଜୟ ସହ ପ୍ରି-କ୍ବାର୍ଟରଫାଇନାଲ୍‌ରେ ମରକ୍କୋ ଜୁଲାଇ ୪ ତାରିଖରେ କାନାଡ଼ା ସହ ଖେଳିବା ଧାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି।
ପ୍ରି-କ୍ବାର୍ଟରଫାଇନାଲ୍‌ରେ ମରକ୍କୋ କାନାଡ଼ା ସହ ଖେଳିବ
ମେକ୍ସିକୋର ମଣ୍ଟେରି ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମ୍‌ରେ ଖେଳାଯାଇଥିବା ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଆକ୍ରମଣ, ପ୍ରତିଆକ୍ରମଣ ଏବଂ ଦୃଢ଼ ରକ୍ଷଣଭାଗର ନିଖୁଣ ନିଦର୍ଶନ ଦେଖାଇଥିଲା। ତେବେ ୭୧ତମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଉଭୟ ଦଳ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଦେବାରେ ନିଷ୍ଫଳ ରହିଥିଲେ। ୭୨ତମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞ ଷ୍ଟ୍ରାଇକର୍‌ କୋଡି ଗାକ୍‌ପୋଙ୍କ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ନେଇଯାଇଥିଲା। ତାଙ୍କ ଦଳ ମଧ୍ୟ ବିଜୟଦ୍ବାରରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଯାଇଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ଷ୍ଟପେଜ୍‌ ଟାଇମ୍‌ରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ବଦଳ ଖେଳାଳି ଈଶା ଡିଅପ୍‌ (୯୦+୧ ମିନିଟ୍‌)ଙ୍କ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଏହି ଦଳର ଆଶାରେ ପାଣି ଭରି ଦେଇଥିଲା। ଶେଷକୁ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ୩୦ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ଗୋଲଶୂନ୍ୟ ରହିଥିଲା। ସୁଟ୍‌ ଆଉଟ୍‌ ବେଳକୁ ଉଭୟ ଦଳ ତାଳମେଳ ଦେଇ ଚାଲିଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ କ୍ରିସେନ୍‌ସିଓ ସୁମରଭିଲେଙ୍କ ପେନାଲ୍ଟିକୁ ମରକ୍କୋ ଗୋଲରକ୍ଷକ ୟାସିନ୍‌ ବୋନୋଉ ରୋକିଦେବା ପରେ ଇସମାଇଲ୍‌ ସାଇବରି ନିର୍ଣ୍ଣାୟକ ପେନାଲ୍ଟିକୁ ଗୋଲରେ ପରିଣତ କରି ମରସ୍କୋକୁ ଐତିହାସିକ ବିଜୟ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡସର ଅଭିଜ୍ଞ ଖେଳାଳି କୋଡି ଗାକ୍‌ପୋଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଏହା ଆଉ ଏକ ଦୁଃଖଦ ଖବର ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଦୁଇ ଦିନ ତଳେ ତାଙ୍କ ପୁତ୍ର ସନ୍ତାନ ଜନ୍ମପୂର୍ବରୁ ମୃତ୍ୟୁବରଣ କରିଥିଲେ।

2027 Mitsubishi Pajero Off-Road Display Tech Revealed - What To Expect
description: Mitsubishi is set to unveil a new Pajero, reviving the nameplate with a modern twist. The updated model features a fully digital Multi Meter display designed for off-road conditions, showcasing vehicle metrics like pitch, roll angles and torque distribution.
content: Mitsubishi has revealed a key detail about the reborn Pajero ahead of its fall reveal: a fully digital version of the nameplate's classic Multi Meter display built specifically for off-roading. The Pajero name hasn't been used since 2021 and this teaser confirms Mitsubishi isn't just reviving the badge, it's bringing back the kind of dedicated off-road tech that made earlier generations genuinely useful in rough terrain, not just retro for the sake of it. Take a look at all the updates you can expect the new Pajero to come with.What Does The Multi Meter Show?The original Pajero's triple meter was a fan-favourite analogue gauge cluster and Mitsubishi is digitising it for the new generation while keeping the same purpose. The updated version displays the vehicle's pitch and roll angles in real time along with altitude, compass heading and left-right torque distribution between the wheels. Mitsubishi hasn't confirmed whether this sits inside the main instrument cluster or as a separate dedicated screen, though a standalone display would make more sense for actual off-road use since digging through infotainment submenus mid-climb isn't exactly practical.Is This A Genuine Off-Roader?Yes, and that's worth noting given how loosely "off-road badge" gets used these days. The new Pajero rides on the same ladder-frame chassis as the Triton pickup, paired with proper 4WD hardware instead of reusing the name on a soft-roading crossover the way Mitsubishi did with the Eclipse nameplate. It's set to be the first of several Pajero-badged models with additional variants expected to sit below it in the lineup though it's unclear yet if the digital Multi Meter will be shared across all of them or kept exclusive to this flagship version.Will The New Pajero Reach India?There's no confirmation either way right now. The new Pajero breaks cover this fall and goes on sale in 2027 but even markets with a stronger Mitsubishi presence aren't getting it immediately, reports suggest the North American Montero version won't arrive until 2030. Mitsubishi currently sells a limited lineup in India, so buyers here shouldn't expect this specific model on local roads soon, if at all. It's still worth tracking, though, since this kicks off a larger product push from Mitsubishi with 13 new models, including five EVs and five hybrids planned globally by early 2032.

title: "This is crying out for consequences" – Hummels delivers damning verdict after Germany's loss to Paraguay
description: After two consecutive group-stage exits, the 2026 World Cup also ended in disappointment for Germany, as Julian Nagelsmann’s side lost to Paraguay on penalties in the round of 32 on Monday.Mats Humm...
content: "This is crying out for consequences" – Hummels delivers damning verdict after Germany's loss to ParaguayAfter two consecutive group-stage exits, the 2026 World Cup also ended in disappointment for Germany, as Julian Nagelsmann’s side lost to Paraguay on penalties in the round of 32 on Monday.Mats Hummels, who won the World Cup with Germany in 2014, was speaking as a pundit on MagentaTV after the match and delivered a scathing assessment of the performance and elimination.“I've rarely been as emotionally involved as I was today, so I hope these are the right words,” Hummels said.“I think there were only a few phases in the match where we really managed to dominate Paraguay – or create goal danger. Unfortunately, this is the consequence of what has been happening over the past few years, both at major tournaments and in between. It's really a shame how many tournaments we have now thrown away as Germany, sometimes with me involved as well,” added Hummels, who played his last game for Germany in 2023.“It's a bitter disappointment; it's close to embarrassing. It simply hurts – it hurts that Germany currently plays almost no role in football.”The 37-year-old added that the latest failure must lead to consequences."On the side of those in charge, this is crying out for consequences – I can't put it any other way. We had the home Euros, the home Nations League, and now this World Cup. The home Euros were already talked up too positively for me. So this has to become a topic, both for the head coach and the federation. There need to be discussions. Football is too much of a performance sport for that not to happen."Hummels also suggested that some of the more experienced players should consider their future with the national team."On the players’ side, I can imagine that some will retire. You may also need to look at players in their early 30s who have had several chances to achieve good results for Germany at tournaments. Because for me, this is not a coincidence. It’s not a coincidence that we haven’t had a strong tournament since Euro 2016 – that’s a whole decade now. “It starts with the players. I also expect some of them to say themselves: 'I’m not continuing' – and I also expect the current or future head coach to make some tough decisions,” he concluded.

title: `ചിലർ അന്തസ്സോടെ പടിയിറങ്ങും, ചിലരുടെ പടിയിറക്കത്തെ സമൂഹം വലിയൊരു ആശ്വാസത്തോടെ നോക്കിക്കാണും'; വിരമിക്കൽ ദിനത്തില്‍ എ ജയതിലകിനെതിരെ എന്‍ പ്രശാന്ത്
description: വിരമിക്കൽ ദിനത്തില്‍ ചീഫ് സെക്രട്ടറി എ ജയതിലകിനെതിരെ എന്‍ പ്രശാന്ത് ഐഎഎസ്. ചീഫ് സെക്രട്ടറി വിരമിക്കുന്ന ദിവസമാണ് പ്രശാന്തിന്റെ ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് കുറിപ്പ്. ജയതിലകിന്റെ ഫോട്ടോ അടക്കം കുറിപ്പിനോടൊപ്പം പങ്കുവെച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: വിരമിക്കൽ ദിനത്തില്‍ ചീഫ് സെക്രട്ടറി എ ജയതിലകിനെതിരെ എന്‍ പ്രശാന്ത് ഐഎഎസ്. താൻ തന്നെയാണ് അധിപൻ എന്ന് അഹങ്കരിക്കുന്ന ആളാണ് ജയതിലക് എന്നാണ് ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് പോസ്റ്റ്. ചിലർ അന്തസ്സോടെ പടിയിറങ്ങും. മറ്റ് ചിലരുടെ പടിയിറക്കത്തെ സമൂഹം വലിയൊരു ആശ്വാസത്തോടെ നോക്കിക്കാണും എന്നാണ് പോസ്റ്റിൽ പറയുന്നത്. ചീഫ് സെക്രട്ടറി വിരമിക്കുന്ന ദിവസമാണ് പ്രശാന്തിന്റെ ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് കുറിപ്പ്. ജയതിലകിന്റെ ഫോട്ടോ അടക്കം കുറിപ്പിനോടൊപ്പം പങ്കുവെച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><h2>ഫേസ്ബുക്ക് കുറിപ്പിൻ്റെ പൂർണരൂപം</h2><p>ധർമ്മോ രക്ഷതി രക്ഷിതഃ</p><p>അധികാരത്തിന്റെ ശീതളഛായയിൽ മതിമറന്നു ജീവിക്കുന്നവർ പലപ്പോഴും ഓർക്കാതെ പോകുന്ന ഒരു നിസ്സാരകാര്യമുണ്ട് - തലമുറകളായി നമ്മൾ കണ്ടുപോന്ന ഈ അധികാരക്കസേരകളൊക്കെയും വെറും താൽക്കാലിക താവളങ്ങൾ മാത്രമാണെന്ന സത്യം. അഞ്ചോ പത്തോ കൊല്ലം ഭരണത്തിന്റെ ചെങ്കോൽ കയ്യിലിരിക്കുമ്പോൾ താൻ തന്നെയാണ് ഈ നാടിന്റെ അധിപനെന്ന് അഹങ്കരിക്കുന്ന രാഷ്ട്രീയക്കാരെക്കാൾ കഷ്ടമാണ്, മുപ്പതുകൊല്ലം അധികാരത്തിന്റെ ഇരുണ്ട ഇടനാഴികളിൽ ഫയലുകൾക്ക് മുകളിൽ വിധി കുറിച്ച ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥമേധാവികളുടെ മതിഭ്രമം.</p><p>അധികാരസ്ഥാനത്തിരിക്കുന്നവരുടെ ഇത്തരം വിഭ്രാന്തികൾക്ക് സഹാനുഭൂതിയോടെയുള്ള ചികിത്സാപദ്ധതികൾ നിലവിലില്ല എന്നതാണ് നമ്മുടെ ശാപം. വിസ്മൃതിയുടെ ഇരുളിലേക്ക് ആരും നോക്കാത്ത ഒരു പഴയ ഫയൽ പോലെ വലിച്ചെറിയപ്പെടും വരെ, തങ്ങൾക്ക് ഇവിടെ അസ്തമയമില്ലെന്ന് ഇവർ ഉറച്ചു വിശ്വസിക്കുന്നു. കാലം അവരെ തൂത്തെറിയും വരെ അവരെ സഹിക്കാൻ വിധിക്കപ്പെട്ടവരാണ് നമ്മൾ.</p><p>ജനനത്തിന്റെ ഏകാന്തതയ്ക്കും മരണത്തിന്റെ ശൂന്യതയ്ക്കുമിടയിൽ മനുഷ്യൻ കെട്ടിയാടുന്ന ഈ കോലാഹലങ്ങളെ പൂന്താനം എത്ര ലളിതമായാണ് ജ്ഞാനപ്പാനയിൽ പരിഹസിച്ചത്. 'കൂടിയല്ല പിറക്കുന്ന നേരത്തും കൂടിയല്ല മരിക്കുന്ന നേരത്തും' എന്ന് നമ്മൾ പാടിപ്പഠിച്ചത് വെറുതെയല്ല. ഈ കസേരകളും ചുവന്ന നാട കെട്ടിയ ഫയലുകളും ഈ വടംവലികളും ഒടുവിൽ 'മധ്യേയിങ്ങനെ കാണുന്ന നേരത്തെ' വെറും പിടിവാശികൾ മാത്രമാണ്. അധികാരത്തിന്റെ ആ മരീചിക ഒഴിഞ്ഞുപോകുമ്പോൾ കസേരത്തിലേക്ക് മറ്റൊരാൾ വന്നിരിക്കും; നാമപ്പലകകൾ അഴിച്ചുമാറ്റപ്പെടും. ഇന്നലെവരെ ഉത്തരവുകൾ കേട്ട് വിറങ്ങലിച്ചുനിന്ന ആ വരാന്തകൾ ഒരൊറ്റ രാത്രികൊണ്ട് ആ പഴയ കാൽപെരുമാറ്റങ്ങളുടെ ഓർമ്മകളെപ്പോലും പാടെ തുടച്ചുമാറ്റും. പദവികളിൽ നിന്നുള്ള ഈ പടിയിറക്കം, ഒരർത്ഥത്തിൽ ജീവിച്ചിരിക്കുമ്പോഴുള്ള മരണം തന്നെയാണ്.</p><p>ഭഗവദ്ഗീതയിൽ പറയുന്നതുപോലെ, സ്വാർത്ഥതയും മോഹവും ബുദ്ധിയെ നാശത്തിലേക്കേ നയിക്കൂ. പണത്തോടുള്ള ആർത്തിയേക്കാൾ ഭയാനകമാണ് എല്ലാം എന്റെ കൈപ്പിടിയിലൊതുക്കണമെന്ന ഈ അധികാരഭ്രമം. ഇക്കൂട്ടർ വരുംതലമുറയ്ക്ക് നൽകുന്ന പാഠങ്ങൾ എത്രമാത്രം വിഷലിപ്തമാണെന്ന് ആലോചിച്ചുനോക്കൂ. മനുഷ്യർ ഔദ്യോഗിക പദവികൾ നേടേണ്ടത് യോഗ്യത കൊണ്ടല്ല, മറിച്ച് ചില വലിയ തമ്പുരാക്കന്മാർക്ക് വഴിവിട്ട ഒത്താശകൾ ചെയ്തു കൊടുക്കാനുള്ള സന്നദ്ധത കൊണ്ടാണ് എന്നവർ തെളിയിക്കുന്നു. സ്വാധീനവും, കൃത്യസമയത്ത് മിണ്ടാതിരിക്കാനുള്ള തന്ത്രവും, അധർമ്മത്തിന് കൂട്ടുനിൽക്കുന്നതും, തെറ്റ് ചെയ്യാൻ പരസ്പരം തുണയാകുന്നതുമാണ് പെട്ടെന്ന് വളരാൻ നല്ലതെന്ന് ഇവർ തുടക്കത്തിലേ പഠിച്ചുവെച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. എങ്കിലും കാലത്തിന്റെ വലിയ പുസ്തകത്തിൽ ഇതൊക്കെയും രേഖപ്പെടുത്തുക തന്നെ ചെയ്യും.</p><p>ഭരണകൂടത്തിന്റെ ഉമ്മറങ്ങളിൽ നടക്കാറുള്ള യാത്രയയപ്പ് ചടങ്ങുകളും, തൊണ്ടയിടറി വായിക്കുന്ന മംഗളപത്രങ്ങളും പലപ്പോഴും കപടമായ ആചാരങ്ങൾ മാത്രമാണ്. വിടപറഞ്ഞു പോകുന്ന ഒരാളെക്കുറിച്ച് പരസ്യമായി നിന്ദ്യമായി സംസാരിക്കരുതെന്ന ലൗകികമായ ഒരു മര്യാദ. അവിടെ ക്രൂരതകൾക്ക് ‘കർക്കശനിലപാട്’ എന്നും, ആരെയും വകവെക്കാത്ത അഹങ്കാരത്തിന് ‘ഭരണപരമായ ദൃഢത’ എന്നും, ചെയ്തുകൂട്ടിയ അഴിമതികൾക്ക് ‘സാമർത്ഥ്യം’ എന്നും പുതിയ പേരിട്ട് വിളിക്കുന്നു. അവരുടെ ഉള്ളിലെ ഭയത്തെ അച്ചടക്കമായും, നാടിന് വരുത്തിവെച്ച പരിക്കുകളെ വെറും വിവാദങ്ങളായും മാറ്റിയെഴുതാൻ ചട്ടംകെട്ടി വെച്ച ചില സ്തുതിപാഠകരുണ്ടാകും. ആ ചടങ്ങിൽ വായിക്കാനുള്ള ഡ്രാഫ്റ്റ് പോലും ഇവർ തന്നെ എഴുതിക്കൊടുക്കും എന്നതാണ് ഇതിലേറ്റവും വലിയ കൗതുകം!</p><p>ഇത്തരം കാപട്യങ്ങളെയാണ് മത്തായിയുടെ സുവിശേഷം 23-ാം അധ്യായം 27-ാം വാക്യത്തിൽ യേശുദേവൻ കൃത്യമായി അടയാളപ്പെടുത്തിയത്:</p><p>"കപടഭക്തിക്കാരായ ശാസ്ത്രിമാരും പരീശന്മാരുമായുള്ളോരേ, നിങ്ങൾക്ക് അയ്യോ കഷ്ടം; നിങ്ങൾ വെള്ളയടിച്ച ശവക്കല്ലറകൾക്ക് സദൃശരാകുന്നു; അവ പുറമെ ഭംഗിയായി കാണപ്പെടുന്നു എങ്കിലും അകമെ ചത്തവരുടെ അസ്ഥികളും സകല അശുദ്ധിയും നിറഞ്ഞിരിക്കുന്നു."</p><p>അതായത്, ഒളിച്ചുവെക്കാൻ ഒട്ടനവധി അസ്ഥികൂടങ്ങളുള്ളവരും കള്ളന് കഞ്ഞി വെച്ചവരും ആരാണെന്നറിയാൻ ഈ സ്തുതിപാഠകരുടെ പട്ടിക മാത്രം നോക്കിയാൽ മതിയാകും. നിലനിൽപ്പിനായി പുകഴ്ത്തുക എന്നത് അവരുടെയൊക്കെ അനിവാര്യതയാണ്. തങ്ങളുടെ കീഴിലുള്ളവരെ അവസരവാദത്തിന്റെ കണക്കപ്പിള്ളമാരാക്കി മാറ്റുകയും, സത്യത്തേക്കാൾ പ്രധാനം സുഖിച്ചു ജീവിക്കലാണെന്ന് ശീലിപ്പിക്കുകയും ചെയ്യുന്നവർ പടിയിറങ്ങുമ്പോൾ ബാക്കിവെക്കുന്നത് തങ്ങൾ തകർത്തുകളഞ്ഞ ഒരു ഭരണസംവിധാനമാണ്. ഇങ്ങനെ വാർത്തെടുത്ത ഭീരുക്കളെയും അഴിമതിവീരന്മാരെയും തിരിച്ചറിയാനുള്ള കൃത്യമായ അടയാളമാണ് ഈ സ്തുതിപാഠകരുടെ കൂട്ടം.</p><p>ഇങ്ങനെയുള്ള അധികാരമാഹാത്മ്യങ്ങൾ തങ്ങളുടെ പാപക്കറകൾ എവിടെയും വ്യക്തമായി ബാക്കിവെക്കാറില്ല. പകരം ചില കറുത്ത അടിക്കുറിപ്പുകൾ മാത്രം ചരിത്രത്തിൽ ശേഷിപ്പിക്കും. പ്രകൃതിയെയും പാവപ്പെട്ടവന്റെ മണ്ണിനെയും ചൂഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ ഭരണകൂട ഉത്തരവുകളുടെ വരികൾക്കിടയിൽ അവ്യക്തതകളുടെ കൊടുവാൾ ഒളിപ്പിച്ചുവെക്കുന്നതും, സ്വന്തം താല്പര്യങ്ങൾക്കായി പൊതുപദവികളെ ദല്ലാൾപ്പണിക്ക് വിട്ടുകൊടുക്കുന്നതും, അധികാരത്തിന്റെ ദുരുപയോഗം എത്ര നിശ്ശബ്ദമായും എത്ര ഭീകരമായും ചെയ്യാമെന്നതിന്റെ തെളിവുകളാണ്. അതിശക്തർക്കൊപ്പം നിന്ന് മുട്ടിൽ മരം മുറിച്ചതു കാരണം കേസിൽ കുടുങ്ങിപ്പോയ അനവധി പാവങ്ങളുടെ ശാപം കഴുകിക്കളയാൻ 'സ്പൈസസ് ബോർഡി'ലെ എല്ലാ സുഗന്ധവ്യഞ്ജനങ്ങൾക്കും സാധിച്ചെന്ന് വരില്ല. നീതിയെയും സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളെയും തകിടം മറിക്കുന്നതും, സത്യത്തോടുള്ള വഞ്ചനയും, പൊതുവിശ്വാസത്തെ അങ്ങാടിയിൽ വിൽക്കുന്നതുമെല്ലാം കുറ്റകൃത്യമാണെങ്കിലും ഇവർക്ക് വെറും ഔദ്യോഗിക കൃത്യങ്ങൾ മാത്രമാണ്.</p><p>വിരമിക്കൽ ദിനത്തിൽ നമ്മുടെ സംസ്കാരം നമ്മോട് ആവശ്യപ്പെടുന്നത് ആത്മസംയമനമാണ്. അധികാരമില്ലാതായി മാറുന്ന ഒരു മനുഷ്യന്റെ വീഴ്ചയെ അശ്ലീലമായി ആഘോഷിക്കാതിരിക്കാനുള്ള മാന്യത നാം കാണിക്കണം. എന്നാൽ ക്ഷമിക്കുക എന്നതിന് ചരിത്രത്തിന്റെ താളുകൾ കീറിക്കളയുക എന്ന് അർത്ഥമില്ല. വരുംതലമുറയ്ക്ക് നന്മയും തിന്മയും വേർതിരിച്ചറിയാനുള്ള ബോധമുണ്ടാകണം. ഭയത്തെ ഒരിക്കലും ബഹുമാനമായും, ഭീരുക്കളുടെ മൗനത്തെ സമ്മതമായും, പിടിക്കപ്പെടാതിരുന്നതിനെ വിശുദ്ധിയായും ആരും വ്യാഖ്യാനിക്കരുത്. വ്യക്തിപരമായി ക്ഷമിക്കുമ്പോൾ തന്നെ, സമയമെടുത്തിട്ടാണെങ്കിലും നിയമലംഘനങ്ങൾക്ക് നടപടി ഉണ്ടാവുക തന്നെ വേണം. ധർമ്മം പുനഃസ്ഥാപിക്കപ്പെടുക തന്നെ വേണം.</p><p>ഈ സംവിധാനം എല്ലാവർക്കും പകരക്കാരെ കണ്ടെത്തും. ആ വലിയ ഓഫീസ് മേശ തുടച്ചു വൃത്തിയാക്കപ്പെടും, അടുത്ത ആൾ വന്നിരിക്കും, ഫയലുകൾ വീണ്ടും ചലിച്ചുതുടങ്ങും. ഒരിക്കൽ ഒരാളുടെ മാത്രം അപ്രമാദിത്വത്തിലാണെന്ന് തോന്നിച്ച ആ വലിയ ഭരണയന്ത്രം, താൻ പോയാലും ഒന്നും സംഭവിക്കില്ലെന്ന വലിയ യാഥാർത്ഥ്യത്തോടെ മുന്നോട്ടുപോകും. ചിലർ അന്തസ്സോടെ പടിയിറങ്ങും; ചിലരുടെ പടിയിറക്കത്തെ സമൂഹം വലിയൊരു ആശ്വാസത്തോടെ നോക്കിക്കാണും. ഇക്കൂട്ടർ ചരിത്രത്തിൽ അവശേഷിപ്പിക്കുന്നത് ഒരു പൊതുസേവകൻ ഒരിക്കലും എന്തായിത്തീരരുത് എന്നതിന്റെ ഉദാഹരണം മാത്രമാണ്. ചുവരുകളിൽ വെള്ളയടിച്ച ശവക്കല്ലറകളുടെ ഭംഗി ബാക്കിയുണ്ടാകാം, പക്ഷേ കാലത്തിന്റെ വിചാരണയിൽ നിന്നും ആർക്കും ഒളിച്ചോടാനാകില്ല. നന്നായി വരട്ടെ.</p><p></p>

title: ଲୋମହର୍ଷଣକାରୀ ହତ୍ୟା, ଲୁଟ୍ ଘଟଣା: ହତ୍ୟାକାରୀଙ୍କ ଗାଡି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା, ଯେ ପାଞ୍ଚେ ପରର ମନ୍ଦ ତା ମନ୍ଦ…
description:
ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼, ୩୦।୬ (ଜୟ ନାରାୟଣ ମେଣ୍ଡୁଳି): ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲାରେ ଘଟିଥିବା ଏକ ଲୋମହର୍ଷଣକାରୀ ହତ୍ୟା ଓ ଲୁଟ୍ ଘଟଣାର ପର୍ଦ୍ଦାଫାସ କରିଛି ପୋଲିସ। ଏନେଇ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲା ପୋଲିସ ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଜିଲାପୋଲିସ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ (ଏସ୍‌ପି) ଅମୃତ ପାଲ କୌର ଘଟଣା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏସ୍‌ପିଙ୍କ ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ତଲସରା ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ଅନମୋଲ ମଲ୍ଲିକ ଓ ତାଙ୍କ ବନ୍ଧୁ ଶିବଧନ ଲୋହାର ଜଣେ ରୋଗୀଙ୍କୁ ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ସରକାରୀ ମେଡିକାଲ […]
The post ଲୋମହର୍ଷଣକାରୀ ହତ୍ୟା, ଲୁଟ୍ ଘଟଣା: ହତ୍ୟାକାରୀଙ୍କ ଗାଡି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା, ଯେ ପାଞ୍ଚେ ପରର ମନ୍ଦ ତା ମନ୍ଦ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼, ୩୦।୬ (ଜୟ ନାରାୟଣ ମେଣ୍ଡୁଳି): ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲାରେ ଘଟିଥିବା ଏକ ଲୋମହର୍ଷଣକାରୀ ହତ୍ୟା ଓ ଲୁଟ୍ ଘଟଣାର ପର୍ଦ୍ଦାଫାସ କରିଛି ପୋଲିସ। ଏନେଇ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲା ପୋଲିସ ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଜିଲାପୋଲିସ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ (ଏସ୍‌ପି) ଅମୃତ ପାଲ କୌର ଘଟଣା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି।
ଏସ୍‌ପିଙ୍କ ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ତଲସରା ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ଅନମୋଲ ମଲ୍ଲିକ ଓ ତାଙ୍କ ବନ୍ଧୁ ଶିବଧନ ଲୋହାର ଜଣେ ରୋଗୀଙ୍କୁ ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ସରକାରୀ ମେଡିକାଲ କଲେଜ ଓ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲ (GMCH)ରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରାଇ ଗତ ଜୁନ୍ ୨୮ ତାରିଖ ରାତିରେ ନିଜ ନିଜ ଗାଡ଼ିରେ ଘରକୁ ଫେରୁଥିଲେ। ସେହି ସମୟରେ ସବଡେଗା ଓ ତଲସରା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ତିନିଜଣ ଦୁର୍ବୃତ୍ତ ବାଇକ୍‌ରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ପିଛା କରିଥିଲେ।
ଦୁର୍ବୃତ୍ତମାନେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଅନମୋଲଙ୍କ ସ୍କର୍ପିଓ ଗାଡ଼ିକୁ ଅଟକାଇବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିଥିଲେ। ସେଥିରେ ବିଫଳ ହେବା ପରେ ସେମାନେ ଶିବଧନ ଲୋହାରଙ୍କ ଆଲ୍ଟୋ କାରକୁ ଅଟକାଇ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଗାଡ଼ିରୁ ଟାଣି ବାହାରକୁ ଆଣିଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କଠାରୁ ନଗଦ ଟଙ୍କା ଥିବା ପର୍ସ ଓ ମୋବାଇଲ ଫୋନ୍ ଲୁଟି ନେବା ସହ ଛୁରିରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲେ।
ପରେ ଦୁର୍ବୃତ୍ତମାନେ ଶିବଧନଙ୍କୁ ପୁଣି ତାଙ୍କ କାର ଭିତରକୁ ନେଇ ଡୁଡୁକା ରେଳ ଓଭରବ୍ରିଜ୍‌ ନିକଟକୁ ଯାଇ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଛୁରି ଭୁସି ହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିଲେ। ହତ୍ୟା ପରେ ପ୍ରମାଣ ନଷ୍ଟ କରିବା ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟରେ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ରେଳ ଓଭରବ୍ରିଜ୍‌ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ଏକ ଜଳସ୍ରୋତରେ ଫିଙ୍ଗି ଦେଇଥିଲେ।ଏହାପରେ ଲୁଟ୍ ହୋଇଥିବା ଆଲ୍ଟୋ କାରରେ ଫେରାର ହେଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ଜୁନ୍ ୨୯ ତାରିଖ ଭୋର ପ୍ରାୟ ୫ଟା ସମୟରେ ଭଷ୍ମା ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଖମାରବାହାଲ ନିକଟ କୋଇଲା କରିଡର ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଗାଡ଼ିଟି ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଥିଲା।
ଖବର ପାଇ ଭଷ୍ମା ଥାନା ପୋଲିସ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଆହତମାନଙ୍କୁ ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟକୁ ପଠାଇଥିଲା। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଶୁଭେନ୍ଦୁ ଶେଖର ମାଝୀଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଘଟିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଅନ୍ୟ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ଭୁମେଶ୍ୱର ବେହେରା ରାଉରକେଲାର ଏକ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲରେ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଧୀନ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଘଟଣାରେ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ଜଣେ ନାବାଳକଙ୍କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ପୋଲିସ ଅଟକ ରଖିଛି।
ତଦନ୍ତ ବେଳେ ପୋଲିସ ହତ୍ୟାରେ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ଛୁରି, ଲୁଟ୍ ହୋଇଥିବା ଆଲ୍ଟୋ କାର ଓ ମୃତକଙ୍କ ପର୍ସ ଜବତ କରିଛି। ସାଇଣ୍ଟିଫିକ୍‌ ଟିମ୍‌ର ସହାୟତାରେ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରୁ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରମାଣ ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ବୋଲି ଏସ୍‌ପି ଅମୃତ ପାଲ କୌର ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଏସ୍‌ପିଙ୍କ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ତତ୍ତ୍ୱାବଧାନରେ ଗଠିତ ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ପୋଲିସ ଟିମ୍‌ ମାମଲାର ତଦନ୍ତ କରୁଛି। ଏହି ହତ୍ୟା ଓ ଲୁଟ୍ ଘଟଣାରେ ଅନ୍ୟ କାହାର ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତି ରହିଛି କି ନାହିଁ, ସେନେଇ ମଧ୍ୟ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରହିଛି ବୋଲି ପୋଲିସ ପକ୍ଷରୁ କୁହାଯାଇଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଲୋମହର୍ଷଣକାରୀ ହତ୍ୟା, ଲୁଟ୍ ଘଟଣା: ହତ୍ୟାକାରୀଙ୍କ ଗାଡି ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା, ଯେ ପାଞ୍ଚେ ପରର ମନ୍ଦ ତା ମନ୍ଦ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Congress Slams: ଆସ୍ଥା ଉପରେ ସିଧାସଳଖ ଆକ୍ରମଣ: ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ନେଇ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ନୀରବତାକୁ ନିନ୍ଦା କଲା କଂଗ୍ରେସ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ଅଯୋଧ୍ୟାର ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ଦାନ ଆତ୍ମସାତକୁ ନେଇ ବଢୁଥିବା ବିବାଦ ମଧ୍ୟରେ, ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର କଂଗ୍ରେସ ମହାସଚିବ ଜୟରାମ ରମେଶ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଶ୍ରୀରାମ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ଲୁଟ୍ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ନରେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମୋଦୀଙ୍କ ନୀରବତା ଦେଶର କୋଟି କୋଟି ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଧାର୍ମିକ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ଉପରେ ସିଧାସଳଖ ଆକ୍ରମଣ।
ଶ୍ରୀ ରାମ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମି ତୀର୍ଥ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ ଗଠନ କରିଥିଲେ
ରମେଶ କହିଛନ୍ତି,ମୋଦୀ ସରକାର କୌଣସି ସ୍ୱଚ୍ଛ ମାନଦଣ୍ଡ କିମ୍ବା ସାଧାରଣ ପରାମର୍ଶ ବିନା ଶ୍ରୀ ରାମ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମି ତୀର୍ଥ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟ ଗଠନ କରିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ଏଥିରେ ଆରଏସଏସ ସଦସ୍ୟଙ୍କୁ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ କରିଥିଲେ। ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ, ସମଗ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟକୁ ସୂଚନା ଅଧିକାର ଆଇନର ପରିସରରୁ ମୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ବିରୋଧୀ ଦଳ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛି ଯେ, ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ଦିନ ତାଙ୍କ ପ୍ରତିନିଧିମଣ୍ଡଳୀ ପ୍ରଭୁ ଶ୍ରୀରାମଙ୍କ ଦର୍ଶନ ଏବଂ ଆଶୀର୍ବାଦ ପାଇଁ ଅଯୋଧ୍ୟା ଗସ୍ତ କରିବାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ଥିଲା, କିନ୍ତୁ ଉତ୍ତର ପ୍ରଦେଶ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅଜୟ ରାୟଙ୍କୁ ପୁଲିସ ଗରିଫ କରିଛି।ରମେଶଙ୍କ ମନ୍ତବ୍ୟ ମଧ୍ୟରାତ୍ରିରେ ଅଜୟ ରାୟଙ୍କ ସେହି ପୋଷ୍ଟର ଜବାବରେ ଆସିଛି ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ସେ ଦାବି କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ,ବିଜେପି ସରକାରଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱେଚ୍ଛାଚାରିତା ଶୀର୍ଷରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି। ଅଯୋଧ୍ୟାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିବା ମାତ୍ରେ ବିଜେପି ସରକାର ଭୟଭୀତ ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲେ। ପୁଲିସ ତାଙ୍କୁ ତାଙ୍କ ହୋଟେଲରୁ ଗରିଫ କରି ଏକ ଜିପ୍‌ରେ ନେଇଯାଇଥିଲା ବୋଲି ରାୟ କହିଥିଲେ। ଏହା ସହ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ସୁପ୍ରିମକୋର୍ଟଙ୍କ ତତ୍ତ୍ୱାବଧାନରେ ତଦନ୍ତ ଏବଂ ଶ୍ରୀରାମ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମି ତୀର୍ଥ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟକୁ ଭାଙ୍ଗିବାକୁ ଦାବି କରିଛି।
Minor Girl: ବୃଦ୍ଧଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଦୁଷ୍କର୍ମ ପୀଡ଼ିତା ନାବାଳିକା ଗୁରୁତର: ଏଡ୍‌ସ୍ ଆକ୍ରାନ୍ତ ପରେ ପରିବାର ଲୋକେ ଛାନିଆ

title: What Jimmy Butler thinks of trade rumors hinting a move away from Golden State Warriors
description: The Golden State Warriors already seem ready to move on from Jimmy Butler. Jimmy Butler became a member of the Golden State Warriors during the 2024-25 NBA season following a huge fallout with the Miami Heat.
content: Photo by Soobum Im/Getty ImagesThe Golden State Warriors already seem ready to move on from Jimmy Butler.Jimmy Butler became a member of the Golden State Warriors during the 2024-25 NBA season following a huge fallout with the Miami Heat.Since the Warriors have traded for Butler, the franchise has benefited from it, but the rumor mill is buzzing with the franchise actively looking to offload the 36-year-old this offseason.Photo by Luke Hales/NWSL via Getty ImagesChris Haynes reveals Jimmy Butler’s stance on trade away from Golden State WarriorsDespite Butler averaging 19.1 points, 5.5 rebounds, and 5.3 assists per game in a Warriors jersey, what could be the reason for potentially trading him?Well, it’s the prospect of potentially getting a superstar like Anthony Davis from the Washington Wizards. However, according to Chris Haynes, Butler’s camp do not believe that the organization will trade him.While Butler may be five years younger than James, the King is still objectively a better player than the former Heat star. The biggest reason behind it is James taking extremely good care of his body.Jimmy Butler is recovering from a torn ACL injuryIn January 2026, Butler’s Warriors career hit a massive obstacle in the form of a torn ACL injury, as his season was instantly over.The Warriors certainly missed Butler’s presence on the court as the organization finished with a terrible 37-45 record in the regular season.Additionally, recovering from an ACL injury always comes with its own risks, and when Butler returns, he may never be the player he once was.Combining that with his age, it’s only sensible to get rid of Butler’s hefty contract as soon as possible, albeit in favor of an injury-prone star like Davis.Read more:Jimmy Butler names his price for shirt number after Warriors rookie makes requestJimmy Butler attends Colombia vs Portugal World Cup game wearing two different soccer jerseysJimmy Butler’s 2018 ‘soft’ insult on Karl-Anthony Towns looks awful after Knicks star won NBA Championship

title: ECB Says Extent of Inflation Shock 'Remains to Be Seen'
description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Olaf Sleijpen says the full extent of the inflation shock from the Iran war isn’t yet clear and that policymakers will act accordingly as data arrive. He made the comments during an interview with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Odisha Vigilance Cracks Down on VIMSAR Officials, Unearths Massive Assets During Raids
description: Odisha Vigilance conducted extensive raids against two officials from VIMSAR, Burla, over suspected corruption involving assets exceeding their income.
content: Bhubaneswar: In a major anti-corruption crackdown, Odisha Vigilance on Tuesday launched simultaneous raids against two officials of VIMSAR, Burla, over allegations of possessing assets disproportionate to their known sources of income.The raids targeted Dhanurdhar Biswal, Establishment Officer-cum-Office Superintendent, and Aswini Meher, Steward in the Office of the Superintendent, VIMSAR, Burla.Acting on search warrants issued by the Special Judge, Vigilance, Sambalpur, teams of Odisha Vigilance conducted searches at four locations linked to Dhanurdhar Biswal and five locations linked to Aswini Meher across Sambalpur and Bargarh districts.The operation involved multiple Vigilance officers, including DSPs, Inspectors, ASIs, and supporting staff.During searches at properties linked to Dhanurdhar Biswal, Vigilance officials unearthed substantial assets that are now under verification.Among the assets detected so far are a double-storeyed residential building at Dhankauda in Sambalpur, another building at Gudesinga, and as many as twenty valuable plots located on the outskirts of Sambalpur town.Officials also recovered cash amounting to ₹19 lakh 72 thousand 490 rupees.In addition, a Hyva truck, a Renault four-wheeler, two tractors, and three two-wheelers were found during the searches.Gold jewellery, bank deposits, postal savings, and other financial investments are also being examined by the Vigilance Department.Meanwhile, simultaneous raids were also carried out at five locations linked to Aswini Meher, including his government quarters at VIMSAR Medical Staff Colony, an under-construction four-storeyed building at Saurav Vihar in Burla, residential buildings in Burla and Bargarh, and his office chamber.The Vigilance Technical Wing is currently assessing the value of the properties and other assets detected during the operation.The searches are still underway, and officials say further details are expected once the verification process is completed.The twin Vigilance operations have once again brought the spotlight on alleged disproportionate assets among government officials. More details are awaited as investigators continue their searches and financial scrutiny.

title: కర్నూలు జిల్లాలో కొత్తగా జింకల పార్క్ ఏర్పాటు
description: Dibbanadoddi deer park:కర్నూలు జిల్లా మంత్రాలయం సమీపంలో అద్భుతమైన పర్యాటక కేంద్రం అందుబాటులోకి రానుంది. ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం పర్యాటక రంగాన్ని అభివృద్ధి చేసే క్రమంలో దిబ్బనదొడ్డిలో సరికొత్త...
content:
Dibbanadoddi deer park:కర్నూలు జిల్లా మంత్రాలయం సమీపంలో అద్భుతమైన పర్యాటక కేంద్రం అందుబాటులోకి రానుంది. ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం పర్యాటక రంగాన్ని అభివృద్ధి చేసే క్రమంలో దిబ్బనదొడ్డిలో సరికొత్త ఏర్పాటుకు సిద్ధమైంది. తుంగభద్ర నది ఒడ్డున ఉన్న ఈ ప్రాంతం ప్రకృతి సౌందర్యంతో పర్యాటకులను కట్టిపడేస్తుంది. ఆదోని డివిజన్ పరిధిలో వేల సంఖ్యలో జింకలు ఉండటంతో వాటికి రక్షణ కల్పించేలా అటవీ శాఖ అధికారులు పక్కా ప్రణాళికలు రూపొందించారు. సుమారు ఏడు వందల ఎకరాల అటవీ భూమిలో పది ఎకరాల విస్తీర్ణంలో ఈ పార్క్ ఏర్పాటు చేయాలని నిర్ణయించారు. మంత్రాలయం వెళ్లే యాత్రికులకు ఇది సరికొత్త ఆధ్యాత్మిక మరియు ప్రకృతి పర్యాటక అనుభూతిని అందిస్తుంది.



Read also: Nara Lokesh: దేవాన్ష్‌తో క్రికెట్ ఆడటమే నా ఏకైక హాబీ!



Scenic view of Dibbanadoddi deer park



పర్యాటకుల కోసం అత్యాధునిక సౌకర్యాలు



ఈ ప్రాంతానికి వచ్చే భక్తులు, సందర్శకుల కోసం ప్రభుత్వం ప్రత్యేక వసతులు కల్పిస్తోంది. పార్క్ లోపల సఫారీ వాహనాలు, పర్యాటకులు జింకలను చూసేందుకు వాచ్ టవర్లు నిర్మిస్తారు. ఆహార విహారాల కోసం క్యాంటీన్లు, గైడ్ల సేవలు అందుబాటులో ఉంటాయి. జింకలకు ఇబ్బంది కలగకుండా పార్క్ చుట్టూ పటిష్టమైన కంచె వేయడం, నీటి వసతి కల్పించడం వంటి పనులు చేపట్టనున్నారు. డ్రోన్ కెమెరాలు, సీసీ కెమెరాల సాయంతో జింకల కదలికలను నిరంతరం పర్యవేక్షిస్తారు. గతంలో రైతుల పంటలు నష్టపోకుండా ఆపరేషన్ బ్లాక్‌బక్ వంటి కార్యక్రమాలు చేపట్టిన అధికారులు, ఇప్పుడు ఈ పార్క్ ద్వారా జింకలకు శాశ్వత ఆవాసాన్ని కల్పిస్తున్నారు. రద్దీగా ఉండే మంత్రాలయం వెళ్లే పర్యాటకులు ప్రకృతి ఒడిలో కాసేపు ప్రశాంతంగా గడపడానికి ఇది చక్కని వేదిక కానుంది.



Dibbanadoddi deer park:రాయలసీమలో పర్యాటక అభివృద్ధికి పెద్దపీట



రాయలసీమ ప్రాంతంలో పర్యాటక రంగాన్ని ప్రోత్సహించడంలో భాగంగా ప్రభుత్వం ఈ చర్యలు తీసుకుంది. మంత్రాలయం రాఘవేంద్ర స్వామి మఠం సందర్శించే వేలాది మంది భక్తులు, పంచముఖి ఆంజనేయ స్వామి ఆలయానికి కూడా వెళ్తుంటారు. వారందరికీ ఇప్పుడు ఈ జింకల పార్క్ ఒక అదనపు ఆకర్షణగా నిలవనుంది. బసాపురం, ఖగ్గల్, మాధవరం తండా వంటి గ్రామాల్లో జింకల సంచారం ఎక్కువగా ఉంటుంది. వీటిని ఒకే చోట కేంద్రీకరించి పర్యాటక కేంద్రంగా తీర్చిదిద్దడం ద్వారా స్థానికంగా ఉపాధి అవకాశాలు కూడా పెరుగుతాయి. అటవీ శాఖ అధికారులు క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో పరిశీలన పూర్తి చేసి, నివేదికలు సిద్ధం చేశారు. త్వరలోనే పనులు ప్రారంభమై, ప్రకృతి ప్రేమికులకు ఈ ప్రాంతం ఒక టూరిస్ట్ హబ్ కానుంది.

title: कूनो नेशनल पार्क में तेंदुए का ‘रॉयल अंदाज’, सड़क पर एक घंटे तक डटा रहा, थमे रहे सफारी वाहनों के पहिए
description: Kuno National Park News: कूनो नेशनल पार्क में सफारी के दौरान तेंदुआ करीब 1 घंटे तक मुख्य सड़क पर बैठा रहा। उसकी मौजूदगी के कारण सफारी वाहनों को रोकना पड़ा, पर्यटकों ने दुर्लभ नजारा कैमरे में कैद किया।
content:
Kuno Leopard Safari : श्योपुर के कूनो नेशनल पार्क में सफारी पर निकले पर्यटकों को ऐसा नजारा देखने को मिला, जिसने उनके जंगल सफर को हमेशा के लिए यादगार बना दिया। सफारी के दौरान एक तेंदुआ अचानक मुख्य मार्ग पर आकर बैठ गया और करीब एक घंटे तक वहीं आराम करता रहा। तेंदुए की मौजूदगी के कारण सफारी वाहनों को सुरक्षित दूरी पर रोकना पड़ा, लेकिन यह इंतजार पर्यटकों के लिए रोमांच से भरपूर अनुभव साबित हुआ।
जानकारी के अनुसार सफारी के दौरान पर्यटक जंगल के भीतर भ्रमण कर रहे थे, तभी एक तेंदुआ मुख्य सड़क पर आकर बैठ गया। तेंदुआ पूरी तरह शांत और बेफिक्र नजर आया। वन विभाग के दिशा-निर्देशों का पालन करते हुए सभी सफारी वाहन सुरक्षित दूरी पर रुक गए और किसी ने भी वन्यजीव को रास्ते से हटाने का प्रयास नहीं किया।
पर्यटकों ने कैमरों में कैद किए यादगार पल
करीब एक घंटे तक तेंदुआ सड़क पर बैठा रहा। इस दौरान पर्यटक उसकी हर गतिविधि को उत्सुकता से देखते रहे। कई पर्यटकों ने मोबाइल फोन और कैमरों से इस दुर्लभ दृश्य को रिकॉर्ड किया। जंगल के बीच इतने करीब से तेंदुए को देखने का मौका मिलने पर पर्यटकों में खासा उत्साह देखने को मिला। लगभग एक घंटे बाद तेंदुआ धीरे-धीरे सड़क से उठा और जंगल की ओर चला गया। उसके हटते ही सफारी वाहनों की आवाजाही दोबारा शुरू हुई। पूरे समय वन विभाग के कर्मचारियों ने सुरक्षा मानकों का पालन सुनिश्चित किया।
ये भी पढ़ें : बालाघाट में बड़ा हंगामा: शराबबंदी आंदोलन के बीच पत्नी ने शराबी पति को खंभे से बांधा, वायरल हो रहा वीडियो
वन्यजीवों के कारण बढ़ रहा कूनो का आकर्षण
कूनो नेशनल पार्क अपने समृद्ध वन्यजीव और प्राकृतिक सुंदरता के लिए देशभर में प्रसिद्ध है। इन दिनों कूनो देश-विदेश के पर्यटकों के आकर्षण का प्रमुख केंद्र बना हुआ है। यहां चीता, तेंदुआ, भालू, लकड़बग्घा, नीलगाय, सांभर और अन्य वन्यजीवों की मौजूदगी जंगल सफारी को खास बनाती है। वन्यजीवों के ऐसे अप्रत्याशित और प्राकृतिक व्यवहार ही कूनो की पहचान हैं। यही वजह है कि हर सफारी पर्यटकों के लिए एक नया और रोमांच से भरपूर अनुभव लेकर आती है। यहां सफारी के दौरान वन्यजीवों के ऐसे अप्रत्याशित दृश्य पर्यटकों के आकर्षण का प्रमुख केंद्र बनते हैं।

title: NBCUniversal eyes entry into video game business after Comcast split; spin-off might give industry its next major deal - Details
description: NBCUniversal is exploring entry into the video game business after its planned spin-off from Comcast; sources say the video game industry might have biggest deal ever.
content: NBCUniversal is considering entering the digital gaming space and developing new entertainment franchises as it prepares to become an independent company following its se from Comcast.According to three people familiar with the matter, NBCUniversal is looking at various growth options after the separation. No specific deals have been discussed, and any potential moves would likely happen only after the split is completed.Comcast announced plans to spin off NBCUniversal, separating its cable and connectivity business from the entertainment division. Comcast CEO Brian Roberts said the split would allow both companies to operate independently with focused management teams. He described the decision as the better way forward for both businesses.Roberts stated that the companies decided to move quickly once they were committed to the plan. He denied that the spinoff was intended as a step toward immediate further deals.Focus on gaming and growth areasNBCUniversal’s future leadership, including Michael Cavanagh who will run the company after the split, has noted the freedom to explore adjacent businesses. Comcast has shown past interest in gaming. Roberts’ son, Tucker Roberts, runs the company’s gaming division and has advised on opportunities such as the Korean e-sports market.In the past, Comcast explored acquiring companies like Activision and Electronic Arts, and considered an equity stake in Epic Games, the maker of Fortnite. The company also has existing ties with Nintendo, including theme park attractions and two successful Super Mario animated films.Background on the splitThe separation comes as traditional television and film businesses face challenges from cord-cutting and the rise of streaming, games, and social media. After the spinoff, Comcast will retain a 19.9% stake in NBCUniversal, which it plans to sell over time. To maintain the tax-free structure of the deal, NBCUniversal must operate independently for at least one year before any sale or merger.Analysts and industry observers have speculated about possible future interest in NBCUniversal’s assets, including its film and television studio, theme parks, and streaming service Peacock. Some have mentioned Netflix as a potential buyer, though any such deal would face significant regulatory hurdles.Comcast’s cable business is expected to focus on technological investments, particularly in areas related to data centers and artificial intelligence.The announcement was received positively by investors, with Comcast’s stock rising significantly. The move is seen as ending a long-standing “pipes and content” structure that some investors viewed as suboptimal.Comcast has declined to comment on any potential deals or specific tax-related analysis. The spinoff aims to give both companies more flexibility to pursue their own growth strategies.

title: ‘Looks Surreal’: ‘Zoomed-In’ Video Of Saturn Leaves Internet Mesmerised
description: An astro photographer allegedly captured a ‘zoomed in and clear’ video of Saturn in the sky- and now that is all that the internet can talk about! Here’s what netizens said…
content: ‘Surreal’ was the term that ended up echoing in the comment section of a video– shared by an astro photographer! The clip in question allegedly showed a ‘clear’ and a ‘zoomed-in’ Saturn. The video was shared by astro photographer Tom Williams, who allegedly captured the planet during the morning, using a “900x magnification with the 24in scope”. The clip showed a clear Saturn, shining bright along with its rings, while being surrounded by the darkness of the Space. “Saturn this morning~900x magnification with the 24in scope,” the post read.The video immediately went viral, pulling many reactions. Most found the video “enchanting and breathtaking”, while others called it “too clear to be real”.Saturn is not the only planet that Williams has captured; his social media handle is filled with other planets as well. From Venus to Jupiter and from Jupiter’s Moon to the Sun– the astro photographer has seemingly captured them all.Check out the viral post:The post was shared on Instagram, by the handle ‘tw.astrophotography’. The post was shared 6 days ago and pulled over 260K views from people.              View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Tom Williams (@tw.astrophotography)Internet’s reaction:“I would lose my mind if I saw this,” a user said. “This calm, warm sound of birds singing, combined with the sight of a distant, enormous, uninhabited planet, creates an incredible feeling,” added another person in the comment section.“Think about it for a moment, this is a REAL, whole other world. Like 900x bigger than our own too! It isn't just something you see in our sky,” added another. “I will never, ever forget the first time my 10 year old eye looked through the lens of my Dads Celestron telescope and saw this. I couldn’t believe it was real,” added another.

title: Pune Weather Update: दुकानों में पानी, फसलें बर्बाद, बिजली का खंभा गिरा; कई गांवों में किसानों के खिले चेहर
description: Pune Rain Havoc: पुणे जिले में भारी बारिश से राजगुरुनगर की दुकानों और आंबेगांव के स्वास्थ्य केंद्र में पानी भर गया, जिससे भारी नुकसान हुआ। वहीं शिरूर तहसील के किसानों को सूखे से राहत मिली।
content:
Pune Rain Havoc Rajgurunagar Flooding: पुणे जिले में रविवार को हुई मूसलाधार बारिश ने जहां कई इलाकों में भारी तबाही मचाई, वहीं कुछ जगहों पर सूखी फसलों को संजीवनी भी दी। राजगुरुनगर के कासवा कॉम्प्लेक्स, कलंब के स्वास्थ्य केंद्र और स्थानीय बस्तियों में जलभराव से लाखों का नुकसान हुआ, जबकि पिंपलगांव में बिजली का खंभा गिरने से मार्ग बंद रहा और एकलहरे में सिंचाई नाली (चारी) फटने से फसलें बर्बाद हो गई। इस आपदा के विपरीत, शिरूर में अच्छी बारिश से किसानों में खुशी है।
खेड तहसील के राजगुरुनगर शहर में रविवार शाम को अचानक हुई दो घंटे की मूसलाधार बारिश से वाडा रोड पर स्थित कासवा कॉम्प्लेक्स की 25 से 30 दुकानों में 3 से 5 फीट तक पानी भर गया। इससे दुकानदारों का लाखों रुपये का सामान नष्ट हो गया है। जल निकासी व्यवस्था पूरी तरह ठप होने के कारण सड़कों का पानी सीधे कॉम्प्लेक्स में घुस गया। जिससे होटल, मोबाइल शॉप, कपड़ों की दुकानें और जेरॉक्स सेंटर बुरी तरह प्रभावित हुए। स्थानीय व्यापारियों ने प्रशासन के गलत नियोजन पर गंभीर सवाल उठाते हुए तुरंत पंचनामा कर आर्थिक सहायता देने की मांग की है।
आंबेगांव तहसील में आसमानी आफत से हाहाकार
आंबेगांव तहसील के कलंब प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य केंद्र में रविवार शाम को भारी बारिश का पानी घुसने से मरीजों और डॉक्टरों को भारी परेशानी झेलनी पड़ी, जिसका कारण ग्रामीणों ने महामार्ग के किनारे होटल व्यवसाथियों द्वारा किए गए अवैध अतिक्रमण को बताया है। वहीं, आंबेगांव के पिपलगाव खडकी में निजी सोलर प्रोजेक्ट का भारी खंभा गिरने से पिपलगाव-निरगुडसर मार्ग पर सब्या दो घंटे तक यातायात ठप रहा।
इसके अलावा, एकलहरे- सुलतानपूर क्षेत्र में मुख्य जल चैनल (चारी) फटने से बाढ़ का पानी खेतों में घुस गया, जिससे महेंद्र शिंदे और अन्य किसानों की प्याज, मक्का तथा धनिया की फसलों को भारी नकसान पहुंचा है,
यह भी पढ़ें:-  पुणे में राजस्व कर्मचारियों के तबादलों पर विवाद, NCP नेता ने आदेश रद्द करने की उठाई मांग 
शिरूर के भूमिपुत्रों को मिली बड़ी राहत
तबाही की इन खबरों के विपरीत, शिरूर तहसील के बेट क्षेत्र से एक बेहद सुखद खबर आई है। पिछले 1 महीने से सूखे की मार झेल रहे काठापूर खुर्द, पिंपरखेड, जांबुत, चांडोह, फाकटे, शरदवाडी और वडनेर खुर्द जैसे गांवों में रविवार शाम को 2 घंटे की संतोषजनक बारिश हुई। इस समाधानकारक बारिश ने किसानों की चिंता दूर कर दी है और उनके चेहरे पर आनंद दिखाई दे रहा है।
कलंब ग्राम पंचायत कमलेश वर्षे ने बाताया की महामार्ग के पास हुए अवैध अतिक्रमण की वजह से ही बारिश का पानी प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य केंद्र में घुस रहा है। सार्वजनिक निर्माण विभाग को तुरंत इस अतिक्रमण को हटाना चाहिए, अन्यथा भविष्य में नागरिकों के स्वास्थ्य के लिए और भी गंभीर खतरा पैदा हो जाएगा।
पिपलगांव महावितरण जे. एन. पाटील ने बाताया की यह बिजली लाइन और खंभा पूरी तरह है। इस घटना से महावितरण का कोई सीधा संबंध नहीं है। संबंधित निजी कंपनी ने ही तुरंत कदम उठाते हुए खंभे को हटाकर यातायात को सुचारू रूप से बहाल किया है।
